| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=670e3f713b274d05b6b05d26a504c2b9&_e=UCLvDabkV1mhOVcI1wLvBKsxOPpaGO3rWE3GglTN1t-91FbYGSB-bZ3VextBElE4NBDnWM8Gw7zf5zuzVg2KYi-ZAqDDpCL7tlqnTlpeLndWmJmQ0X4foCz0I25UFG6_PkFAYLT6-MzulOrDBJCv39l_8XpUr0U83VXXN8OwuKck_2MHcBDucc-QDEoqgZit9S-t59T3nocI9QZUB98vmKqcZ1SIfS_4aVMZNaZCo7mYUpzFGEae12XDpTrcaXKW-Zwj2WzvnXowZQOgnV6SHuZX9mI4IfYJVLBjirHrwzdDL7tPa6eA_bzZvuHXwf2I5yW8Th_L3POBcnd9zx4cJHQyrqIbEK2ivm2QMLJw9LuG-XuMmS752VMI-0CPSzr--qbE0WMLIYn-ohb_FbOP85Sf7kRPsvMQRlNIq3rV95McIFAWmelFBX7AtXr5JEh7)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=670e3f713b274d05b6b05d26a504c2b9&_e=UCLvDabkV1mhOVcI1wLvBKsxOPpaGO3rWE3GglTN1t-91FbYGSB-bZ3VextBElE4NBDnWM8Gw7zf5zuzVg2KYi-ZAqDDpCL7tlqnTlpeLndWmJmQ0X4foCz0I25UFG6_PkFAYLT6-MzulOrDBJCv39l_8XpUr0U83VXXN8OwuKck_2MHcBDucc-QDEoqgZit9S-t59T3nocI9QZUB98vmKqcZ1SIfS_4aVMZNaZCo7mYUpzFGEae12XDpTrcaXKW-Zwj2WzvnXowZQOgnV6SHuZX9mI4IfYJVLBjirHrwzdZKw2nwvrnbQlPu3J7GCeN4StMlXWFGSGY1DCioZUfoVZM-znQi3ohQpTQPN_D3xfcNZyFwiYfYSDxVYgxYOU2c11GYGIVHBI7tR2XWqSARWuiEyZVkudbQ_8F2cf_ylsS5J2a1fRN_retSfI9B9RH) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

Team, **Today marks the 4th anniversary of the January 6th attack on the U.S. Capitol** — a day we’ll forever remember as an assault on our democracy. But let’s be clear: the threat didn’t end when the insurrectionists left the Capitol steps. Many of the people who fueled Donald Trump’s Big Lie have risen to positions of power right here in Arizona. Take former GOP State Senator Anthony Kern — he was _literally_ in the mob at the Capitol on January 6th, and footage shows him in areas breached by the rioters as they clashed with Capitol Police. This is the same guy who helped push Arizona’s sham audit of the 2020 election. And he’s not alone. Dozens of Arizona politicians supported Trump’s attempt to overturn the 2020 election. These people are dangerous and unfit to lead. **We wouldn’t trust them with a paperclip, let alone decisions about our schools, rights, and democracy.** That’s why we’re organizing to defeat _every single one of them._ **[Can you pitch in today to help us hold extremists accountable and fight for Arizona’s future? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99972035/521353021/801652737?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjMzNDkzYTUtOGFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kOVmSaYifrZ_ucsiEKKzQeL-iHkpYgJApAgROxujZ2o=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99972036/521353022/801652737?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjMzNDkzYTUtOGFjYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kOVmSaYifrZ_ucsiEKKzQeL-iHkpYgJApAgROxujZ2o=)

name: bumping!
subject: Don't abandon Special Counsel Jack Smith!!!!!!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6)
---
Top Democrat,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with Jack Smith after Trump said Smith should be thrown out of the country.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] signatures short of our goal!

[**Team, we can’t abandon Special Counsel Jack Smith. Click HERE or use the button below to sign »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6) | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6)
---
We’ve attached the original petition below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: 🚨Alert - Trump Trial (via FFR)
Subject: re: Trump’s latest underhanded attack on Jack Smith
To: Top Democrat
❌ **DON’T SCROLL AWAY** ❌
❌ **DON’T DELETE THIS EMAIL** ❌
**DROP EVERYTHING AND READ THIS _AWFUL_ HEADLINE:**
**Trump is RELENTLESS in his attempts to intimidate Smith.**

**Smith must be under immense pressure. Now more than ever, he needs good Democrats like you to stand with him.**
**[_Top Democrat, sign our urgent petition standing with Special Counsel Jack Smith »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6)**
[_30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED ON OUR EMERGENCY PETITION:_ Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6)
---
Look, Jack Smith has done an amazing job as special counsel.

**But the GOP DOESN’T care.** They’re attacking Smith and his case from **_every angle_** in hopes of shielding Trump from justice!

We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith – if he doesn’t get enough support, his case against Trump could TOTALLY COLLAPSE.
**[_Let’s set an example: Nobody threatens good, honest public servants like Jack Smith. Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6)**
[_30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED ON OUR EMERGENCY PETITION:_ Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20250106_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6)
---
Thank you!

\- Fight for Reform

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=22722%2E4449941%2E01pTf6).**

name: YDA DNC Representatives
subject: We Want Your Input: Help Shape the Future of the DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Young Democrats of America, _www
body:
| |
---
Dear Young Democrats —
We want to update you on all things related to the upcoming DNC Officer Elections and how you can help shape the conversation around the future of our party.
This is a critical moment for the future of our party, and we want to ensure your voices are part of the conversation shaping its direction. **That's why we helped facilitate the first chair candidate forum last month in Boston, Massachusetts. with Ken Martin, Ben Wikler, Martin O'Malley, and James Skoufis.**

The Democratic National Committee will meet in **National Harbor, Maryland, from January 29 to February 1, 2025** to elect its next officers, with elections taking place on **Saturday, February 1**.
We’ve set up a feedback form to gather your input on the priorities you want the next DNC officers to champion. Now is your chance to highlight the issues and challenges affecting young people and our work as Young Democrats. **Your thoughts and ideas will be extremely valuable in helping guide our conversations with candidates. Please take a moment to complete the feedback form below.**
---
[ **CLICK HERE TO COMPLETE THE FEEDBACK FORM** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWwGamPY7W-vS4bGbFoLcGE_ImfMc4gtQsmvE_g2wVUJ9EmGpdvbPkZjSvKGL3hoNx0WfPX5dsooThBNdSk7mlvGYI3xAPw3ILe53DmzV5_E21wcEuykPqSM115aJIKgUrqQDJM-33MxoucEMB6SKaszKXGGFPea-Roop9blnrFCVWa0yYSxy5yCH22QK4X18jKPaYe3zKy71zFhT_IOz3ryzhsTVLB0qLp2pEsqrD8vP3pYDYa0-W5v0CW8T6JAWjlFaDt4yHi-Rz2OETKaljZHWqsvXo1RIWa8LXWp2n6qDmf7iH2shALa1F7E7vX0pEMeWmUAkDIPqelewTghauqLJdaQuvwix3FG0e08STDlhmP6xanG1q6wToWoKbePOnGmDqvUOWpuAubUeysVdRvIAD1aK4BbipJ-WaysYzi4PxmLAA3LXk1xrnAkUZETRfg/4cy/YNaoAREUQueF9_wtmKweDg/h0/h001.eTatVg39bx09qaI9OJeVZFC59dQGGfiLKarA5FMy48s)
---
We also want to update you on the state of the race for DNC officer positions. The nearly 450 members of the Democratic National Committee will elect a Chair, a Vice Chair for Civic Engagement and Voter Participation, three Vice Chairs, a Treasurer, a Secretary, and a National Finance Chair.

The DNC is holding four candidate forums over the next month, with the final one taking place in person on **January 30th** to coincide with the meeting. Forums are open to all to listen to and attend, so please watch the DNC website for announcements.

In order to qualify for the ballot and participate in the four forums, candidates must secure 40 DNC member signatures. The following individuals have met this threshold and will participate in the first forum, scheduled virtually for **January 11, 2025** :

---
**Candidates for Chair:**
* Quintessa Hathaway
* Ken Martin
* Martin O’Malley
* Jason Paul
* James Skoufis
* Nate Snyder
* Ben Wikler
* Marianne Williamson

**Candidates for Treasurer:**
* Matt Hughes*
* Virginia McGregor

**Candidates for Secretary:**
* Marilyn Davis
* Jason Rae

**Candidates for National Finance Chair:**
* Chris Korge
* Christopher Lowe

---
**Candidates for Vice Chair for Civic Engagement and Voter Participation:**
* Joyce Beatty
* Michael Blake
* Reyna Walters-Morgan
* Nikema Williams

**Candidates for Vice Chair:**
* Joe Barbuto
* Artie Blanco
* Waikinya Clanton
* Shasti Conrad
* Michelle Deatrick
* Aisha Dew
* Kalyn Free
* Adam Frisch
* David Hogg*
* Chris Jones
* Malcolm Kenyatta*
* Joe Paolino
* Jeanna Repass
* James Zogby

---
_*Indicates candidates under the age of 36_
---
Thank you for your time and commitment to our shared goal of building a Democratic Party that works for everyone. If you have any questions or concerns about the upcoming elections or the candidates, please don’t hesitate to reach out.
In solidarity,

**Your YDA DNC Representatives
****
** Quentin Wathum-Ocama, YDA President & DNC Executive Committee Member
Stephanie Campanha Wheaton, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative

Katherine Jeanes, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative
---

* * *
| The Young Democrats of America is the largest partisan youth organization in the United States. We organize young people to elect Democrats from school board to the White House.

_Monthly donations truly help sustain our work. name: MTG
subject: Petition: Rename J6 ‘Patriots Day’
body:
Let’s send a message to the establishment

| | | | |
---
%recipient.first% – As I write this, hundreds of patriotic Americans are sitting in jail cells in the Washington, DC gulag... Enduring inhumane and un-Godly conditions as political prisoners of a corrupt and weaponized DOJ.
They are not criminals; **they are political prisoners.**
They are being held because they dared to exercise their constitutional right to question an election: a sacred tradition as old as the Boston Tea Party itself.
They were targeted by institutions so corrupt and politicized, they make the USSR’s Secret Police look like a department store’s security guards.
These Americans deserve our appreciation... _**[and they deserve our recognition](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9MFa/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**
**__[That’s why I’m asking YOU, right now, to sign my petition to declare January 6th as American Patriots’ Day](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9MFa/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__ _._**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9MFa/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Let me be clear: this is not just about them. **This is about all of us.**
This is about whether we still live in a nation where freedom of speech, freedom of assembly, and freedom to stand up against injustice are protected rights—or if we have become a country where dissent is punished and patriots are silenced.
We don’t honor these patriots because of what the media says about that day;_****_**we honor them because of what it represents:**_**the courage to take a stand, the love of country that drives ordinary Americans to extraordinary action, and the resilience of a movement that refuses to be silenced.**_
[SIGN THE PETITION – DECLARE JANUARY 6th ‘AMERICAN PATRIOTS DAY’ ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9MFa/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Patriots’ Day will remind us of the values that make America great: love of country, belief in freedom, and the unshakable conviction that when the people rise, they cannot be silenced.
_Yours,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9MFa/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9MFa/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |
---

_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9MFc/?__vbtrk=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY4NjQ5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=268649&trkid=579550160&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: We need your help

body:
This year Democrats will have critical opportunities to defend and grow our power in key states like Virginia in competitive special elections. | | |
---
| |
---|---

name: Harry Dunn
subject: My life changed on January 6, 2021.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| 4 years ago today, I was walking into the Capitol for my shift as a Capitol police officer.

_I wouldn't know it yet, but my life was about to change forever._

I'd be attacked. Beaten with clubs, baseball bats. Sprayed with WD-40, pepper spray, bear spray. Called slurs that I'd never been called in my life.

An angry mob, emboldened by Donald Trump and MAGA-extremists pushing the Big Lie, would storm the Capitol. Never caring about the lives of me and my fellow officers. They destroyed a sacred place, an institution dedicated to upholding the rule of law. And they attempted to destroy democracy.

**My life changed on January 6. It's the reason I've spent the last 4 years fighting.**

[Our fight for democracy is never over, especially with Donald Trump taking office two weeks from today. I need you to dig deep right now. Will you chip in a split contribution of $10 or more to Dunn’s Democracy Defenders and Voter Protection Project to help reach our goal before midnight tonight?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85909?t=6&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Dunn’s Democracy Defenders and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85910?t=7&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85911?t=8&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85912?t=9&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85913?t=10&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85914?t=11&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-)
It's not dramatic to say that our democracy is on thin ice – but I can't save it alone.

Harry
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18383%2E878179%2E5x-4t-)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: A Big Year
body:
This should be a big year. I turn 50 next week, which I suppose is a natural time to be a little reflective. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=ddb77934f5&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| Hello, I hope that 2025 is off to a great start for you and yours!

This should be a big year. I turn 50 next week, which I suppose is a natural time to be a little reflective.

Some people express surprise when they hear that I’m turning 50 – I guess the moisturizer works. Apparently I seem much younger? Occasionally an older friend says, “You’re still a baby, welcome to the club!” I guess both can be true.

I’ve been young my whole life. I skipped kindergarten as a kid – I never learned to share – and was the small, young, scrawny kid every year. I was 11 in 7th grade for example. It did not help in sports.

Incidentally, I now think it’s a good idea for boys in particular to start later as they mature a bit more slowly. One of our boys is repeating a grade right now. Also a good idea? Gap years. I don’t think there’s a rush.

But back then, I kind of did. I started a company that flopped when I was 25, sold a company when I was 34, started Venture for America at 36 and started running for President at 43. I was convinced that AI was around the corner that was going to make life even more tenuous for the average American.

I was 45 in 2020, which definitely made me one of the youngest candidates in the field. Politics will make you seem young by comparison.

I’m grateful that I ran when my kids were too young to understand what the heck was going on. They still think of Iowa as a fun, chilly place with a children’s museum that allowed you to actually saw objects in half.

A mentor said to me, “You’re going to be more productive in the next 10 years than you ever were.” His argument was that I now know gajillions of people, I know how things work, I’ve been inside the machine. Not coincidentally, he’s 10 years older than I am. He also said, “A lot of people are looking to you to make sense of what’s happening.”

One thing that has given me a positive attitude about turning 50 is that I’ve tried to maximize my time in terms of making a difference. I haven’t been slacking, you know what I mean? I’ve taken big swings and have had a journey I’m proud of.

Thank you helping to make that so.

My friend is right that I know things now that I didn’t know before. I’d like to take advantage of them.

Can we accomplish big things? Let’s do our best in 2025. We have the time that’s given to us and nothing more. It’s up to us to make the most of it.

Thank you for keeping up with me. If you’d like to help celebrate my birthday, please consider making a [donation](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=7f00bfe979&e=0f227c2ae3) to Forward – we have some [new gear](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=4f4ea1d747&e=0f227c2ae3) that I’m enjoying. To hear my 2025 predictions on this week's podcast, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=f3cc19faf6&e=0f227c2ae3).

Here’s to thriving in ’25!
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=b9004b3dc6&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=d332800974&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=0fd9100e73) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=0fd9100e73).
---

name: CADEM
subject: January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
VP Harris is doing her duty |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99973380/521392899/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTVhZjQ3OS1hNGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcha10oHJq7LHBDyNH2Xez4CtnBzedRrduJ2edUkBgw=)

| Dear friends, While the 2024 presidential election outcome was devastating, the peaceful transfer of power is one of the most fundamental principles of American democracy. It distinguishes our system of government from monarchy or tyranny. Today we would like to thank California’s own Vice President Kamala Harris for doing her part in overseeing the peaceful transition of power by certifying the 2024 election results. **This duty is a sacred obligation.** We have seen that our democracy can be fragile. Four years ago, Donald Trump’s lies about the validity of the 2020 Election inspired an insurrection at the U.S. Capitol. We solemnly remember this tragic event — especially the memories of those who died in the aftermath. **And that’s why it is up to each of us to stand up for our most cherished principles.** We must stay engaged over the next four years, and continue to fight for our values against the incoming Trump Administration. Our team at the California Democratic Party is already building our roadmap for taking back control of the U.S. House (_we flipped three seats blue in 2024_), and we hope you will be a part of that. Together, we will keep progress moving forward. Thank you, \- CADEM [CHIP IN $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99973381/521392900/-102978502?&refcode=20250106_STU_45DO_Jan6&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTVhZjQ3OS1hNGNjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcha10oHJq7LHBDyNH2Xez4CtnBzedRrduJ2edUkBgw=)

clean_body: VP Harris is doing her duty | = | Dear friends, While the 2024 presidential election outcome was devastating, the peaceful transfer of power is one of the most fundamental principles of American democracy. It distinguishes our system of government from monarchy or tyranny. Today we would like to thank California’s own Vice President Kamala Harris for doing her part in overseeing the peaceful transition of power by certifying the 2024 election results. This duty is a sacred obligation. We have seen that our democracy can be fragile. Four years ago, Donald Trump’s lies about the validity of the 2020 Election inspired an insurrection at the U.S. Capitol. We solemnly remember this tragic event — especially the memories of those who died in the aftermath. And that’s why it is up to each of us to stand up for our most cherished principles. We must stay engaged over the next four years, and continue to fight for our values against the incoming Trump Administration. Our team at the California Democratic Party is already building our roadmap for taking back control of the U.S. House (we flipped three seats blue in 2024), and we hope you will be a part of that. Together, we will keep progress moving forward. Thank you, \- CADEM = | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to . | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: Team WisGOP
subject: Help Grow the Bench!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Join the WisGOP Farm Team and help us continue to build a bench of conservative leaders who will help lead with common sense policies.
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-cyuxjd-didthutlhu-q/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cyuxjd-didthutlhu-r/) In 2021, the Republican Party of Wisconsin (RPW) launched a bold mission: **turn local elections into conservative victories**. Today, that mission is unstoppable.Here's what **YOU** made possible in 2024:
🔥 **80%** of RPW-assisted candidates WON their races.
🔥 Conservatives were elected in **42+ counties** , reshaping communities across Wisconsin.But this is just the beginning.We're taking it to the next level with the **Farm Team Initiative **in the **2025 Spring cycle**! This isn't just any initiative--it's a **movement** to train, inspire, and equip the next wave of conservative champions to lead boldly in local office.This is your chance to:
✅ Be part of the team that builds Wisconsin's future.
✅ Help conservatives WIN where it matters most.
✅ Strengthen our bench for generations to come.**Here 's how you can make a difference:**
💥 [**Donate now**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cyuxjd-didthutlhu-y/) to power our winning momentum.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z39oa6h9o8vh19i11g1734jrloctspkp3juterhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2o36c9h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96cg6o6p0ao0mqrhjcsdunlek6s96pfbtec96u8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2o36c9h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmi6r2srk5f5fuo2qrohrvd983aa35t0rjbh5qbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2o36c9h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrn5f6mmclhgphkjsqpuufhoklfo080c774a88bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2o36c9h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8o12vdlbcarfliq69nn61ifeb9q7tms5hl8il3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2o36c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36c3gm9p34s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6btdvfds29uum5o96ec3k6kp7ap8tln7ps4116o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2o36c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1a780jhtptlc4cj57jpu1fiuhj4e08thqq8at8g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cdh62ob0cph649fg)

"We'll double every dollar you donate today". That's right - your contribution will be matched 100%, dollar-for-dollar, up to $100,000. This is a critical opportunity to make a real difference in these special elections. | | | "Generic Button" | Here's the reality: if we lose just one of these seats, our Majority will shrink and getting our America First agenda across the finish line will become MUCH more difficult. But with your help, we can ensure that doesn't happen. The first special elections are just around the corner, and we need your support now. "Donate today and take advantage of our 2X matching gift offer." "Contribute $25, and we'll turn it into $50 " "Contribute $50, and we'll turn it into $100 " "Contribute $100, and we'll turn it into $200 " | | | "Generic Button" | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. subject: Redrawn lines in NY-21 and low voter turnout
body:
What really happened in the 2024 race

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..ulzBj3VZWT8v5YeGlDvQm5XEwshbvrh_J7X4Ym8lc0k?) for more
---
NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Redrawn lines in NY-21 and low voter turnout](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154279756&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0Mjc5NzU2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYyMjY3NjcsImV4cCI6MTczODgxODc2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bQwWy5rmc7RX01eSzb9oGTHhuNBxGetaD4qGakZoET8)
### What really happened in the 2024 race
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Jan 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154279756&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0Mjc5NzU2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjIyNjc2NywiZXhwIjoxNzM4ODE4NzY3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6Y7AAe-UPSp6HuzuSztb4FKkgKrtXud9qc1aDBdOwfo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=154279756&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0Mjc5NzU2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYyMjY3NjcsImV4cCI6MTczODgxODc2NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bQwWy5rmc7RX01eSzb9oGTHhuNBxGetaD4qGakZoET8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack..2z2heaA9QCOYMfbkAByyO3NvGDj7iWVHvjy3g9jK3KQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/redrawn-lines-in-ny-21-and-low-voter?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/91eec1e3-b74a-4306-bcf5-d9939ce39cf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Figure 1: Map of NY Congressional Districts. Source: [Wikipedia](https://substack.com/redirect/accc0031-5d0a-45bc-bdcd-dad7a494e088?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### NY-21 takes up more landmass than any other NY Congressional District
I first met with the county chairs on February 2, 2024 to discuss my candidacy for Congress in NY-21. We met at the Ambrosia Diner, in Queensbury, New York. We talked about the challenges of running in NY-21, given how Republican the district is, and how massive NY-21 map is.
Petitioning, per New York State Board of Elections rules, started on February 27, 2024.
By February 28, 2024, the district lines had been re-drawn. This caused a delay in petitioning for three days. That was jolting, since county committees were set with their packets to hand out to volunteers. Petitioning was tough.
And now, not quite a year later, we are looking at launching a second campaign.
### Compare the old NY-21 map with the new NY-21 map
You can see the current district in green in Figure 1, above. NY-21 covers more square miles than any other district in NY, with all or part of 15 counties and 15,000 square miles.
Throughout the campaign, we had quite a few conversations about where the new lines were versus the old lines. Voters were confused. Volunteers were confused. At times, I was confused.
Several in the media thought that the [new lines offered "clarity"](https://substack.com/redirect/f6b39df4-3b14-425a-8090-edfaff792ecc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I'm not so sure about that. [Harvey Schantz, a professor at SUNY Plattsburgh](https://substack.com/redirect/43c679ab-ff0d-42a5-a061-9656d302a331?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was quoted as saying that not much changed. That was true for Plattsburgh. Good for Harvey Schantz.
Unfortunately, people throughout the district grabbed that line, "Not much has changed", even though elsewhere in the district, quite a bit changed. We lost Otsego County altogether. We lost part of Montgomery County and part of Jefferson County. We lost Rensselaer County. But we picked up the northern part of Saratoga County, and the northern part of Oneida County.
Take a look at Figure 1, and notice where Utica is. Rome is just a few miles northwest of Utica. Importantly, with the newly drawn maps, we picked up Rome and some neighborhoods in the greater Utica area. Those are more densely populated areas than most of the rest of NY-21.
You can see Figure 2, below. That's the map that we had until Feb 28, 2024. No Oneida County for NY-21.
And then scroll down to Figure 3, below. That's the map we have had since Feb 28, 2024, and that we will continue to have until the next census.
The old map:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e644523c-1ac0-4357-b35b-7201c2955543?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Figure 2: NY-21 Map used until Feb 28, 2024. Source: [Latfor ](https://substack.com/redirect/6db7c081-4be6-4992-af6c-d38a3a79a525?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
The new map:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cff0e8e2-420c-4aa6-9480-106c6f33deef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Figure 3: NY-21 map used after Feb 28, 2024. Source: [Latfor](https://substack.com/redirect/631383fa-6d83-4f44-90af-14933392e811?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### More voters cast ballots for me than for any other NY-21 candidate
Anecdotally, many thought that the lines for NY-21 were drawn the way they were to help flip other districts. I don't know the answer to that.
What I do know is that my campaign got more votes than any other candidate in recent memory in NY-21.
> • Bill Owens 2012 - 126,631 votes
> • Woolf 2014 - 54,796 votes
> • Derek 2016 - 82,161 votes
> • Cobb 2018 - 99,791 votes
> • Cobb 2020 - 131,992 votes
> • Castelli 2022 - 116,421 votes
> • **Collins 2024 - 132,447 votes**
*NYTimes data, except for data on Bill Owens, which was from Ballotpedia.
### But what about those percentages?
The story told in the percentage returns was not so encouraging. My campaign came in at 38%, which continued the slide in the NY-21 race:
• Cobb 2018 - 42.4%
• Cobb 2020 - 41.1%
• Castelli 2022 - 40.8%
• **Collins 2024 - 38.0% **
It is discouraging, to say the least. But what happened to percentages in my race was played out in races all over the country. The steady rise of MAGA delivers a strong punch, especially in rural districts like NY-21.
### It is puzzling. How did this happen?
To summarize, we had a gain of about 16,000 votes compared to the 2022 candidate, but we had a 2.8% drop in percentage performance.
I'm sure political analysts could spend several weeks and lots of digital space figuring out exactly what accounted for the drop.
Was the percentage drop, combined with an increase in raw votes, due to the re-drawn district lines? Hard to say. I would say the re-drawn district lines may potentially work in Democrats' favor in a normal year, but this election was far from a normal year.
My home-spun analysis: it was a weird race.
### Democrats did not get as many people to the polls in New York as Republican did.
My figures, pulled from county Board of Elections sites in April, showed the following numbers of registered voters (these numbers reflect total county registrations, rather than just the parts of counties that are in NY-21)
* Democrats: 232,456
* Republicans: 310,532
* Conservatives: 14,189
* Working Families Party: 3,164
* Other: 40,761
* Blank: 206,165

With numbers like that, we needed to pull from moderate Republicans, Working Families Party, Other, and Blank voters, plus get really high turnout from registered Democrats. Moreover, we needed to hope that Republicans stayed home.
Statewide, none of that happened on November 5, 2024.
The Times Union said this:
> Although Democrats hold a clear enrollment advantage with more than twice the number of registered Republicans in the state, the Republican Party successfully mobilized a larger share of its base, closely followed by the Conservative Party. In contrast, voters with no party affiliation, the second-largest enrollment group, had one of the lowest turnout rates relative to their enrollment size.
Specifically, in NY-21 Democrats had a 72% voter turnout, while Republicans had a 77% voter turnout. That 5% right there was the deal breaker. There were more registered Republicans to begin with, and their team got a 5% better voter turnout than our side did.
Only 58% of Independent voters turned out. There was very little to pull from there.
Well gee -- I suppose we should be glad that we did not have a 5% drop in our percentage of 2022 compared to 2024. We ran a good campaign, even in a tough environment.
Compare that 72-77-58 split of Democrat-Republican-Independent voter turnout in NY-21 to what happened in NY-19 (where Josh Riley won). There, the overall voter turnout was much lower, but it leaned in favor of the Democrats. There the split on voter turnout was 54-52-37. The NY Times results on that race show that Democrat Josh Riley beat Marc Molinaro, 51.1% to 48.9%. Note that the roughly 2% difference on voter turnout is almost mirrored in the election results.
The surprise was the Mannion race. In NY-22 (where John Mannion won), the numbers: Democrats 58% voter turnout, Republicans 62% voter turnout, and Independents 45% voter turnout. The NY Times results on that race show that Democrat Mannion beat Republican Williams, 54.6% to 45.4%. Perhaps this disparity can be explained because Mannion is a well-known NY State Senator who also taught school in the area, while Williams is relatively new to the area and had only served one term.
### In NY-21, the impact of the redrawn maps, combined with divided resources and divided volunteer support brought the percentages down
Back to the NY-21 race. Early on, it looked like we would pick up some significant numbers in Oneida County. The people, in general, were mad, particularly in Rome and the northern part of Oneida County. Imagine -- some people woke up one day to learn that lawmakers had redrawn maps to make Elise Stefanik their representative. Other people learned of their new congressional district when they got a postcard from my campaign. Some called me to argue with me about it; others returned the card in the mail with a note that I must be mistaken. Still others didn't learn of their new district until they showed up at the polls.
(Take another look at the map in Figure 1 to see how important Rome and Utica are to the next part of my discussion.) The Democrats' energy and resources in Oneida County were divided. Volunteers were called upon to work for the John Mannion campaign in NY-22 as well as my campaign. Some people also drove to the next county to volunteer for Josh Riley's campaign in NY-19. This was all part of the New York state coordinated campaign, designed to focus energy and resources on flippable seats. In the Rome/Utica area, which should have been a stronghold for us because it was one of the few larger population centers in the district, there were three congressional candidates and numerous state and local candidates vying for volunteer and voter attention.
Democrats had their marching orders: all hands on deck for the Harris/Walz ticket, followed closely by focused work on the Mannion and/or Riley races. The NY State Democratic Party prioritized the Mannion and Riley races by placing them in what was called the state's coordinated campaign. Those races received additional resources (financial resources, headquarters, and field operators).
To summarize: one place where we felt the impact of the redrawn maps was Utica/Rome. Most volunteers reported in to the Democratic Headquarters in Utica, which we had use of, but which was really dedicated to the coordinated campaign efforts for the Mannion campaign. Outside of Utica, we had strong town chairs working on our behalf, especially in Town of Trenton and City of Rome. But in the end, there was only so much that could be done, with so many candidates to diffuse volunteer efforts.
Other factors: many voters in my district were not thrilled with the national party's emphasis on social issues, and instead expressed that the economy was the issue that was most important to them.
And then there was Prop 1, NY's Equal Rights Amendment. Personally I was thrilled to have it on the ballot. But I think it muddied the waters with many of my voters. There were Town Halls and town meetings. People showed up, but the transgender issues were divisive.
### Back to the percentages
For reference, there are four population centers in NY-21. They are Canton/Potsdam, Plattsburgh, Glens Falls/Queensbury, and Rome/Utica.
The Oneida County challenges might have been overcome in other areas of the district, if we could have successfully gotten more voters to the polls in comparison to the Republicans. But in the final tally, that 5% advantage in Republican voter turnout was something we simply could not overcome in a district in which we already had significantly lower registered Democrats compared to Republicans.
### What will be different in the Special Election?
By now, you have probably heard that Republican Elise Stefanik has been nominated to be UN Ambassador. Once confirmed and officially appointed, she will resign her seat and NY Governor Kathy Hochul will call a Special Election. The respective party leaders (Republican, Conservative, Democratic, Working Families Party) will nominate a person to person to fill their ballot lines.
What will be different for my campaign in NY-21, you ask? For starters, Mannion and Riley are safely sworn in to their seats in Congress. Secondly there will not be the plethora of state and local races. The volunteer efforts will be solidly focused on the NY-21 race.
I have taken the following steps to make my campaign successful in 2025:
* I hired a new, nationally-known political team. They count among their clients Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and hundreds of other successful Democrats
* I will secure advertising contracts in the newspapers throughout the North Country
* I will set up a physical headquarters in every county throughout the district
* I will hire another professional political team to manage and staff the physical headquarters
* Together, we will phone bank, canvass (as best as we can in the snow!) and get out the vote.
* Unlike any other candidate in this race, I know the ins and outs of all 15 counties. There is a learning curve to this district, that any candidate who is new to the race will have to undergo.
* There will be no Donald Trump on the ticket
* For the first time since 2015, Elise Stefanik will not be on the ticket
* The Republicans are divided. (Note that Republican Dan Stec, whose Senate District 45 is also quite geographically large, got [104,000 votes](https://substack.com/redirect/445244bd-d13b-4e6a-a0b1-66b28d2a69d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the November 2024 election, and he ran unopposed. Stec has announced his candidacy for NY-21. Secondly, note that Republican Anthony Constantino, also hoping to get the Republican nomination, is out of the district in the Feb 2024 map. Constantino lives in Amsterdam in Montgomery County. This will no doubt become an issue. Bill Owens won his seat in a year in which the Republicans were squabbling.)

### With 100% focus, we have the greatest chance to turn NY-21 blue than we have had since Bill Owens' 2009 race.
### With a razor-thin majority, the entire country will thank us for adding another Democrat to the House of Representatives, and will support us in our efforts to flip the seat.
### All hands on deck. Let's do this.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. Checks can be sent to Paula Collins for Congress; 441 Old State Road, DeKalb Junction, NY 13630, or by [visiting ActBlue](https://substack.com/redirect/6e5356fd-c523-45df-b57d-3b7139467984?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..FF7_WZIsDqnIn72_w918W0kbJXJbeSW97ZjmwCRnXYc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154279756)

There, the overall voter turnout was much lower, but it leaned in favor of the Democrats. There the split on voter turnout was 54-52-37. The NY Times results on that race show that Democrat Josh Riley beat Marc Molinaro, 51.1% to 48.9%. Note that the roughly 2% difference on voter turnout is almost mirrored in the election results. The surprise was the Mannion race. In NY-22 (where John Mannion won), the numbers: Democrats 58% voter turnout, Republicans 62% voter turnout, and Independents 45% voter turnout. The NY Times results on that race show that Democrat Mannion beat Republican Williams, 54.6% to 45.4%. Perhaps this disparity can be explained because Mannion is a well-known NY State Senator who also taught school in the area, while Williams is relatively new to the area and had only served one term. In NY-21, the impact of the redrawn maps, combined with divided resources and divided volunteer support brought the percentages down Back to the NY-21 race. Early on, it looked like we would pick up some significant numbers in Oneida County. The people, in general, were mad, particularly in Rome and the northern part of Oneida County. Imagine -- some people woke up one day to learn that lawmakers had redrawn maps to make Elise Stefanik their representative. Other people learned of their new congressional district when they got a postcard from my campaign. Some called me to argue with me about it; others returned the card in the mail with a note that I must be mistaken. Still others didn't learn of their new district until they showed up at the polls. (Take another look at the map in Figure 1 to see how important Rome and Utica are to the next part of my discussion.) The Democrats' energy and resources in Oneida County were divided. Volunteers were called upon to work for the John Mannion campaign in NY-22 as well as my campaign. Some people also drove to the next county to volunteer for Josh Riley's campaign in NY-19. This was all part of the New York state coordinated campaign, designed to focus energy and resources on flippable seats. In the Rome/Utica area, which should have been a stronghold for us because it was one of the few larger population centers in the district, there were three congressional candidates and numerous state and local candidates vying for volunteer and voter attention. Democrats had their marching orders: all hands on deck for the Harris/Walz ticket, followed closely by focused work on the Mannion and/or Riley races. The NY State Democratic Party prioritized the Mannion and Riley races by placing them in what was called the state's coordinated campaign. Those races received additional resources (financial resources, headquarters, and field operators). To summarize: one place where we felt the impact of the redrawn maps was Utica/Rome. Most volunteers reported in to the Democratic Headquarters in Utica, which we had use of, but which was really dedicated to the coordinated campaign efforts for the Mannion campaign. Outside of Utica, we had strong town chairs working on our behalf, especially in Town of Trenton and City of Rome. But in the end, there was only so much that could be done, with so many candidates to diffuse volunteer efforts. Other factors: many voters in my district were not thrilled with the national party's emphasis on social issues, and instead expressed that the economy was the issue that was most important to them. And then there was Prop 1, NY's Equal Rights Amendment. Personally I was thrilled to have it on the ballot. But I think it muddied the waters with many of my voters. There were Town Halls and town meetings. People showed up, but the transgender issues were divisive. Back to the percentages For reference, there are four population centers in NY-21. They are Canton/Potsdam, Plattsburgh, Glens Falls/Queensbury, and Rome/Utica. The Oneida County challenges might have been overcome in other areas of the district, if we could have successfully gotten more voters to the polls in comparison to the Republicans. But in the final tally, that 5% advantage in Republican voter turnout was something we simply could not overcome in a district in which we already had significantly lower registered Democrats compared to Republicans. What will be different in the Special Election? By now, you have probably heard that Republican Elise Stefanik has been nominated to be UN Ambassador. Once confirmed and officially appointed, she will resign her seat and NY Governor Kathy Hochul will call a Special Election. The respective party leaders (Republican, Conservative, Democratic, Working Families Party) will nominate a person to person to fill their ballot lines. What will be different for my campaign in NY-21, you ask? For starters, Mannion and Riley are safely sworn in to their seats in Congress. Secondly there will not be the plethora of state and local races. The volunteer efforts will be solidly focused on the NY-21 race. I have taken the following steps to make my campaign successful in 2025: I hired a new, nationally-known political team. They count among their clients Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and hundreds of other successful Democrats I will secure advertising contracts in the newspapers throughout the North Country I will set up a physical headquarters in every county throughout the district I will hire another professional political team to manage and staff the physical headquarters Together, we will phone bank, canvass (as best as we can in the snow!) and get out the vote. Unlike any other candidate in this race, I know the ins and outs of all 15 counties. There is a learning curve to this district, that any candidate who is new to the race will have to undergo. There will be no Donald Trump on the ticket For the first time since 2015, Elise Stefanik will not be on the ticket * The Republicans are divided. (Note that Republican Dan Stec, whose Senate District 45 is also quite geographically large, got in the November 2024 election, and he ran unopposed. Stec has announced his candidacy for NY-21. Secondly, note that Republican Anthony Constantino, also hoping to get the Republican nomination, is out of the district in the Feb 2024 map. Constantino lives in Amsterdam in Montgomery County. This will no doubt become an issue. Bill Owens won his seat in a year in which the Republicans were squabbling.) With 100% focus, we have the greatest chance to turn NY-21 blue than we have had since Bill Owens' 2009 race. With a razor-thin majority, the entire country will thank us for adding another Democrat to the House of Representatives, and will support us in our efforts to flip the seat. All hands on deck. Let's do this. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. Checks can be sent to Paula Collins for Congress; 441 Old State Road, DeKalb Junction, NY 13630, or by . | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl1ebmb75os7aoj3bu39ifrbcns7kn8f4ihhndv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2p74c3h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbqatbo35t4g6hlvu63sjf02t83rg8fsqrn73n28_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2p74c3h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc5l1hhrva1qr83hrccr0oa407sjcr00s1s3k4i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2p74c3h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztfjl15ajeldtc50md29o051498vmrfmg23581to_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gm2p74c3h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

I'm a former advisor to President Donald Trump, and I've uncovered alarming information that could impact your financial security over the next few months.
These new stock market highs are built on shaky foundations.
A huge crack is forming in the American economy. The elites know all about it, but most ordinary citizens have no idea.
But I'm coming forward for the first time because this is too important. Everything you've worked so hard for could be at risk.
I can't sit back and allow hard-working Americans to be financially battered, while the elites make more and more money yet again.
So what's going on?
And how could it impact your life, and the lives of your children and grandchildren over the next few months?

name: MassGOP
subject: Massachusetts Republican Party Calls for Resignation of Cape Cod Democratic Rep. Chris Flanagan Following Criminal Referral to U.S. Attorney’s Office
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jv_2w3jksDEqJyvXNxYgu1kck3wDonctwncUjzEVZh_g7SAoKbhAj4yG-FApw7F3xG8kHsFWtkMT6LuRH4sowQPa_z0jhs8WcVHxV_fBg2_6nOOWKVntUJLDXOB44nP8lZvcmxnotN51R5a_ORKQYg==&c=DqJgXxGq8vQ6iOIoJX1wz5vnCk4p_jdOXkb4ytKnnddTcCW9n9HtYA==&ch=o9ODVVQWpKvu-yxEC9xYlOUrV3LPU3WuGD9VBlDbJaQIQStGBO4zqQ==)
---
| Massachusetts Republican Party Calls for Resignation of Cape Cod Democratic Rep. Chris Flanagan Following Criminal Referral to U.S. Attorney's Office
---
---
| Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party is calling for the immediate resignation of State Representative Chris Flanagan (D-1st Barnstable) following multiple instances of corruption and public deception. This demand follows an announcement by the Barnstable Police Department that Flanagan is under investigation by the Massachusetts U.S. Attorney for "alleged potential criminal activity involving Christopher Flanagan and the 'Chris Flanagan for State Representative for the 1st Barnstable District' campaign."
"Representative Flanagan has repeatedly misled the public and violated campaign finance laws, as documented by OCPF," MassGOP Chair, Amy Carnevale stated. "His pattern of illegal actions has escalated to the point of federal scrutiny. This is not a partisan issue; it's about restoring trust in our elected officials. Representative Flanagan must resign immediately to uphold the integrity of the office he holds."
MassGOP Vice Chair Judy Crocker, who represents the Cape and Islands on the Massachusetts Republican State Committee, echoed Chair Carnevale's call for Representative Flanagan's resignation, stating, "The residents of the 1st Barnstable District deserve a representative with integrity who prioritizes their interests--not someone under active federal investigation. From misleading voters into believing he had Republican support, to campaign finance violations documented by OCPF, and now reports of tens of thousands of dollars allegedly being stolen, it's clear that the trust has been broken. The jig is up. Flanagan must resign so the people of the 1st Barnstable District can move forward with the honest and ethical representation they deserve."
If Flanagan does not resign, there is precedent for the Democratic supermajority to expel one of its own members after a criminal investigation is opened. In 2014 lawmakers [expelled](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jv_2w3jksDEqJyvXNxYgu1kck3wDonctwncUjzEVZh_g7SAoKbhAj_WJIyKrFuZCFl8HH63phaF-eis3noLB1_au0z37IooRCHRNg_z6q3Kx8TVVtxD6KIry5_zVNlW4NxI-KIWq9WU2rqpGrgmujpC032tP8JaLkezpi-F6sWJKIVQQX01ujXJbDb4nuVSijtW3qGh-PfQNXvYQvvIna4E7rzqMOJr-&c=DqJgXxGq8vQ6iOIoJX1wz5vnCk4p_jdOXkb4ytKnnddTcCW9n9HtYA==&ch=o9ODVVQWpKvu-yxEC9xYlOUrV3LPU3WuGD9VBlDbJaQIQStGBO4zqQ==) former Rep. Carlos Henriquez after he was sentenced to six months' imprisonment for domestic battery of his ex-girlfriend. This time, Lawmakers should not wait until a conviction, as it's impossible for Flanagan to serve ethically under the cloud of a federal investigation.
###
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | Massachusetts Republican Party Calls for Resignation of Cape Cod Democratic Rep. Chris Flanagan Following Criminal Referral to U.S. Attorney's Office | Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party is calling for the immediate resignation of State Representative Chris Flanagan (D-1st Barnstable) following multiple instances of corruption and public deception. This demand follows an announcement by the Barnstable Police Department that Flanagan is under investigation by the Massachusetts U.S. Attorney for "alleged potential criminal activity involving Christopher Flanagan and the 'Chris Flanagan for State Representative for the 1st Barnstable District' campaign." "Representative Flanagan has repeatedly misled the public and violated campaign finance laws, as documented by OCPF," MassGOP Chair, Amy Carnevale stated. "His pattern of illegal actions has escalated to the point of federal scrutiny. This is not a partisan issue; it's about restoring trust in our elected officials. Representative Flanagan must resign immediately to uphold the integrity of the office he holds." MassGOP Vice Chair Judy Crocker, who represents the Cape and Islands on the Massachusetts Republican State Committee, echoed Chair Carnevale's call for Representative Flanagan's resignation, stating, "The residents of the 1st Barnstable District deserve a representative with integrity who prioritizes their interests--not someone under active federal investigation. From misleading voters into believing he had Republican support, to campaign finance violations documented by OCPF, and now reports of tens of thousands of dollars allegedly being stolen, it's clear that the trust has been broken. The jig is up. Flanagan must resign so the people of the 1st Barnstable District can move forward with the honest and ethical representation they deserve." If Flanagan does not resign, there is precedent for the Democratic supermajority to expel one of its own members after a criminal investigation is opened. In 2014 lawmakers == former Rep. Carlos Henriquez after he was sentenced to six months' imprisonment for domestic battery of his ex-girlfriend. This time, Lawmakers should not wait until a conviction, as it's impossible for Flanagan to serve ethically under the cloud of a federal investigation. | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

# **A huge crack is forming in the US economy**
* * *
I'm a former advisor to President Donald Trump, and I've uncovered alarming information that could impact your financial security over the next few months.
These new stock market highs are built on shaky foundations.
A huge crack is forming in the American economy. The elites know all about it, but most ordinary citizens have no idea.
But I'm coming forward for the first time because this is too important. Everything you've worked so hard for could be at risk.
I can't sit back and allow hard-working Americans to be financially battered, while the elites make more and more money yet again.
So what's going on?
And how could it impact your life, and the lives of your children and grandchildren over the next few months?

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Tomorrow is the First Day of Session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
The 2025 General Assembly Session begins tomorrow
| | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
---
| 2025 SESSION BEGINS TOMORROW
---
|
# SPECIAL ELECTION TODAY
SENATE DISTRICT 10 (Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Western Hanover, Shady Grove precinct Henrico, Louisa, Powhatan) LUTHER CIFERS 6AM-7PM REGULAR POLLING LOCATION
---
| Dear Friends & Supporters,
The Honey Badger Report is back.
I was pleasantly surprised at how many of you said that you enjoyed reading my daily and weekly reports, during the 2024 legislative session.
Did you know that you can actually speak for or against a bill remotely while legislators are in committee discussing whether to pass or kill a bill?
Now's your chance.
Stay tuned and I'll teach you how to watch as legislators debate bills and participate in the process.
As a trusted grassroots leader who knows how things really work in Richmond, I hope together we can bring "action, action, action" to Richmond on a number of bills coming up over the next few weeks.
I look forward to staying engaged with you as together we closely monitor bills that come before each committee. Every bill that comes before the General Assembly can effect the quality of your life and we have to be alert and stay active.
After serving you for 8 years in the Senate of Virginia, I intend to use my knowledge and experience to keep you informed and help you participate in the process.
Tomorrow, January 8, 2025 the General Assembly gavels in at noon, as it does most every day except Fridays. They will adjourn on Saturday, February 22, 2025.
If you'd like to watch the swearing in of our legislators please click the link below.
---
| |
---
|
---
While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated.
Thank you.
---
| First Day of the 2025 Session: Wednesday, January 8, 2025 at noon
---
| All bills have to be filed by 10am, a deadline to complete the pre-filing of bills before legislators gavel in at noon for Floor Session to adopt the procedural resolutions for both the House and the Senate.
Once complete, we can get started. With every passing day the Floor Session will get longer as bills pass out of committee and on to the floor. Watch the swearing in ceremony live.
---

body:
It's your last chance to become a Member & help us hit our 50,000 member goal!

|
---
| | |
Hi there, Friend.

I hope this message finds you well. It's Tommy from Membership Services over here at House GOP HQ.

In case you missed our previous attempts to reach you- **[you are eligible to become a 2025 House Republican Member.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl7ktdgfopstk4a1ikc7nsa7cpc86j1nocn2l9dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9gmeor2cth2bs "you are eligible to become a 2025 House Republican Member.")** This is a rare and exciting offer, Friend. Out of MILLIONS of Republicans, we've identified just **50,000** patriots for Membership at this time.

Since we only have a limited number of membership cards at House GOP Headquarters, we're only reaching out to our most loyal 50,000 supporters & those we know share our strong conservative values.

body:
It's your last chance to become a Member & help us hit our 50,000 member goal!

|

| | |
Hi there, Friend.

I hope this message finds you well. It's Tommy from Membership Services over here at House GOP HQ.

In case you missed our previous attempts to reach you- **[you are eligible to become a 2025 House Republican Member.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0shfvlav15pn41vivgjottv2k7s8b3gug9jpvc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9im0pj0cph2bs "you are eligible to become a 2025 House Republican Member.")** This is a rare and exciting offer, Friend. body:
It's your last chance to become a Member & help us hit our 50,000 member goal!

|
---
| | |
Hi there, Friend.

I hope this message finds you well. It's Tommy from Membership Services over here at House GOP HQ.

In case you missed our previous attempts to reach you- **[you are eligible to become a 2025 House Republican Member.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziamnug0suh58klagkum1ga60fbc9vf0t5di3h00_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9im4p32cph2bs "you are eligible to become a 2025 House Republican Member.")** This is a rare and exciting offer, Friend. Out of MILLIONS of Republicans, we've identified just **50,000** patriots for Membership at this time.
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmnnocfnpfbviimvrl00lu11gr973doi9sbaneso_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9im4p32cph2bs)
---

---
| | | [BECOME A 2025 MEMBER](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvl9joeb09f99uun0m8hgvsbhf9nuqdauaqbmsb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9im4p32cph2bs "Generic Button")
---

Since we only have a limited number of membership cards at House GOP Headquarters, we're only reaching out to our most loyal 50,000 supporters & those we know share our strong conservative values.

I would HATE to see you miss out on such an exciting offer, Friend.

**[Will you go ahead and claim this RARE offer before it disappears for good?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsksv7hfbrvog7v1m9mpvlspbd6id6sn1l6o71o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9im4p32cph2bs "Will you go ahead and claim this RARE offer before it disappears for good?")**

---

---

Thank you so much,

Tommy
House GOP Membership

### In less than a week, 2025 has revealed a democracy teetering on the verge of collapse even before Trump takes office
