Today's [anniversary](https://substack.com/redirect/253d4635-61ba-4cd9-9785-cebc2142e554?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) may seem auspicious, on the eve of the president-elect returning to the White House in just two weeks. But democracy in America was crumbling long before the January 6, 2021 attack on the U.S. Capitol. The last week has exposed its collapse in no uncertain terms.
_Many voices would claim that the source of these nightmares coming to fruition is the right wing, and a president-elect willing to demonize his critics. That might seem like a satisfying analysis, but it is unfortunately inaccurate._
### **History taking shape before our eyes**
35 years ago, as the Berlin wall fell between the countries of NATO and the Warsaw Pact, political scientist Francis Fukuyama envisioned what he described as "[the end of history](https://substack.com/redirect/d243d131-a753-4241-adea-08b868f6a665?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." How painfully wrong he proved to be.
Fukuyama envisioned an indefinite future dominated by an emerging global neoliberal consensus favoring the free flow of capital encouraging an era of peace between nations.
What ultimately ensued was a predatory seizure of resources by billionaires supported by each of the major corporate political parties, which in turn created such a crisis for middle and working-class Americans that, last month--with eyes wide open--they electorally overthrew the neoliberal consensus envisioned by Fukayama as permanent, in favor of an overt fascism whose contours are already taking shape even before the incoming administration takes office.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post with them._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=154318276&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MzE4Mjc2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYyMzU2MDUsImV4cCI6MTczODgyNzYwNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mv5rw5hE9ZwNC0CsQE5oUcawygQaJvqksqH0kl4qbSM)
### **What the failure of democracy looks like**
Political violence indicates the failure of democracy. The very point of respecting the [consent of the governed](https://substack.com/redirect/c43a1156-9fcb-4969-888e-97f7bd1902cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), beyond whatever theoretical moral value that carries, is to channel political concerns into nonviolent discourse. Democracies (at least claim to) wield greater legitimacy, which helps support political stability.
Put another way, President John F. Kennedy [observed](https://substack.com/redirect/02092f78-628e-41f4-ace4-a2acd22d15a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that "Those who make peaceful revolution impossible will make violent revolution inevitable."
The contemporary history of the United States more or less proves his point.
Violence in the U.S. has grown thoroughly pervasive, exposing the failure of [democracy in America](https://substack.com/redirect/c3f2ac49-6cd7-4de9-877c-bf23d144ee31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) long preceding last November's elections.
### **What violence looks like**
Gun violence is pervasive. Mass shootings are seemingly random, but disturbingly [consistent](https://substack.com/redirect/160f58a5-6248-4de4-9b80-89bee83ab886?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Meanwhile, police violence remains murderous, predictable, and effectively [unrestrained](https://substack.com/redirect/c166f139-2c13-40be-982c-4caed8ef4103?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And domestic violence [flourishes](https://substack.com/redirect/ebb26f65-1d2f-4fdc-a8b7-58d078bf31c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in communities across the country, despite [intergenerational](https://substack.com/redirect/6dc466ec-c46b-4481-9bec-65215fefac21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) efforts to curtail it.
But only recently has the specter of political violence raised its head in a manner visible to most Americans. From a [series](https://substack.com/redirect/733dc2ea-dfc8-4c8d-bcb7-5947cee055f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of assassination attempts targeting the president-elect to the widely [celebrated](https://substack.com/redirect/2b68ffe6-25c5-453d-8409-97405fda8c34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) assassination of a healthcare CEO by an outraged son of the establishment, to a pair of seemingly politically [motivated](https://substack.com/redirect/e69ed7df-afae-4f74-9b81-b5c3264f0530?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) acts of domestic [terrorism](https://substack.com/redirect/a224d4d7-4906-4774-8974-7f735e34c072?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the first week of January, Americans are discovering the price of letting democracy--and the stability it is supposed to offer due to its legitimacy--slip through our fingers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60d05134-3520-4be7-b362-587f6baf69b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In at least [one case](https://substack.com/redirect/2b68ffe6-25c5-453d-8409-97405fda8c34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), this political violence responded to economic violence that none of our formal institutions have seen fit to address--or even recognize. It has been not only permitted by them, but overtly encouraged and enabled by them.
Economic violence takes many forms, all of which are widely overlooked and ignored even as they impact growing swaths of America.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is 100% supported by readers, rather than advertisers.**Sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Sp5fUhSVAiCrcy2ZT-Ic-5Bbdk7wnwU7Kc9HyTrfAok?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154318276)
Systematic denials of insurance coverage represent not only a death sentence for patients facing severe illnesses, but also lifetimes of discomfort, inconvenience, and pain for others. They are the product not only of a predatory economic system and business model, but also [artificial intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/0443e3a3-3dfb-4b52-9e31-8adf981fe9f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--representing a microcosm of the dystopian future imagined by the Terminator movie franchise.
The vision of machines dictating the life and death of human beings has [terrified](https://substack.com/redirect/a72ddc82-d1e4-42b2-97bb-55c5709bd443?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) humanity since [the industrial revolution](https://substack.com/redirect/00958a53-0d7c-41de-b594-2cd0552797e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the advent of automation. The use of artificial intelligence to drive grandmothers into early graves by the millions is the very culmination of that nightmare. I'm grateful to live in a state which has formally recognized that and [taken action](https://substack.com/redirect/cc53c0b4-970e-443c-82fc-a96cf476abd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to guard human rights, but most Americans enjoy no such protections.
Yet, somehow, journalists in the United States have managed not to observe this horror, even though it plays out in painfully slow motion in families from coast-to-coast. The one thing that could bring America together, it seems, could be outrage at the predatory nature of our "healthcare" system.
Other examples of economic violence abound. Like denials of health insurance coverage, [evictions](https://substack.com/redirect/716fee00-62ca-4e27-96e6-25f0c91825c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) sacrifice basic human needs on the altar of profit. Both forms of economic violence impose [cascading effects](https://substack.com/redirect/560eb1bf-96f9-4e29-b53e-6f43bc6a5ca6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
And when corporate landlords evict (especially low-income) tenants, they come to play a role similar to that of AI denying insurance claims: faceless, nameless, perpetual non-beings placing precious human lives at risk.
### **How did we get here?**
Many voices would claim that the source of these nightmares coming to fruition is the right wing, and a president-elect willing to demonize his critics. That might seem like a satisfying analysis, but it is unfortunately inaccurate.
At the moment, the first wave of conciliation with the autocracy promised by the president-elect has come from newspaper editors, and owners willing to sacrifice the independence of the press for their own political and financial opportunities.
The press is supposed to serve a crucial function enabling democracy. That's why it's among the institutions protected by the First Amendment. Historically, commitments to a free press are part of what allowed democracy to flourish.
Today, those commitments have been abandoned.
On the eve of November's election, editors at the _Washington Post_ and _Los Angeles Times_ [bent their publications](https://substack.com/redirect/bc8465ac-b82f-426e-8212-3033dc6e0f01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to serve their political (and ultimately financial) interests, [silencing](https://substack.com/redirect/e1f937af-b072-495c-ac08-4ce711beaa75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) editorial voices and reports critical of the president-elect due to the inclinations and allegiances of their owners.
The pattern continued this week, with an award-winning cartoonist [resigning](https://substack.com/redirect/40895d49-d844-4923-b21e-408803aaf37b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the _Washington Post_ due to the newspaper's institutional inability to allow criticism of its owner, the second richest man in the world.
The single richest man in the world has already run a major social media platform into the ground, turning it into a megaphone amplifying his bizarre [rants](https://substack.com/redirect/4643d11f-46f1-49f6-aeab-56733af6bd5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and self-serving hostility to democracy. Elon Musk's influence extends well beyond the United States. In Germany, his election interference has prompted [outrage](https://substack.com/redirect/6b60d11d-300f-4558-a09c-c1fb94e835a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from a political culture more committed to democracy than the one that introduced it to the modern world.
As our political culture continues to undergo a profound transformation, it's important to understand the roots of those changes. The collapse of democracy in America began not with the result of a presidential election, but rather an abdication by professional journalists lacking the independence to observe reality.
Luigi Mangione envisioned himself as being the only one to face reality. In [his manifesto](https://substack.com/redirect/24340344-efaf-40c5-8508-6d2064e79b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), he wrote:
> "these [indecipherable] have simply gotten too powerful, and they continue to abuse our country for immense profit because the American public has allowed them to get away with it....[M]any have illuminated the corruption and greed decades ago and the problems simply remain. It is not an issue of awareness at this point, but clearly power games at play. Evidently I am the first to face it with such brutal honesty."
Mangione's alleged actions channeled a collective outrage that journalists have done everything possible to ignore and suppress. One might say his alleged crime revealed the blood on the hands of not only our predatory corporate healthcare system, but also the press--and our society writ large--as much as himself.
### **The most tragic part of all**
The assassination of United Healthcare CEO Brian Thompson sent shockwaves across corporate America. But there's one thing it has decidedly _not_ done...

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Taxpayer-funded guns & fentanyl ?
body:
MA Republicans: END STATE-FUNDED CRIME NOW!
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001db6YVs2u-6QiUsr3qwlhouzHPRitgK7Mq-fwMJqMJj_bNFkM2fSKnoyAoMhUv69FHjFTplG2Kdi5fXYx0KhtGK5oBabeHNILPOQ-di2HHyuxqeFA6MtSCi9wp2j9d9DpPOXMzGmCaiS7JjkTRemFmA==&c=Rz0kJ7PxFvw19sWG2sM8hvOvrFWhq9LxxrbXNOfrnDgxMh3z4ss9ZQ==&ch=VcJhwCOsQsfNTSjgKrtm3kK4kHq0tbBq7LQIH5NvKSmWplMzQ2dJSA==)
---
| Dear Friends,
Warning ⚠️ another day, another horrific story of illegal immigrant crime in the news... ⚠️
This time, an undocumented immigrant was arrested for allegedly having a high capacity firearm, cocaine, $1,000,000 worth of fentanyl, and a flourishing drug enterprise, all run from the comforts of a state-funded migrant shelter in Revere.
Our Republican Caucus is all over this story and is demanding accountability from the Healey-Driscoll Administration.
How is it possible an undocumented immigrant here illegally ended up in an emergency family shelter even though our laws do not allow it?
How did he pass the background check as part of the application process?
How did he gain access to a high capability firearm despite our strict gun laws?
How was a criminal drug enterprise being run out of a taxpayer-funded family shelter?
How is the Healey-Driscoll administration letting this happen to Massachusetts?
What will it take to get her to stand up for us?
---
| | [TAKE OUR POLL: SHOULD GOV. HEALEY AMEND THE RIGHT TO SHELTER LAW?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001db6YVs2u-6QiUsr3qwlhouzHPRitgK7Mq-fwMJqMJj_bNFkM2fSKng06HVUQcmU9nEvdhaVd0YExSwxoxeDZsEPo2Fl55DLPvBaDmS8ew-yenG-9mGWbtjWcpYzY8U_2qB2sU5tftKoIxY0U-PqJqc4xKZI-xPONaGv0SgwXXWbDXoBmumE5e5BuosOpMZhC&c=Rz0kJ7PxFvw19sWG2sM8hvOvrFWhq9LxxrbXNOfrnDgxMh3z4ss9ZQ==&ch=VcJhwCOsQsfNTSjgKrtm3kK4kHq0tbBq7LQIH5NvKSmWplMzQ2dJSA==)
---
| Massachusetts Republicans stand strong in our call to amend the Right to Shelter Law residency requirements.
The migrant crisis has spiraled into a financial catastrophe, a humanitarian disaster, and a severe threat to public safety.
Massachusetts residents deserve answers and the Democratic Supermajority needs to put partisanship aside and work with Republicans on solutions.
---
| | [TAKE OUR POLL: MAKE YOUR STANCE KNOWN](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001db6YVs2u-6QiUsr3qwlhouzHPRitgK7Mq-fwMJqMJj_bNFkM2fSKng06HVUQcmU9nEvdhaVd0YExSwxoxeDZsEPo2Fl55DLPvBaDmS8ew-yenG-9mGWbtjWcpYzY8U_2qB2sU5tftKoIxY0U-PqJqc4xKZI-xPONaGv0SgwXXWbDXoBmumE5e5BuosOpMZhC&c=Rz0kJ7PxFvw19sWG2sM8hvOvrFWhq9LxxrbXNOfrnDgxMh3z4ss9ZQ==&ch=VcJhwCOsQsfNTSjgKrtm3kK4kHq0tbBq7LQIH5NvKSmWplMzQ2dJSA==)
---
| Thank you,
---
| | |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP
| | [FIGHT TO SAVE MASSACHUSETTS - DONATE NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001db6YVs2u-6QiUsr3qwlhouzHPRitgK7Mq-fwMJqMJj_bNFkM2fSKng06HVUQcmU9nEvdhaVd0YExSwxoxeDZsEPo2Fl55DLPvBaDmS8ew-yenG-9mGWbtjWcpYzY8U_2qB2sU5tftKoIxY0U-PqJqc4xKZI-xPONaGv0SgwXXWbDXoBmumE5e5BuosOpMZhC&c=Rz0kJ7PxFvw19sWG2sM8hvOvrFWhq9LxxrbXNOfrnDgxMh3z4ss9ZQ==&ch=VcJhwCOsQsfNTSjgKrtm3kK4kHq0tbBq7LQIH5NvKSmWplMzQ2dJSA==)

body:
OPEN

|
---
| | |
Friend - we're just weeks away from key special elections that could determine the fate of our House Majority. Democrats are pouring in resources to flip **NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6** , and it's up to us to defend these crucial seats.

With your support, we can defend our America First agenda and maintain our GOP Majority in the House. That's why we're launching a 24-hour fundraising blitz to fuel our efforts on the ground.

**[We'll double every dollar you donate today](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec1324998b824f9e9bb964dbd8f79ceb&_e=a4-u9W495hg2_OFhXXl24WxjwVZlq-33Q_miyE9Ida6T5KnkoQCGIQN_W3are70Mtv9HtE1ep1xx0iq2EryfIoJUa407bLqD637Uy3f6dUxaiaC19o_7D2Frjg2j4S6OjGXQzUzUTr6YUKGgAudcKtKRCnuIGc1cdDckRdi9ZNmBvEzH_ujTpN_iAYpkdGPYBfQJbu9F4yglRaQmh5elipUt7FCWGtbmbn4qFTFzjtUda_L-qIj_XFvKF3EWmNcWViXa77Fiklz6d9P9F0DvxFt4WRE8fnnds-l-glyYBCQUb6AypTAXViLJt7ERnUf2_AwfXpnbudKOLzKGJxiSezfpN8jmslLt3VZ6ucD7buF7fFzHON9_MdQ5BIPR9Sj29Ulfiz5sRAOvadtmV1U97HY9R8uTuqp5rxiBaN-9aQc96gwBMyqMJygAV_-utFaaS-YpYAbg4AReThu5qHAvjA%3D%3D "We'll double every dollar you donate today")**. | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec1324998b824f9e9bb964dbd8f79ceb&_e=a4-u9W495hg2_OFhXXl24WxjwVZlq-33Q_miyE9Ida6T5KnkoQCGIQN_W3are70Mtv9HtE1ep1xx0iq2EryfIoJUa407bLqD637Uy3f6dUxaiaC19o_7D2Frjg2j4S6OjGXQzUzUTr6YUKGgAudcKtKRCnuIGc1cdDckRdi9ZNmBvEzH_ujTpN_iAYpkdGPYBfQJbu9F4yglRaQmh5elipUt7FCWGtbmbn4qFTFzjtUda_L-qIj_XFvKF3EWmNcWViXa77Fiklz6d9P9F0DvxFt4WRE8fnnds-l-glyYBCQUb6AypTAXViLJt7ERnUf2_mM-XV4sc6apvfbMKuPoyVcF38rpWBEUetcgvkzm9WfiY5jrNI87nY-ehkphkm10adXixDA_ZHfGuo6I70kFTf0eKJhdhYb12UbSByn5K_O7umHKwT7XcWo1SkjzAaicyrx0MhD4QvtzSJq2TUAMhw%3D%3D)

With your support, we can defend our America First agenda and maintain our GOP Majority in the House. That's why we're launching a 24-hour fundraising blitz to fuel our efforts on the ground. This is a critical opportunity to make a real difference in these special elections. | | | "Generic Button" | Here's the reality: if we lose just one of these seats, our Majority will shrink and getting our America First agenda across the finish line will become MUCH more difficult. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04d903dbba8948cf80f8eb97c043de18&_e=nBNXRYJFbHTnbC8kYYECTBfOyX-J0PAfQN0d6Vd258eNNA9Ds7xrwBLfbHdJ36vI9auU17isB5mEBCIuWyureNNjWsXEwnJMwEF9VGl1SnLIoWcIo88SBqvVUNDMVJCdlwcuEyQVr8Oe5orPRhAyfJX30fdFO6hH1siLChUgZb5PxfNZ0Xa2LBzG0Tu4LDtQoZ73ZYt4Ei5Tx_guSxKQo1qNCqcA7axLjdH2zL8orcKqHkS2Y_PGiSmSLJ7KeUyTLY7AdPhJKm1LkrYIbJrcqmFNQCoEaIqpoVK6nVcv4lKwERmuGMez3fRL62u-QsGEivNBkrY8NOAAo_wDwEDVgxE6fqQunqgaGn892ZddJYCmmh9I3kKOjDBGXN8Oa4MUJVTkt5gduBRzlvrU1d3MXAkhSAcOKQPb9r0gxEjCodo%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04d903dbba8948cf80f8eb97c043de18&_e=nBNXRYJFbHTnbC8kYYECTBfOyX-J0PAfQN0d6Vd258eNNA9Ds7xrwBLfbHdJ36vI9auU17isB5mEBCIuWyureNNjWsXEwnJMwEF9VGl1SnLIoWcIo88SBqvVUNDMVJCdlwcuEyQVr8Oe5orPRhAyfJX30fdFO6hH1siLChUgZb5PxfNZ0Xa2LBzG0Tu4LDtQoZ73ZYt4Ei5Tx_guSxKQo1qNCqcA7axLjdH2zL8orcKqHkS2Y_PGiSmSLJ7KeUyTju9s3z-qZrCQSEUMYynfBFKXFDayPwpiCUVR8pz3-xLtYA8S8JSu_De67Sd7ilNUnCBf9uNGxu-tZis7QLbG2Y0dXrkdj8xFdYRMkjJTc97tMpvG4hLvQ1BmtKNqkvNyiqA1CHBXsjqeAoBgVZDw2-uyJ2M9N57GUtlJxICL2Ks%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04d903dbba8948cf80f8eb97c043de18&_e=nBNXRYJFbHTnbC8kYYECTBfOyX-J0PAfQN0d6Vd258eNNA9Ds7xrwBLfbHdJ36vI9auU17isB5mEBCIuWyureNNjWsXEwnJMwEF9VGl1SnLIoWcIo88SBqvVUNDMVJCdlwcuEyQVr8Oe5orPRhAyfJX30fdFO6hH1siLChUgZb5PxfNZ0Xa2LBzG0Tu4LDtQoZ73ZYt4Ei5Tx_guSxKQo1qNCqcA7axLjdH2zL8orcKqHkS2Y_PGiSmSLJ7KeUyTd2BXh1cN5kZ5BLHhjBG2NoKTrnPVmbUEn98HdjviB-kY20EwyBcR0sQVQtACMpEVHqTDQTpjBbiIC8LqAtpm3IgUFTGcFZJ6GWddTu_-yRhbiSt5l8EXIF00S3uQGo9WI4RzMUOZNLFFj-QCPIeTOwlCu_WaikvEpn9kaGLljnA%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=04d903dbba8948cf80f8eb97c043de18&_e=nBNXRYJFbHTnbC8kYYECTBfOyX-J0PAfQN0d6Vd258eNNA9Ds7xrwBLfbHdJ36vI9auU17isB5mEBCIuWyureNNjWsXEwnJMwEF9VGl1SnLIoWcIo88SBqvVUNDMVJCdlwcuEyQVr8Oe5orPRhAyfJX30fdFO6hH1siLChUgZb5PxfNZ0Xa2LBzG0Tu4LDtQoZ73ZYt4Ei5Tx_guSxKQo1qNCqcA7axLjdH2zL8orcKqHkS2Y_PGiSmSLJ7KeUyT79H3lhfTTcFX2Cqp-6muj-5ZaAmkYb0GlTAuPXMnpTJnsbmf1PjXXqte2IFrrEnZkxHUPY5oQQdHw7oyYd-NfTb6cDBEie2Hi33r01ELHZ6WgVR5Kl4lsyKjgFZD7MZcUi4gUzPAMISQD7dPvXXLiwnaWmqSgXsxF9UKySWZ9LM%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Freedom Nation Today

clean_body: You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open. Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.” Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d527d79fd2f47138e900b6b17986530&_e=gDAOYN4w95wHt2L-me-e12vyEKgytUkWtgLve4CTlvg9lmJkDQvXAA9WamACN8fg3O8-Q6JuAQ6X7rIDAZYxfKvXQw8gf5sAcusJGEBg3Rur-OzeNuHZsyAzo9tqZzPAGZ2fpxvhOUyKY_TIggyPFElkgItWbj9022QcRd2UORrS2Qx7v3f_74fKBTlb-mYBwr8UDtD4kis_bCojV9ftzrqWIapDQa-_TMI9P2Kql1JOSqWF3DMen3gxRw3SQQ9xFRBElBePVn8jyL4Vm830qkEeMfW4iFYdhF0kI4NiyVm7a4auEPrZoX-LX8NH-Bbddtkzfwc2i8VB-Kl71d-kqUOqxdnP10vXD8XhnSBQ9tbpoodHxoIGoJHUiWesK85xGf8P-16m1DUmFdiS1qUSSRgyqYHIzotyWKURHIfWQUk%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d527d79fd2f47138e900b6b17986530&_e=gDAOYN4w95wHt2L-me-e12vyEKgytUkWtgLve4CTlvg9lmJkDQvXAA9WamACN8fg3O8-Q6JuAQ6X7rIDAZYxfKvXQw8gf5sAcusJGEBg3Rur-OzeNuHZsyAzo9tqZzPAGZ2fpxvhOUyKY_TIggyPFElkgItWbj9022QcRd2UORrS2Qx7v3f_74fKBTlb-mYBwr8UDtD4kis_bCojV9ftzrqWIapDQa-_TMI9P2Kql1JOSqWF3DMen3gxRw3SQQ9xydnkd2z6OjvQWxj8024foGpw_jlBskFgZ0mBCOWY5zegTM_lH0QIA67SvOPEosnl9wUgwnGPmkuwIMrNagIGkaTUUATzmNBLY9KwXYLYDpix6WemaYfdxUorBa8XjGtDDygm1q7PNtl-Qd1zY1iisAVP74nmlgK8n4Qe8hLOwQs%3D) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d527d79fd2f47138e900b6b17986530&_e=gDAOYN4w95wHt2L-me-e12vyEKgytUkWtgLve4CTlvg9lmJkDQvXAA9WamACN8fg3O8-Q6JuAQ6X7rIDAZYxfKvXQw8gf5sAcusJGEBg3Rur-OzeNuHZsyAzo9tqZzPAGZ2fpxvhOUyKY_TIggyPFElkgItWbj9022QcRd2UORrS2Qx7v3f_74fKBTlb-mYBwr8UDtD4kis_bCojV9ftzrqWIapDQa-_TMI9P2Kql1JOSqWF3DMen3gxRw3SQQ9xaJ-YGxqwQr-POiGuDk08-kUqnSmdGNRn3OSWqspT6MHqknhNvww6B2g1TJ53CtneuwxZJulSUP2YZZ8qpuR0y1Iwor05l7AP00JFLtL82shQEMY0dNw67EKAr5s9fiocR-uV_etCDVkb2psRyjf_IC8G919bDLZ1zVNratTtnRM%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d527d79fd2f47138e900b6b17986530&_e=gDAOYN4w95wHt2L-me-e12vyEKgytUkWtgLve4CTlvg9lmJkDQvXAA9WamACN8fg3O8-Q6JuAQ6X7rIDAZYxfKvXQw8gf5sAcusJGEBg3Rur-OzeNuHZsyAzo9tqZzPAGZ2fpxvhOUyKY_TIggyPFElkgItWbj9022QcRd2UORrS2Qx7v3f_74fKBTlb-mYBwr8UDtD4kis_bCojV9ftzrqWIapDQa-_TMI9P2Kql1JOSqWF3DMen3gxRw3SQQ9xIB1pI0aXwqXyPsD3Pwuiql_itnK6Fvm26z0QObHMIB_6oMdDMnRfRCVXxHwMjIPVoLMFwUiyJjy6EJnZ6_ibB-vIIC6EV4NJMqOBry4HoL220npc1A_gp88J2CD64EvRUR2FyZqI03Az9n_eL0m1Fb7lGU_Gt8N0prOskUJFkqE%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: SPECIAL ELECTION WAR CHEST
subject: Republicans in NY-21, FL-1, and FL-6 need YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Critical reinforcements are needed >>

|
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf4a23bbbc234123939bf800ee0dfa64&_e=2vHiSVkxqXY19GDAuZcmEl6oDn5mYefBwYlOnd7plQeDigXogEAAZkeMbHOzlSWrs25RaLlAFKow9DXWvkAmqqidWNoWDWPcLpUgsQzXxoCq3rCzNnn_Be1DJJCX4yisbU6sRCLJqNZ26t7dtzXsTnVTySKt0fJdbFQVnPZ6AEdP3gwawpcbpvpbWeDt5ZUqlEJTrCgSWqDYTUzbnjFV3Ityy40t2z_eqCSBM3fNqZd3OrG-ppxW0-uF-HAfRNQFKAfmr6Egu7dx456G8xPfwFrnb87XCeyik7QZF4GtqqNjUmnUwCNZYqKnK7QHe5q9_Ndou3SHEJ2b7IRMcIb0GH-Npe48LzybFbpEmOHqFJah14DRJkw3BMjBfaN64dRwguiySIBDpkBYMpEdtUykFYLdjer-D-gMWdQcSGLj-4GLTDH4ixPpP49Ls8patheBg-9GqNDFzekfRDq40uSwsw%3D%3D)

Friend,

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Preparing for my trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It's hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...

It's hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b2dfbb76e8ef4b2683a0c6f2c3da8b1c&_e=J0c3g5w3NXH-ecT9VnFSU5hVtnMhRybTvc0ml-KsAZMPA6TbYf7lhcZeo144pjfVOQTqBbrJJ5lukpsr5atbU20XsB6A0FyiAZyXbQ6ymphG0BZX-LMNzEIYwfJNP30XbbcsdolHYPjKQKcmnnP6Qry9YGGHQRTzyhJf-sbuQPFbpLkMkzliqgMln9bt6iPx7dzRmvwz7gZqRw4s9y6rYPw8YE4jkbpFQcd5UKFj0m3SsJ58vUiAEB_A9pWtmG5xXcYgtkL-XVkQXOAQTdby4l7Z8-yZE6xX6t__rrhtTBv4laUqoy9hsXUCuTiRTYXgC9W7C5ytpdc3RH8NXOYWNo4xz0Cx9MtVTBJW0ejgxdfoZtOv31PBDRB5x1McTtMdyvTJfksqVAykL_Flb9rd8A%3D%3D)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault - not just on my freedom - but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats' Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn't end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with "_IMPRISONMENT!_ " **_
---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it 's the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala's disastrous policies. And if that's your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---
__But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I 've never needed your help more than right now.__
---
[**Before my trial begins, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me fight for my freedom and justice as the Democrats ' Deep State tries to take away my home - and ultimately, JAIL me for life as an innocent man. **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b2dfbb76e8ef4b2683a0c6f2c3da8b1c&_e=J0c3g5w3NXH-ecT9VnFSU5hVtnMhRybTvc0ml-KsAZMPA6TbYf7lhcZeo144pjfVOQTqBbrJJ5lukpsr5atbU20XsB6A0FyiAZyXbQ6ymphG0BZX-LMNzEIYwfJNP30XbbcsdolHYPjKQKcmnnP6Qry9YGGHQRTzyhJf-sbuQPFbpLkMkzliqgMln9bt6iPx7dzRmvwz7gZqRw4s9y6rYPw8YE4jkbpFQcd5UKFj0m3otGil4DR8PxwNEW7elzq9PQtW05TDX9hxfOd1STKTAUjmco7i5n4zM5Hzok3kOuxTGP-w8Utt9yf-4MjseUjg5vpD3fJALfQFKGI7hFDd7k1exPu-9OuBwmvtGTBkv-kqduu5av-cW2AYifeSxCK156BZS5spfAdITrYGjQdkeQ%3D%3D)
---

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b2dfbb76e8ef4b2683a0c6f2c3da8b1c&_e=J0c3g5w3NXH-ecT9VnFSU5hVtnMhRybTvc0ml-KsAZMPA6TbYf7lhcZeo144pjfVOQTqBbrJJ5lukpsr5atbU20XsB6A0FyiAZyXbQ6ymphG0BZX-LMNzEIYwfJNP30XbbcsdolHYPjKQKcmnnP6Qry9YGGHQRTzyhJf-sbuQPFbpLkMkzliqgMln9bt6iPx7dzRmvwz7gZqRw4s9y6rYPw8YE4jkbpFQcd5UKFj0m0wDmrqf5vbqdi3TENGA49K5OYMaPfqaeK8i4LVa2RUDDtiixpzfponU2yLwtw-XOVPBZ3BHwK0KpG8usPNvB1bZtDNX63jyEYlMdHpLvN3EM5hNTm_zho6W5WbHuN8IXtQry9heyITECEvhb2Rt4FZhBQUd2Waf-X8RX7B465WiA%3D%3D)

clean_body: It's hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... It's hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault - not just on my freedom - but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats' Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn't end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with "IMPRISONMENT! " But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it 's the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala's disastrous policies. And if that's your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I 've never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Preparing for my trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/02098cb2d116f3d2/?utm_campaign=20240103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=active]

My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help,
Friend.

_IN JUST DAYS, REPORTS INDICATE MY TRIAL IS SET TO BEGIN AS I FIGHT
FOR THE FINAL CHANCE TO SAVE MY HOME._

To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch
hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom
of every patriotic American.

The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally,
professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH
and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.

And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the
outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of
_everything_ I own.

But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions,
priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son,
or even my home...

No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an
innocent man for the rest of my life.

_ IN FACT, AN OBAMA JUDGE JUST THREATENED ME WITH “IMPRISONMENT!”
_

But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for
my freedom and justice.

AND IT’S THE GENEROSITY OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU THAT GIVES ME THE
COURAGE TO KEEP FIGHTING.

I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the
consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if
that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers
are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.

_But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment
in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than
right now._

BEFORE MY TRIAL BEGINS, PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY
GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND TO HELP ME FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS
THE DEMOCRATS’ DEEP STATE TRIES TO TAKE AWAY MY HOME – AND
ULTIMATELY, JAIL ME FOR LIFE AS AN INNOCENT MAN.

subject: Breakthrough Solar Generator Is The Ultimate Protection
body:
Supplies vanish in your city...
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0) here at any time.

---
|
---
January 7th, 2025
---
|
---
_**The Future of Solar Energy Is Here**_ **Breakthrough 8-Pound Solar Generator Is The Ultimate Protection Against Dangerous Blackouts And Toxic Fumes**
---
---
A dangerous storm strikes... And in a flash... Supplies vanish in your city. Grocery stores... EMPTY. Water... SOLD OUT. Batteries... SOLD OUT. Gas stations... SOLD OUT. And without gas, that means no gas generators to keep your lights on, and no way to protect yourself and your family during a dangerous black out. Entire neighborhoods in darkness... **But picture this...** Instead of panicking and fumbling around in the dark, fearful and without supplies like everyone else... Imagine you and your family sitting back, relaxing and enjoying your evening... Riding out the storm and the power outage in total safety and with total peace of mind.
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/12b16935cd986ec7605a10a08771a6bf2578dee9/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0)
---
All because you have the [**Patriot Power Sidekick**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/12b16935cd986ec7605a10a08771a6bf2578dee9/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0), a revolutionary, mini solar generator that powers all your important devices, keeps lights on, **never needs gas, and costs less than an iPhone!** Well you can! For the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get this breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **safe to use inside** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about... **The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!**
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/12b16935cd986ec7605a10a08771a6bf2578dee9/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0)
---
[**Order Today and Get $243 of FREE Gifts!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/12b16935cd986ec7605a10a08771a6bf2578dee9/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/12b16935cd986ec7605a10a08771a6bf2578dee9/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0)
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/12b16935cd986ec7605a10a08771a6bf2578dee9/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0)
---
_"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/12b16935cd986ec7605a10a08771a6bf2578dee9/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0) **More Raving Reviews From Customers** **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price. **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable. **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning. **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it. **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip! **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most! **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks! **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product. [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19642/6374453/12b16935cd986ec7605a10a08771a6bf2578dee9/effed5294a17d3632c018947f687fcef54261ce0)
---
|
---

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Corruption on the Cape! STATE REP’S RESIGNATION OVERDUE
body:
Criminal referral to US atty..
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015HzRF71PxXzqzl-CmJpQDzSIqKao8Kj9uA_g9oMqkpGLc31kQCnewt0hw3_3hsvwI_kt7jExFa6oHOzxYG_-nEFcHXUp6vHKa92P6hdtLfxTYvPoHAsdHBkAFV_jJ9Auuy2afGmV9FgksVr0NfS29A==&c=NXRuJz2VA3L8lTSkKEbF5U7hWnewEy8XEyh7gv2k6_Lj68JxIcwHjw==&ch=s1X0OZ4bLIZuiuYO_0eMCnxd41HNmTuZwVo1Jlo0wqDK_2gh4SmfBg==)
---
| Dear Friends,
📣 MassGOP is calling for State Representative Chris Flanagan of the 1st Barnstable District to resign following his criminal referral to the U.S. Attorney's office for illegal campaign activities. 📣
From misleading voters into believing he had Republican support, to documented campaign finance violations, and now reports of tens of thousands allegedly being stolen - it's clear that trust has been lost and laws have most likely been broken by Rep. Flanagan.
Now, his pattern of illegal activity has escalated to the point of federal scrutiny. The jig is up, Flanagan!
---
| | [HELP US FIND HIS REPLACEMENT FUND CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT EFFORTS](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015HzRF71PxXzqzl-CmJpQDzSIqKao8Kj9uA_g9oMqkpGLc31kQCnewm0reCjE1KJylTqOSnYG2aADNm27BDWIvQWkWEnskt1U2QiZqdQiygCo3ZymGDYvmmVujdwPLxXr3_qOy8ga-GZx0yqof5fUUOn9QpsFX6yfC9ksF_QERGpBN43blJhAgfL7gCXYdZ0P&c=NXRuJz2VA3L8lTSkKEbF5U7hWnewEy8XEyh7gv2k6_Lj68JxIcwHjw==&ch=s1X0OZ4bLIZuiuYO_0eMCnxd41HNmTuZwVo1Jlo0wqDK_2gh4SmfBg==)
---
| Rep. Flanagan epitomizes everything wrong with Democratic politics in Massachusetts. Rules for thee, but not for me...
Flanagan must resign immediately to uphold the integrity of the office he holds.
This is not a partisan issue; it's about restoring trust in our elected officials. But our call to action doesn't stop there. We must find and support Republican candidates committed to transparency, accountability, and doing the right thing, even when no one is looking. Especially then.

ERCOT, the Texas power grid operator, issued a Weather Watch through Friday, indicating the potential for higher electricity demand as below-freezing temperatures and wintry precipitation are in the forecast for much of the state.

# Tuesday, January 7, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1870, the 475-foot [Waco Suspension Bridge](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FugzAQQL_GbKDzAQYPHrqwpWtHZOIznOrYke2G5O-rdO_-9J7e12W9WA4c9097I1OfPq0IOLYgW5hWZzm81qFxZgOnZUNGTr3CQY8jNoeZJ3KgRw1ezqjsVY2zl6A2TZskZW3D5i0DCZOUqEF3PfQO9DBD71ENzosByHFNuasHVXra4sMrPSh313RrgjlqvRfRfwhcBC7neXa1HDbFwJG6lHeBy2Gj21L6FrhQrJmpvEl7TW35KXeKhVNst8xupyYbdz85BC5qEgPsN8vhr1T_XX8Y_A0AAP__FZRciA) opened to traffic, becoming the longest single-span suspension bridge west of the Mississippi River. The bridge was closed to vehicle traffic in 1971 and received a state historic marker in 1976. TxDOT has [treated bridges and overpasses](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOszAQhJ_GdKD1YnBcuPgbuvztlcjJroMlg5FtBXJPf-L660aj0Xz6vu7z3YUYttd_t7Ktp08zAg4tyBb0TC7Ez6wasg8gIxu2UvcjKjMM2CxWGm3k6GFUg2EEp93tAUo_PXm64VM2wV5nIEFLiQZM10NPYNQNeo-jIi8UMIWaclcXrny64uMnvTl3z7Q20S617kX0_wROAqfjODqfTrXxUa6BwOmKAqd6Uqrtnnl3OWyvNidHpXULO2p9Zv6-ysrrXppsaT9CjKGMWih4rS7EX1r9U_9t8ScAAP__Yc5d2g) ahead of the wintry weather expected in parts of the state next week. Continuing the theme, today's trivia asks which community in Texas changed its name when a nearby bridge was completed. Check it out below! ## ERCOT Issues Weather Watch
ERCOT, the Texas power grid operator, [issued a Weather Watch](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8N3rDggXEYGLqwpWtH6wUeMSoJkaFx8u8rd-9yy0l3n76v83LGXPL9-ok3cv2V6gICJi4kF_MSMZf3oofoLiJaOZCTszKg7TTBsLrZyIsBDVaoMCdUhrQ-JTSTDmAvyg7ZHWNCillKsMKOSqgorD4JlcDomJgWFHOv29hX6vTClsq7PmkbQ70Nxa29PxpTHww8A7_v-_jdsB8lA3-nvTHwpQYsDPxxxcALeYRh4GkLtfPc2g81vhP2lTa-Yw8rx5Uw8pp4qhsFbJ0iD7VEnrZ67wz8sLn42HMpuZmZaXG9YS5_UP1fS08HvwEAAP__CLhoDQ) through Friday, indicating the potential for higher electricity demand as below-freezing temperatures and wintry precipitation are in the forecast for much of the state. Officials emphasized that while reserves will be lower than normal, there is [no expectation of an energy emergency](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z0FrwyAUwPFPo7eG954a48HDGAvs0BW2wY7BRG0Es5TouvTbj-7e6__wg__XcTi6lNP3-c0twdY9rgMBqQPgAfTgXcq3QXJvR_AGebCoRUvSKEV8tlNUMEmEFoVC7-OkOhjH6EOHagIz8mTvGCBoRDJgGgHCg5EdiEit9JFJCD7VdWvqHGrYXYn5tl7D1kzrwrOda70UJp4Y9Yz6_V4Z9S_vz6fP4fXjxKgv1dWfwqjHTregyBihOi0lIUq-WX_5TTmn0mom4by4lP_l-nD1aukvAAD__xL1UcE). Meanwhile, TxDOT [treated the highways](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOszAQhJ_GdKD1YnBcuPgbuvztlcjJroMlg5FtBXJPf-L660aj0Xz6vu7z3YUYttd_t7Ktp08zAg4tyBb0TC7Ez6wasg8gIxu2UvcjKjMM2CxWGm3k6GFUg2EEp93tAUo_PXm64VM2wV5nIEFLiQZM10NPYNQNeo-jIi8UMIWaclcXrny64uMnvTl3z7Q20S617kX0_wROAqfjODqfTrXxUa6BwOmKAqd6Uqrtnnl3OWyvNidHpXULO2p9Zv6-ysrrXppsaT9CjKGMWih4rS7EX1r9U_9t8ScAAP__Yc5d2g) in North Texas with a brine solution that lowers the freezing point and prevents the accumulation of ice and snow. Crews will closely monitor bridges and overpasses later this week when precipitation is expected.
## TxDOT Outlines Vision for AI
The Texas Department of Transportation (TxDOT) released a 71-page strategic plan for [integrating](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO5CAQRL8GZ4ygwfY4ILjE2V56odWG9hgdBgta49m_P_nyTSopqV7p_flavjCmmF-_8SDHn60soKCXSks1LgFj-l5sF9yqwqQ7cno0A9ip76Hb3bZqS09jx2kcUQdvNgSv_WSCtc-1hy66e0xpNWoNk5oeRpmgJvtUZoPBhk1YRSFyqQ_eiemDbUvf5U314cvRJbczn02YXwJmAfN1XY-_DfkuBcyZriZgTsVjEjDfKAGz0ncMAmb-hMKSjrWipyYxyivyLislwkaybLJxRaZX9PJMmCUXSXnH7Ek2RqYmuWJuZ6mMHEuWMb-p8UGZb3BXXTivmFJswyiseh0Y0__j_KPJt4N_AQAA__8BdncK)[ artificial intelligence](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO5CAQRL8GZ4ygwfY4ILjE2V56odWG9hgdBgta49m_P_nyTSopqV7p_flavjCmmF-_8SDHn60soKCXSks1LgFj-l5sF9yqwqQ7cno0A9ip76Hb3bZqS09jx2kcUQdvNgSv_WSCtc-1hy66e0xpNWoNk5oeRpmgJvtUZoPBhk1YRSFyqQ_eiemDbUvf5U314cvRJbczn02YXwJmAfN1XY-_DfkuBcyZriZgTsVjEjDfKAGz0ncMAmb-hMKSjrWipyYxyivyLislwkaybLJxRaZX9PJMmCUXSXnH7Ek2RqYmuWJuZ6mMHEuWMb-p8UGZb3BXXTivmFJswyiseh0Y0__j_KPJt4N_AQAA__8BdncK) into its operations. The plan outlines four pilot projects and over 200 potential AI use cases, focusing on “high-impact applications that enhance human decision-making, streamline processes, and provide new insights from data.” During last month’s board of directors meeting, an agency official described the plan as a [three-year roadmap](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GSgyAQQL8GO5wVAbWguMYu117pbLJLZIZARkjUv7_J9de_eW_ez2W5YIgh3b_xwa4ePi8KlJHQSRgWwhDPRTfkrkBT17Drht4qPRmjmtXd2MI4WcMjs0UyV0Y2hEaP9uoHMk1wHxl0MHSdmmBqe-gJJj1C75XV5IUGplDz1taVKx9YfDzzm7f2lh9NdGutzyL6L6FmoeZ931ufjwFfpYb0QYSaE-9FqLkelKt8RkxFvgpLDJLTiunGsqDnesotI5Vmc_TcQ4yh2EFouD8wxL9Y_ff-7dRvAAAA___Ry140) that could change as AI’s capabilities evolve. Some of the [potential use cases](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFugzAQQL_GbEbHYUM8eOjClq4d0RkfxJLBCE4h-fsq3bu88T3p_dzHO6WctuWbVvbymsuIgFZDo6EfI6X8Hk0VfYDomop907cdGmctVg9vQ-BbdIFcsEi9s8QddmxDH3hqp1Al_5FBA33ToANXt9BGcOYG7YydibMywDFJOWp5sPCLzjm_y5OPeiprlf1DZD9V-6VwUDhc11XLKxapl_JUOExlE95E4RBp_bBMp8LhlEPhQEmfcpDwkia9Z9o0OI2gEdDUe5yrw8f9Sjmns-uVgWWllP-y8u-Hp8ffAAAA___jnF7v) included in the plan are “AI-Assisted Bridge Inspection and Deterioration Prediction,” “Weather-Related Closure Recommendations,” and “Automated Speed Study Analysis.”
## Rapper Accidentally Fires Gun During Podcast
Houston rapper OG 2 Low [made headlines](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7uOwyAQheGnwR3RMGAbCopt3GXbLS1sxslI-CLChuTtV06__adz9P9cx2vgxNvtO6zky2vZRwRsJSgJ_RgDp_domugniE415FWvOzSubbG5-862wToN82QmuzjoKcRZzXpqNSmL1LA_x0BBrxQ6cBcNOoIzFvSCnYmLMECRy54v5U6FXuGxpPf-pHyZ97VJ_l7K8RD6S-AgcKi1nm7lnPePEDjQViiXwNtKWxE45HAclCXKtFd5-90kn-DJVKV1ymjbZB-Pyinxo-uFgdsaOH3uyr_9T49_AQAA___pRl2A) after accidentally shooting a gun in his pants pocket during a live episode of the YouTube show "One on One with Mike D." The incident occurred about [47 minutes into the show](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuszAQAOCnsbeg89ngePAQKSL_8KdSp6oTOuJzsGRKBCaBt6_avS_wSd_HtbtSyunr_kYj-7LFqUPA-gDqALYLlPLeGRl8D8EpyV5Z3aBxdY1y8Db2iJYMIvVknOZbHV24HY1RtXG9lcn_YKDAKoUOXKVBB3DmCDpiY0IUBjikMs1VGbjwRkvM-_TkubpNo8x-KOWxCH0S2Aps92kta9WzwPbyr3un1-dl-38Suo1MZZ1Z6PMy0MxBYFOEPuMRlZx9eLxSzmlprDBwHynlX7382X16_A4AAP__4aBVAg) when the rapper, whose real name is Cedric White, reached into his pocket, causing the weapon to fire. Show host Mike D looked around the room, asking, “Who shot who? Somebody got shot?” White, meanwhile, appeared shocked. When [asked if he was okay](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2uozAQBeCngc5obPNzKVykQdtk2y3RhBnISMYg24Tk7Vekv9VIc6RPR-fffbyjeAnLX1zZ5fe8jQZMo0Ar6EZC8Z-xLsk9gHpdstOdbU3dN40pn46gIej1BPwDgID4aO08dX0zA9mp7UpxFwYaOq1ND31lwRL09Q_Y2bQ1zUUNTJK3WOUnZ35jmv1ne3Gspm0tvXvmvKfC3gozFGY4z7NaU7iywgwc1JG-N3PMKGHlkAszBD6v91dTEfedo8JpEuKQ0fuPmiVyUssRlIQkxGrHkJOiI0pYlJcXq32jCdOlYVS3m37b-_GnjI72U7yX1HZFDcuK4r9F86_LvZz5HwAA__8RznLI), he replied, “I hope.” White then asked if everyone else in the studio “was good.” Some commentators suspected the incident was a publicity stunt. One viewer predicted that “the memes from this video gone be crazy.”
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyE0cuunDAMBuCnCbuMHCfAsGBRldLV9KJW6hLl5AJWEzIiYTjz9hW9rKqqWUb251_2t9t00xRonT_o6Pry6tOEgDUHwaGdrKbwnFRl-xewnahcL1rZoOrqGqul97L1oq4BvLAvUniD4DvRXKVFpW1rKupPDAS0QmAH3UWCtNCpK0iPjbKeKXCWStouZXHFverswzM93HYxKVahX0q5ZybfMBwZjsdxXO5bKs4UWuf4zPpB65y5i5rC2cFw3EOhqIvj807W8ZL4nILlerU8U3i4jUMrENUpyjF7Q5bJoQXxeYHzfRTvj7cMm5CZHAAEf3fi_Ovi-PgrGv9STv-TNt_17PhN08qwMSuTw7WuedPVXHUIDJu9xCmnfTOOyeG_wlkdnaU9Mjn8nPr70-h41zSvf-estt7eDwqBctMyBfOfRVTln7d89PgjAAD__20xnaQ) **Stability. On this day in 1870, the 475-foot opened to traffic, becoming the longest single-span suspension bridge west of the Mississippi River. The bridge was closed to vehicle traffic in 1971 and received a state historic marker in 1976. TxDOT has ahead of the wintry weather expected in parts of the state next week. Continuing the theme, today's trivia asks which community in Texas changed its name when a nearby bridge was completed. Check it out below! Officials emphasized that while reserves will be lower than normal, there is . Meanwhile, TxDOT in North Texas with a brine solution that lowers the freezing point and prevents the accumulation of ice and snow. Crews will closely monitor bridges and overpasses later this week when precipitation is expected. TxDOT Outlines Vision for AI The Texas Department of Transportation (TxDOT) released a 71-page strategic plan for into its operations. The plan outlines four pilot projects and over 200 potential AI use cases, focusing on “high-impact applications that enhance human decision-making, streamline processes, and provide new insights from data.” During last month’s board of directors meeting, an agency official described the plan as a that could change as AI’s capabilities evolve. Some of the included in the plan are “AI-Assisted Bridge Inspection and Deterioration Prediction,” “Weather-Related Closure Recommendations,” and “Automated Speed Study Analysis.” Rapper Accidentally Fires Gun During Podcast Houston rapper OG 2 Low after accidentally shooting a gun in his pants pocket during a live episode of the YouTube show "One on One with Mike D." The incident occurred about when the rapper, whose real name is Cedric White, reached into his pocket, causing the weapon to fire. Show host Mike D looked around the room, asking, “Who shot who? Somebody got shot?” White, meanwhile, appeared shocked. When , he replied, “I hope.” White then asked if everyone else in the studio “was good.” Some commentators suspected the incident was a publicity stunt. As you read this, much of the mid-Atlantic is dealing with a major winter storm. Snowy and icy conditions are gripping our nation, from the Midwest to the East Coast, plus temperatures are plunging as far south as the Gulf Coast. As we try to stay warm in the comfort of our homes, we cannot forget about the brave members of our military who are responding to the cold and harsh conditions -- or those who are already serving in some of the coldest and most remote areas of the world.
**[At this urgent moment, will you please sign the card to show service members facing extreme winter weather that you're with them? We've set a goal to reach 50,000 signatures from caring supporters like you via email and text message by midnight tomorrow, and we'll never get there if you just delete this email.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
National Guard units in Missouri, West Virginia, Indiana and Kentucky have been activated to support state and local responders, rescue stranded motorists and assist communities affected by this deadly storm. While we may not fully understand every challenge they face -- from working in freezing conditions to being away from their families during an ongoing emergency -- **we can show them that military supporters are out there who appreciate and understand the sacrifices they make.**
**[Please add your name now to let our heroes know you're thinking of them this winter and all year long.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-ehp4EpYJa/ZSt1TGNMR1dUL1JlbVFKaHRUY1dQMlR4QWVoKzNJZHVQelNsMXR5eGVlOCsvS0c4TTBwdnJFWXhyby9uWCtpLzljMG1LcXVZK1p2S2pFOFhzOEw5TzBQV1B0S0hNRHFoaE1LbEdUZjB6NDA9S0/SnZoMlhtNVQ5amFINVdKWXUzMzFhVnRoOC9VZTQyTDdxY3hxaHFNSWt5cDJZQ29WelFTZlN1SzBLNm5VWjhOcUw5bEh1UTZKblhid1BwR0pDNEVIejM3NlBFUHQ5RzF5S0)**
Thank you,
The USO

clean_body: Sign the card to stand with our heroes. | | ❄ ❄ ❄ ❄ ❄ | | As you read this, much of the mid-Atlantic is dealing with a major winter storm. Snowy and icy conditions are gripping our nation, from the Midwest to the East Coast, plus temperatures are plunging as far south as the Gulf Coast. As we try to stay warm in the comfort of our homes, we cannot forget about the brave members of our military who are responding to the cold and harsh conditions -- or those who are already serving in some of the coldest and most remote areas of the world. National Guard units in Missouri, West Virginia, Indiana and Kentucky have been activated to support state and local responders, rescue stranded motorists and assist communities affected by this deadly storm. While we may not fully understand every challenge they face -- from working in freezing conditions to being away from their families during an ongoing emergency -- we can show them that military supporters are out there who appreciate and understand the sacrifices they make. Thank you, The USO United Service Organizations, Inc. (USO) is a nonprofit 501(ς)(3) organization (EIN/Tax ID: 13-1610451) and not part of the Department of Defense (DOD).
