subject: we want fewer of THESE in 2025
body:
Peter, They’re playing it safe, but their records don’t lie. I’m talking about the lemons in Trenton – and the lemons running
|
---
| Peter, They’re playing it safe, but their records don’t lie. I’m talking about the lemons in Trenton – and the lemons running for a spot in Trenton. How do we know they are lemons? Because they’ve been in office. We’ve taken them for a test drive. It’s pretty clear. They’re buffing out the exterior, detailing the interior, and maybe popping on some shiny new tires. But under the hood, it’s a different story. It might have worked before, but we’re wise to it now. And we aren’t just talking about it. ICYMI, One Less Lemon is our tangible, on-the-ground action plan to get these lemons out of office and replace them with REAL leaders by engaging the common sense voters of New Jersey like they’ve never been engaged before.

body:

Most of these lawmakers’ names - not to mention these bill themes - will be familiar to those of you who have been on the vaccine choice journey with us for multiple sessions. Hopefully, their legislation will meet an **equally familiar demise in 2025.** Without further ado, let TFVC introduce the... **Tyranny Squad for the 89th Legislative Session:**

subject: I’m Trump’s guy in the FL-01 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlv32t7iaufkqd6sfi9kb9avmnnoebuhra56h74o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9jm2or2cjh2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z63gfkl14490ohjuvheq7oams8fne65jgpbbes88_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9jm2or2cjh2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1thr9c2dj1euoai0fdk52fs043853pmtgod9bk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9jm2or2cjh2bs "Jimmy Patronis + Donald Trump")
---
Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zn26s3udqie3tf6sl9avtm4qu8lkmkar4eg9fd28_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9jm2or2cjh2bs "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

**JIMMY PATRONIS**
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zoac9fdmdakrrp0sk11eh4jft2218pp0kgtfv5vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9jm2or2cjh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z17m18hchv3np6oanctlvpbv6d1ljkejhaoupquo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9jm2or2cjh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcdr63gb6msp0g6n98e725f3dc8g5fto9416hmtg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9jm2or2cjh2bs "RESPOND NOW")
---
- STEVE SCALISE

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Top Trump allies have crafted a beautiful **appreciation letter for President Trump,** and we want you to have a read-through and _[SIGN the letter!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjk20n2hpvvqi2sesjiu0cheggbnq11hios3ikn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c9jm2or2cjh2bs)_

Trump's Border Czar Tom Homan **[put a smug CBS News anchor IN HER PLACE](https://substack.com/redirect/32aa30ed-4dd3-477c-b67f-f050c4425a51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she tried to trick him with bogus immigration question during a live T.V. interview.
"Hey, let's get the numbers straight!" Homan snapped at the anchor.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/32aa30ed-4dd3-477c-b67f-f050c4425a51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Homan corrected the CBS anchor after she claimed the number of deportations that occurred under the Biden-Harris administration were higher than under the Trump administration.
"Trump had illegal border crossings at a 45-year low. So of course the number of removals were higher(under Biden), there was more people crossing the border!" Homan clarified.
The anchor tried to stick to her talking points after her plan to trip Homan up with the misleading deportation comparison had failed.
**[Watch what happened next:](https://substack.com/redirect/32aa30ed-4dd3-477c-b67f-f050c4425a51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/32aa30ed-4dd3-477c-b67f-f050c4425a51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---|---|---
You've heard about ivermectin, the medication that's been under attack for helping people during COVID. Why? Because **they don 't want you in control of your own health.**
If you're wondering where to get it, you need to take a look at **[All Family Pharmacy.](https://substack.com/redirect/49d43f05-ea17-49c5-b347-b37ef614a018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** They make it easy to access ivermectin. And it's not just ivermectin, **[All Family Pharmacy offers over 200 medications.](https://substack.com/redirect/49d43f05-ea17-49c5-b347-b37ef614a018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Whether you need ivermectin or something else, they've got you covered.

* * *
# **Goth girl tells Charlie Kirk God isn't real... INSTANTLY regrets it**
An atheist goth girl approached Charlie Kirk during a campus debate table event, telling him that she doesn't believe in God.
Kirk, a strong christian, prompted her with the perfect question: **["Where do you think we go when we die?"](https://substack.com/redirect/2f0710b4-39d9-45f9-9bee-15fddd3e845e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Watch her struggle with the answer and realize that the idea of God may not be so silly after all.

# BODYCAM: Public urinator tries to be a SMARTASS, gets a major reality check from a fed-up cop
Police body cam footage shows **[the arrest of two young teens](https://substack.com/redirect/33137ff2-86f7-4cec-9c46-5131cf889bf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Florida on November 12, 2023.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/33137ff2-86f7-4cec-9c46-5131cf889bf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Officers witnessed a group of teens behaving suspiciously in a parking lot and upon further investigation, discovered the teens were underage drinking.
Additionally, officers observed a male suspect urinating in the parking lot. In an attempt to avoid an arrest, the male suspect tried to talk his way out of it, but only made the situation worse for himself and his friends, and instead they got a major reality check!

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
2025 Legislative Plan - Part Three - Protecting Women | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6372468c0c29/n41kepo7ku-12725642?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=42265398bb&e=25844e23a8)
---
| |
#### Good Morning Republicans,

_"Am I know trying to win the approval of human beings, or of God? Or am I trying to please people? If I were still trying to please people, I would not be a servant of Christ."_
**\--Galatians 1:10**

I hope the New Year has started off with a feeling of hope and new beginnings. New Year's Resolutions should still be somewhat intact after seven days and a sense of optimism for the country seems to be palpable. It feels like a "burden" has been lifted from the shoulders of Americans.

We must remember during hard times and great times, it is our Faith that sets us free from life's everyday burdens. When we maintain a servant mindset throughout trials and tribulations or give praise to the blessings bestowed on us...I faithfully and truly believe God is pleased.

My new year's resolution is towards my health... to take care of my body, mind, and soul with a purpose and intention towards a long life enjoying my children. I believe Health (Mental, Physical, & Spiritual) will be a key factor to making America great again. We will see a trend towards self care to lean into our roots of American exceptionalism. This won't be a trend of selfies and false narratives on social media, but a perceived altruistic form of growth as bettering ourselves...for ourselves, and for our families...not to simply Keep up with the Joneses.

So here's to better a YOU, in whichever way YOU... need to!
* * *
The counter protests to protecting Nebraska's youth and supporting women is going to rear its ugly head. Social media posts igniting the Far-Left Liberal base to _**“Show up & fight back” **_are popping up. As this aggressive behavior attempts to paint the picture that Republicans HATE or Republicans are ANTI-Anything, the irony is the lack of civil discussion attempted on their part. The chants and threats towards violence show no reflection of seeking to advocate for the cause but only further disenfranchising Nebraskans from all political spectrums.

What once was a rallying cry for Democrats to showcase inequalities towards women in sports or education or business ventures even, has now entered a fundamental erosion of HUMAN DIGNITY. Women of all ages, little girls to athletes, have to EXPLAIN that they are worthy of having a private space like bathrooms or locker rooms?!? Even worse, they must FEAR that a culture, a community, is turning against THEM and that THEY'RE the problem? It is time for common sense to prevail. It is time for Nebraska Sense to **Stand with Women**

Join Senator Kauth and Governor Pillen at the Capitol! Support our Senators and elected leaders just as you did during the latest Unicameral session. Support the women athletes who will be attending and who take great pride in wearing a uniform identified with this Great State.

The 2nd House MUST be there to support common sense Republican values and an open discussion of where effective and purposeful legislation needs to be restored.
**NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY
LEGISLATIVE PLAN FOR NEBRASKA
109th Legislature, 1st Regular Session, 2025** The integrity of the Unicameral is in the effectiveness to purposefully and meaningfully benefit Nebraskans, NOT a select few special interests.
What is worrisome and SAD to realize is that we may **NOT** have the vote count we need to support _women_. **Or secure elections.** Or change to _Winner-Take-All._ Or _support teachers and students_. Or protect against foreign land ownerships. Or protect LIFE. TAXES, EDUCATION, MENTAL HEALTH, Energy Independence, Protect Agriculture...

the REASON we don't have solutions...

See...we have a perpetual "Integrity of the Institution" problem.
_MODERNIZE NEBRASKA LEGISLATIVE RULES TO REFLECT
“WE THE PEOPLE”_ The integrity of the Nebraska Unicameral has been eroded by outdated rules that do not promote best practices for legislation and the needs of its citizens. It is way overdue for legislators to change their procedural rules to make the legislative process fairer and more efficient.
* **Lower the Cloture Vote Threshold**
* Advocate for lowering the cloture vote threshold in the Nebraska Legislature to facilitate smoother passage of key legislative initiatives, ensuring that important bills are not indefinitely stalled by minority obstruction. **Change the cloture vote requirement to 3/5's (30)**. The number to override a Governor or a minority group in the legislature should be the same.

* **The Issue:** The current 2/3 cloture rule gives a small minority (17) of legislators undue AND ABUSED power to block important legislation, even when it has broad support.
* **The Solution:** Aligning the cloture threshold with the Governor's veto override threshold (3/5 or 30) creates a more balanced and democratic process.
* **The Benefits:**
* Faster Progress: Allows the legislature to address critical issues like:
* Economic Development: LOWERED TAXES
* **Election Security: Voter Verification & Election Accountability**
* Education Priority: Support Teachers & Students
* Energy & Land Independence: Nebraska’s Land & Resources for Nebraskans
* Political Restructuring: The salvation of the State.
* Accountability: Ensures legislation reflects the will of the majority of the people.

Fairness: Aligns legislative procedures with the established standard for overriding gubernatorial vetoes. No other state has anything close to Nebraska's imbalance of voting leverage.
**"30 for the Governor, 30 for the people. It's common sense."**
**"3/5 for Vetoes, 3/5 for Cloture: A Balanced Approach"**
We have driven and determined leaders across this state that will be building relations with our elected leaders on YOUR behalf to implement our Legislative Plan, are forthcoming Political Plan, and returning the influence BACK to the people and away from consultants or special interests that are only driven by money and power.
The truth shall set us free.
Blessings,
---
|
---
| –Chairman Underwood
---
| | This was the VISION and OBJECTIVE TRUTHS of 2024...nothing changes without YOU.
2025 NEGOP VISION
In 2025, the Republican Party of Nebraska is going ALL-IN on the VALUES of Education, ALL-IN on Election Accountability and Voter Verification, ALL-IN on Tax Reform, ALL-IN on Protecting Human Rights. This will come to fruition in our Legislative Plan and through the voices of the people who will expect the very most from their elected representatives. The groundwork has been completed and in 2025 it will all come down to a choice by EVERY Republican. The choice is to remove oneself from the party politics and personalities normally associated with power and money AND engage at the doorstep of Nebraskans sharing the truth of our values because our values bring the solutions to local struggles of taxes, community safety, election security, & educational excellence. The Values of the Republican Party resonate with Nebraskans. We are reaching out and connecting in 2025 and this will be a victory for Conservative Principles.

Nebraskans are thirsting for people of courage, people of honesty and truth...they are hungry for leaders to say what they are going to do...AND...then DO what they say! I am beyond measure proud of the Republican grassroots and coalitions. They HAVE created stability within this organization.

Every false narrative sowing chaos is an attempt by those who seek their power back. The Republicans who prioritize our principles are actively fulfilling the objectives of the party by doing maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people AND furthering their principles within the community. And this effort will continue to grow and grow as more principled Republicans join the efforts. I see this growth and stability EVERYWHERE in Nebraska now. Dixon County, Seward County, Gage County, York County, Sarpy County, Saline County, Madison, Keith, Hall, and on and on...and the growth and stability is coming FROM the people. From leaders of the party, who CHOOSE to grow and build their counties because the people matter and connecting people to our values matters. Common Nebraskans, who say enough is enough...who choose to sacrifice their time to become better every day and engage more volunteers to make more engagement opportunities. From County Chairs and Secretaries, committeemen and women, elected officials to candidates, they SEE the reality of what strong, healthy County Parties can do. These next 3-4 months there will be a purposeful and respectful focus of engagement to demographics and people who share conservative values. We are going ALL-IN on to be a resource for local campaigns and local elected positions such as school boards, city council, county seats, NRD's, power boards. We are going ALL-IN on people of Nebraska who make Nebraska the ‘Good Life’. –Chairman Underwood
---

The Issue: The current 2/3 cloture rule gives a small minority (17) of legislators undue AND ABUSED power to block important legislation, even when it has broad support. The Solution: Aligning the cloture threshold with the Governor's veto override threshold (3/5 or 30) creates a more balanced and democratic process. The Benefits: Faster Progress: Allows the legislature to address critical issues like: Economic Development: LOWERED TAXES Election Security: Voter Verification & Election Accountability Education Priority: Support Teachers & Students Energy & Land Independence: Nebraska’s Land & Resources for Nebraskans Political Restructuring: The salvation of the State. Accountability: Ensures legislation reflects the will of the majority of the people. Fairness: Aligns legislative procedures with the established standard for overriding gubernatorial vetoes. No other state has anything close to Nebraska's imbalance of voting leverage. "30 for the Governor, 30 for the people. It's common sense." "3/5 for Vetoes, 3/5 for Cloture: A Balanced Approach" We have driven and determined leaders across this state that will be building relations with our elected leaders on YOUR behalf to implement our Legislative Plan, are forthcoming Political Plan, and returning the influence BACK to the people and away from consultants or special interests that are only driven by money and power. The truth shall set us free. Blessings, | | –Chairman Underwood | | This was the VISION and OBJECTIVE TRUTHS of 2024...nothing changes without YOU. 2025 NEGOP VISION In 2025, the Republican Party of Nebraska is going ALL-IN on the VALUES of Education, ALL-IN on Election Accountability and Voter Verification, ALL-IN on Tax Reform, ALL-IN on Protecting Human Rights. This will come to fruition in our Legislative Plan and through the voices of the people who will expect the very most from their elected representatives. The groundwork has been completed and in 2025 it will all come down to a choice by EVERY Republican. The choice is to remove oneself from the party politics and personalities normally associated with power and money AND engage at the doorstep of Nebraskans sharing the truth of our values because our values bring the solutions to local struggles of taxes, community safety, election security, & educational excellence. The Values of the Republican Party resonate with Nebraskans. We are reaching out and connecting in 2025 and this will be a victory for Conservative Principles. Nebraskans are thirsting for people of courage, people of honesty and truth...they are hungry for leaders to say what they are going to do...AND...then DO what they say! I am beyond measure proud of the Republican grassroots and coalitions. They HAVE created stability within this organization. Every false narrative sowing chaos is an attempt by those who seek their power back. The Republicans who prioritize our principles are actively fulfilling the objectives of the party by doing maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people AND furthering their principles within the community. And this effort will continue to grow and grow as more principled Republicans join the efforts. I see this growth and stability EVERYWHERE in Nebraska now. Dixon County, Seward County, Gage County, York County, Sarpy County, Saline County, Madison, Keith, Hall, and on and on...and the growth and stability is coming FROM the people. From leaders of the party, who CHOOSE to grow and build their counties because the people matter and connecting people to our values matters. Common Nebraskans, who say enough is enough...who choose to sacrifice their time to become better every day and engage more volunteers to make more engagement opportunities. From County Chairs and Secretaries, committeemen and women, elected officials to candidates, they SEE the reality of what strong, healthy County Parties can do. These next 3-4 months there will be a purposeful and respectful focus of engagement to demographics and people who share conservative values. We are going ALL-IN on to be a resource for local campaigns and local elected positions such as school boards, city council, county seats, NRD's, power boards. We are going ALL-IN on people of Nebraska who make Nebraska the ‘Good Life’. –Chairman Underwood | "Donate" | | Weather Update - Lincoln | | Weather Update - Grand Island | | Weather Update - Scottsbluff | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2025 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A moment I won’t forget
body:
It was November of 1989
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father.
|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=4f737e76840d4e8981a2db90191700d8&_t=qygpjfN_gWcfP69wGP5TzPJBWvRIAerBmo01nZ-G3OSw4soUIod1KwP7jgJSYhwSifR3w_RabFz1YX1ws3kEMKILCaEugHRQZz57hJ15M0SutX8WXBDtPV6LurkwMt_x)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4f737e76840d4e8981a2db90191700d8&_e=hLwbCH3ou91bz9jeM26Dus34UJxzca7B3LLrgsYPvB-SCNrtaKl3RhfNisSYcyG-s1_8i8jZxKbw9Ue8ghQaUAS1nzZWIUeVBWhNudTX8UFE9px0RdDLDIDbKMyEWwBhrpRJO2cNo6aicLGR22qlQGkifX-ByzP0ixbcCf2SOqTPAsqBxhpUyI8QUV5zUap8-j4-0KXj_nvaBMaEOBJ0CNi3uEgR8En-0gLn8uiS2G8g1ffZoHT9SFsdxm9vJVNQd1ObqGgjCxQMsFQatwIgmmtCLXozyB3GKvmgXVzf-_l7VlGLl8BMWZmxuZ_n97u90PrWN2tT2fbqNpSu6wlZl45dwGgYrln53AVC9U7g0u6Fm818Zek8RD5NWFCm45k7XC_FsI59jXz1r9NfEOHp8r25q_ylDFQk13xEE7nlcZPMDxqnjLeDjpIMLI4VNCTY)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4f737e76840d4e8981a2db90191700d8&_e=hLwbCH3ou91bz9jeM26Dus34UJxzca7B3LLrgsYPvB-SCNrtaKl3RhfNisSYcyG-s1_8i8jZxKbw9Ue8ghQaUAS1nzZWIUeVBWhNudTX8UFE9px0RdDLDIDbKMyEWwBhrpRJO2cNo6aicLGR22qlQGkifX-ByzP0ixbcCf2SOqTPAsqBxhpUyI8QUV5zUap8-j4-0KXj_nvaBMaEOBJ0CNi3uEgR8En-0gLn8uiS2G8g1ffZoHT9SFsdxm9vJVNQd1ObqGgjCxQMsFQatwIgmq7z13XuKTl7dq5kSVxX-e3AK12sXlWXsI6aFGz6k3ecAk40PM2pQ9vGLpe5jMTUV3uUs6EbBWL5tK2hBfpgNL6GxH-IbG120ooG_xKIygvtd4mKzGxHm5j1JfaX5VK357tv3dSVSUlHUsDSNmxzo_BLh7g60QIDUZmPyU_qT26C)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4f737e76840d4e8981a2db90191700d8&_e=hLwbCH3ou91bz9jeM26Dus34UJxzca7B3LLrgsYPvB-SCNrtaKl3RhfNisSYcyG-s1_8i8jZxKbw9Ue8ghQaUAS1nzZWIUeVBWhNudTX8UFE9px0RdDLDIDbKMyEWwBhrpRJO2cNo6aicLGR22qlQGkifX-ByzP0ixbcCf2SOqTPAsqBxhpUyI8QUV5zUap8-j4-0KXj_nvaBMaEOBJ0CNi3uEgR8En-0gLn8uiS2G8g1ffZoHT9SFsdxm9vJVNQd1ObqGgjCxQMsFQatwIgmp5Vw6B8biRCFhI-glslbSFaEJgnVrRSPkjOHhGQmORex4ir16LiZ_qyK_z-6jb46DUyORiG7V45bYQFxzUlZoI3xOV0myffXn1EsbJosr2iVbJD1F_M84yfdGoZG7nwOTSYzkwkDqmhLLGXyZvs6Emx5lvAwSN16CkCAmZfBTcO)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4f737e76840d4e8981a2db90191700d8&_e=hLwbCH3ou91bz9jeM26Dus34UJxzca7B3LLrgsYPvB-SCNrtaKl3RhfNisSYcyG-s1_8i8jZxKbw9Ue8ghQaUAS1nzZWIUeVBWhNudTX8UFE9px0RdDLDIDbKMyEWwBhrpRJO2cNo6aicLGR22qlQGkifX-ByzP0ixbcCf2SOqTPAsqBxhpUyI8QUV5zUap8-j4-0KXj_nvaBMaEOBJ0CNi3uEgR8En-0gLn8uiS2G8g1ffZoHT9SFsdxm9vJVNQd1ObqGgjCxQMsFQatwIgmuloMQZbO7DnqVKsRn6rEIgkZa0KUTg_qCPBPnGidgO2qIiTh34LpQw3IX_hOKsVkOBYxAp2-q9ckSCVkU6dNCgCa_z7i_bwB3QMqFrkgQjdpBG2-IdgzQydjkd52Whgq30xlCjoQgOsHLseqQzTBgeBDv9e-SQMCid_0Z_be_tQ)

SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85915?t=6&akid=18384%2E878179%2E9j-PUM) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85915?t=7&akid=18384%2E878179%2E9j-PUM) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85915?t=8&akid=18384%2E878179%2E9j-PUM)

FROM: A proud Democrat

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House THIS YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

name: VoteVets
subject: We have not forgotten, and we will not forgive.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
As a new Congress met to certify the 2024 presidential election, we all remembered what happened four years ago yesterday.
We have not forgotten that the man enjoying the time-honored peaceful transition of power is the man who destroyed that tradition four years ago.
We have not forgotten that Republicans — horrified on January 6th — went on to excuse that deliberate attack on the foundation of our nation in the days, weeks, and years after it. Many have even defended, and worse, celebrated, that day.
We have not forgotten the promises Trump made to pardon the domestic terrorists who stormed the Capitol and left hundreds of police injured.
And it is impossible to forget that, in spite of our best efforts, the man most responsible for that day will again inhabit the office of Commander in Chief.
**It was a dark day.**
But the fight is not over.
VoteVets has not surrendered.
As we prepare for Trump to take the oath of office, we are gearing up to hold his administration accountable, and defend the Constitution and our democracy that they see as obstacles. We are working with our allies to hold the line against the worst aims of this new administration. We are already beginning the work of recruiting and advising new leaders who will campaign for public office to take back Congress and take on Trump and his allies in states and cities around the country. We are fighting to stop the spread of right-wing disinformation among military servicemembers and Veterans.
**There is no shortage of work to do. And you have a critical role in supporting it.**
[**Please, make a donation to VoteVets. We need you now.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250106-1-120&t=1&akid=34062%2E3013755%2EYYWl6B)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.49Iizk&refcode=em250106-1-120&t=21&akid=34062%2E3013755%2EYYWl6B)**

****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.xwxeOZ&refcode=em250106-1-120&t=22&akid=34062%2E3013755%2EYYWl6B)**

| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.zEdHpx&refcode=em250106-1-120&t=23&akid=34062%2E3013755%2EYYWl6B)**

Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

NEXT, Crooked Judge Merchan DENIED Donald Trump's request to delay sentencing in the sham New York case. NOW, a NY Court of Appeals judge has JUST REJECTED Trump’s emergency petition to immediately halt the proceeding ALLOWING Friday’s scheduled sentencing to go forward! Let us be clear, this sham sentencing is UNLAWFUL. The Supreme Court’s historic decision on Immunity, the state constitution of New York, and other established legal precedent mandate that this meritless hoax be immediately dismissed. Yet, Crooked Judge Merchan, the corrupt Manhattan D.A., and politicized courts are continuing their witch hunt! The lawfare against President Trump MUST be stopped. We, the American People, elected President Trump by an overwhelming margin. So now, we, the American People, demand an immediate end to the political weaponization of our justice system and ALL witch hunts against Donald J. Trump. So, right now, we're calling on every last patriot reading this to immediately speak out against this injustice… We have launched an emergency response Team Marsha petition to DEMAND this sham case be DROPPED immediately once and for all but, Peter, your name is currently MISSING! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=21d791077f1eb7ba20c5c9c20092adfc881352b34349bb6c6fabfad7aa206ff5d6752b9b0b57f9a86189ac81fa2329ca5ef0ec66c993012d4770ffeadf4d831d Will you take just a minute right now to add your name to our list of top Trump Defenders demanding the baseless charges against President Trump be THROWN OUT and the entire case be TOSSED to clear our great President's name once and for all? https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=21d791077f1eb7ba20c5c9c20092adfc881352b34349bb6c6fabfad7aa206ff5d6752b9b0b57f9a86189ac81fa2329ca5ef0ec66c993012d4770ffeadf4d831d >" alias="ADD YOUR NAME >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">ADD YOUR NAME >> https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=21d791077f1eb7ba20c5c9c20092adfc881352b34349bb6c6fabfad7aa206ff5d6752b9b0b57f9a86189ac81fa2329ca5ef0ec66c993012d4770ffeadf4d831d DEMAND THE SHAM CASE BE THROWN OUT We’ll be on the lookout for your signature, and everyone who steps up in the next HOUR will be flagged by Team Marsha directly for Donald Trump’s team. Please don't wait. subject: We’re getting concerned about Liz Cheney!

the MAGA GOP is FURIOUS with her

---
| **_Look, we’re getting concerned for Liz Cheney:_** **_The MAGA GOP is FURIOUS with Cheney and scheming to have her thrown in jail!_**

We don’t usually side with Cheney, but she has bravely stood up to Trump and his MAGA allies at every turn. [**Please, the GOP is out to make an example out of Cheney to ensure that no other Republicans dare to stand up to Trump. Sign our petition to stand with Liz Cheney »** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney24?source=FFR_20250107_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22723%2E4449941%2EW5RxUg) | [25,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney24?source=FFR_20250107_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22723%2E4449941%2EW5RxUg)
---
**_Here are three things you need to know:_**
**ONE:** Liz Cheney bucked her party and stood against Trump’s corruption.

**TWO:** Republicans were FURIOUS! _She lost her seat in Congress by standing up for the truth._

**THREE:** **The GOP never stopped attacking her!** They’re hellbent on completely destroying Cheney’s career to send a message to other Republicans.

[**That’s why it’s crucial we get 25,000 signatures standing with Liz Cheney, she’ll know she has the support to keep standing up to the GOP! Sign on to stand with Liz Cheney »** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney24?source=FFR_20250107_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22723%2E4449941%2EW5RxUg)

[25,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney24?source=FFR_20250107_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=22723%2E4449941%2EW5RxUg)

name: Phil Scott
subject: Last Chance: Governor's Inaugural Celebration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Scott for Vermont
body:
Experience the 14 |
---
| | The First Lady and I hope to see you on Saturday, January 11 at the Barre Auditorium at 7:00 PM for our "Experience the 14" Inaugural Gala.

Tomorrow is the last day to get your tickets. **[Tickets and more information is available by clicking here.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=50e4cda382&e=19cebfe173) **

The event will feature local bands and entertainment, as well as food, beverages and merchants from all of Vermont's 14 Counties.

This event is open to the public, so feel free to share with family and friends! All proceeds of the event will benefit those who have served, and those that continue to serve in the Armed Forces. Hope to see you there!

Gov. Phil

clean_body: Experience the 14 | | | The First Lady and I hope to see you on Saturday, January 11 at the Barre Auditorium at 7:00 PM for our "Experience the 14" Inaugural Gala. Tomorrow is the last day to get your tickets. The event will feature local bands and entertainment, as well as food, beverages and merchants from all of Vermont's 14 Counties. This event is open to the public, so feel free to share with family and friends! All proceeds of the event will benefit those who have served, and those that continue to serve in the Armed Forces. Hope to see you there! Gov. Phil | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Phil Scott for Vermont P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

clean_body: It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Patriot. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ IMPRISONMENT! ” But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We need your help in 2025!
body:
If you have already made a contribution to help Judicial Watch in 2025...thank you! But if you haven’t, I urge you to help us with a tax-deductible gift today.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

If you have already made a contribution to help Judicial Watch in 2025...thank you!
**[But if you haven't, I urge you to give us your support with a tax-deductible gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71826&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71826&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We need _your_ renewed support now to help us score _more_ victories for the rule of law so _we_ can continue to lead the national fight to keep our _elections honest_. Our elections work paid off last November, with none of the controversies that we experienced in 2020...but we still face massive election challenges from the Left!

We also need you to help us continue to fight in the courts against the Left's efforts to revive discrimination based on race.

And we need your support as we stand 100% with President-elect Trump in a full-scale effort to secure our borders and deport illegal aliens!

_These are critically important fights that no one else can wage as aggressively and effectively as Judicial Watch_.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71826&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We cannot trust politicians in Congress, _Republicans or Democrats_ , or liberal bureaucrats embedded deep in the federal government to do the right thing _against_ corruption and _for_ the rule of law!

We're clearly the most effective government watchdog in the country...but [we needyou to join with us now, in these critical early days of 2025.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71826&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

It will be great to have you on our team!

And a very Happy New Year!

clean_body: If you have already made a contribution to help Judicial Watch in 2025...thank you! But if you haven’t, I urge you to help us with a tax-deductible gift today. | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, If you have already made a contribution to help Judicial Watch in 2025...thank you! | We need your renewed support now to help us score more victories for the rule of law so we can continue to lead the national fight to keep our elections honest. Our elections work paid off last November, with none of the controversies that we experienced in 2020...but we still face massive election challenges from the Left! We also need you to help us continue to fight in the courts against the Left's efforts to revive discrimination based on race. And we need your support as we stand 100% with President-elect Trump in a full-scale effort to secure our borders and deport illegal aliens! These are critically important fights that no one else can wage as aggressively and effectively as Judicial Watch. We cannot trust politicians in Congress, Republicans or Democrats , or liberal bureaucrats embedded deep in the federal government to do the right thing against corruption and for the rule of law! We're clearly the most effective government watchdog in the country...but It will be great to have you on our team! And a very Happy New Year! name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: PA's risky shift undermines girls and women
body:
Beth Ann Rosica | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Beth Ann Rosica_ : Despite federal reversal, PA continues to allow boys to compete against girls in school sports_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=660c34ccf7&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| "Last month, the Biden administration quietly abandoned its plan to force school districts to allow boys to compete against girls in sports. Before that about-face, districts across the country had been threatened with a loss of federal funding if they failed to comply with yet another revision of the Title IX regulations — further gutting the original protections for girls and women. However, as a result of widespread criticism, the U.S. Department of [Education](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=78dcbc58b6&e=b7b3eddce2) announced, “in light of the comments received and those various pending court cases, the Department has determined not to regulate on this issue at this time.” Approximately half the states in the country have regulations or laws preventing boys from competing in girls’ sports. Pennsylvania is one of 25 [states](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4502a71c85&e=b7b3eddce2) allowing boys to compete against girls..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=328f6e73e2&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## About Beth Anna Rosica:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8d9b575726&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Beth Ann Rosica holds a Ph.D. in Education and has dedicated her career to advocating on behalf of at-risk children and families. She became politically active during the extended school closures, speaking out about the detrimental effects on children. Beth Ann led the local grassroots movement to open schools and eliminate mandatory masks while assisting school board candidates across the state and country with their campaigns. She has a consulting business and covers education issues for _Broad + Liberty_. Beth Ann resides in West Chester, PA with her husband and two teenage sons.

Read more from Beth Ann [here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ac7ea4c4f8&e=b7b3eddce2) at _Broad + Liberty_.

|

clean_body: Jason’s commitment to our Commonwealth is unwavering, and his achievements speak volumes.| | | Friend, Since taking office, Attorney General Jason Miyares has been a steadfast protector of Virginia’s values, defending families, upholding justice, and ensuring our communities remain safe and strong.His commitment to our Commonwealth is unwavering, and his achievements speak volumes. Now, as we look toward the future, Jason is ready to continue fighting for Virginia – but he can’t do it without you. Our next election will define the direction of our state, and your support is critical to keeping Jason Miyares as our Attorney General. Your donation – whether it’s $5 or $25 – makes a world of difference in the fight to ensure the Commonwealth is safe, that women’s sports are protected, and our families flourish. We can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside us, for believing in Jason’s vision for Virginia’s future. We would be grateful for your support, friend. Thank you, Lauren Team Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

With Trump and Republicans gaining ground in Virginia and other blue states, we need to do everything we can to ensure that Virginia is a firewall to the Trump administration. But dark money donors are getting ready to pour MILLIONS into this race. They’ll do everything they can to keep the Governor’s seat red, so being complacent is NOT AN OPTION. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We are revisiting highlights from 2024. One of the top episodes was, without a doubt, our exclusive interview with Tucker Carlson,
one of the most recognizable names in conservative media.

Tucker talks about the importance of family and the hot-button issues that moms care about most. As someone who has had his finger
on the pulse of the conservative movement, Tucker has great insight to share. You do not want to miss this crowd favorite from
2024! Like, share and subscribe.

At Moms for America, We Love Our Dads!

Family life begins with a mom and dad. At Moms for America, our focus is on our mamas and the issues close to their heart. But we
are grateful for and collaborate with dads!

This week, we're celebrating five ways dads have an impact on our families. From leading the big adventures to teaching life
lessons through humor and sage advice, dads have a lot to offer.

clean_body: We're bringing a special encore episode to the Moms for America Podcast this week and celebrating the role of fathers. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] January 7, 2025 • Newsletter Tucker Carlson Unfiltered ENCORE Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] We are revisiting highlights from 2024. One of the top episodes was, without a doubt, our exclusive interview with Tucker Carlson, one of the most recognizable names in conservative media. Tucker talks about the importance of family and the hot-button issues that moms care about most. As someone who has had his finger on the pulse of the conservative movement, Tucker has great insight to share. You do not want to miss this crowd favorite from 2024! Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] At Moms for America, We Love Our Dads! Family life begins with a mom and dad. At Moms for America, our focus is on our mamas and the issues close to their heart. But we are grateful for and collaborate with dads! This week, we're celebrating five ways dads have an impact on our families. From leading the big adventures to teaching life lessons through humor and sage advice, dads have a lot to offer. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

---
[Name]
---
Aunt Angie's House, founded by Angela Stanton King
---
a passionate advocate for life and supporter of both President Trump and RFK Jr.--provides a lifeline to pregnant women facing unplanned pregnancies. Angela's inspiration stems from her own harrowing experience of giving birth while shackled to a prison bed.
---
[Donate Now](https://100090.io.directiq12.com/hit?sid=zlq8nmbll6e8zu1yoz&linkid=4&link=26eae13489a9427fa856288f7498d2ec)
---
Determined to give mothers the choice she never had, Aunt Angie's House has already helped 12 women keep their babies, secure employment, and transition into permanent housing. Currently, four women and five babies reside in this sanctuary, located in a historic 1929 Victorian-style home in Atlanta's King District.
---
|
---
| | We urgently need to raise $75,000 to renovate and construct critical amenities in our newly acquired four-unit building.
---
[Donate](https://100090.io.directiq12.com/hit?sid=zlq8nmbll6e8zu1yoz&linkid=5&link=40c9a7a5fdd1413fbefbbbf2933da9c6)
---
| | |
---
| | The property, which will expand our capacity to serve more women, requires a kitchen build-out and bathroom renovations to become operational. By donating, you'll help us create a safe haven where women can not only choose life but build a foundation for their future. Your support will directly impact lives and give these mothers and their babies the chance to thrive. Join us in making this vision a reality!

clean_body: | | | | | Your Help Is Urgently Needed | | | "Auntie Angies" | "Auntie Angies" | "Auntie Angies" ---|---|--- [Name] Aunt Angie's House, founded by Angela Stanton King a passionate advocate for life and supporter of both President Trump and RFK Jr.--provides a lifeline to pregnant women facing unplanned pregnancies. Angela's inspiration stems from her own harrowing experience of giving birth while shackled to a prison bed. Determined to give mothers the choice she never had, Aunt Angie's House has already helped 12 women keep their babies, secure employment, and transition into permanent housing. Currently, four women and five babies reside in this sanctuary, located in a historic 1929 Victorian-style home in Atlanta's King District. | | | We urgently need to raise $75,000 to renovate and construct critical amenities in our newly acquired four-unit building. | | | | | The property, which will expand our capacity to serve more women, requires a kitchen build-out and bathroom renovations to become operational. By donating, you'll help us create a safe haven where women can not only choose life but build a foundation for their future. Your support will directly impact lives and give these mothers and their babies the chance to thrive. name: The Yellow Jacket
subject: BRAND NEW Yellow Jacket OTF Knife - Get Yours NOW!
body:
When it comes to everyday carry (EDC), there’s no room for compromise...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19638/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/e129818a54051be4619db4c4009c46a035d9d9f3). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

| | When it comes to everyday carry (EDC), there’s no room for compromise.

You need a blade that’s quick, reliable, and built to handle whatever life throws at you. Introducing the **[Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19638/6374453/7d7554b062fa31951b53c077ccaa5e261267aa72/e129818a54051be4619db4c4009c46a035d9d9f3) **—the ultimate tool for anyone serious about their gear.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19638/6374453/7d7554b062fa31951b53c077ccaa5e261267aa72/e129818a54051be4619db4c4009c46a035d9d9f3)
---
Here’s Why You Need This Knife in Your Arsenal: **> Lightning-Fast Deployment**: With the Out-The-Front (OTF) mechanism, this knife is ready to go in an instant. Perfect for when every second counts. **> Superior Blade Quality**: Crafted with high-quality steel, this blade is sharp, durable, and designed to maintain its edge, making it a reliable companion in any situation. **> Rugged, Tactical Design**: [Built to withstand the toughest conditions, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19638/6374453/7d7554b062fa31951b53c077ccaa5e261267aa72/e129818a54051be4619db4c4009c46a035d9d9f3) is as tough as you are. It’s not just a knife; it’s a statement. **> Compact & Concealable**: Designed to be discreet yet always within reach, it’s the perfect size to fit comfortably in your pocket or clip onto your gear. **Limited Stock Alert:** These knives are in high demand, and we’ve got a limited quantity available. Don’t miss out on owning one of the most versatile and dependable OTF knives on the market. **Special Offer Just for You:** For a limited time, we’re offering an **exclusive discount** to our loyal subscribers. Don’t wait—this deal won’t last forever. [**Claim Your Yellow Jacket OTF Knife Here!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19638/6374453/7d7554b062fa31951b53c077ccaa5e261267aa72/e129818a54051be4619db4c4009c46a035d9d9f3)

This is more than just a knife—it’s a piece of gear you’ll be proud to carry every day. Whether you’re in the field, on the job, or just out and about, the Yellow Jacket OTF Knife is the edge you need.

Stay sharp, stay prepared.

_~John G._ _Gunner Gear_ P.S. **Don’t wait!** Our stock is limited, and once these knives are gone, they’re gone. [Grab yours now before they sell out!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19638/6374453/7d7554b062fa31951b53c077ccaa5e261267aa72/e129818a54051be4619db4c4009c46a035d9d9f3)

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What makes retirees most anxious? Hint: It's not $
body:
| Hi Peter, What makes you most anxious about retirement? If you're like most people planning for retirement, you're worried about finances and not having enough money to support yourself when you retire.1 Financial concerns aren't the top worry for today's retirees, though.1 They're far more nervous about health issues than money. That's just one disconnect between what we _think_ we know about retired life versus what it's actually like living it.
---
|
---
Firsthand experiences can be eye-opening. And they don't have to be _our_ experiences to impart lasting life lessons. When it comes to retirement and making the best possible plans, you don't have to do it by trial and error. Learning from those who've "been there and done that" can teach us some deeper lessons about retirement without the growing pains it took to gain that wisdom. Those subtler retirement lessons are the focus of this Month's Visual Insights Newsletter. [**Click here to see it!**](https://financeinsights.net/qq6liAD70hjzzb4U6aaqAc38NqO?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Retirement is so much more than a milestone. The better we understand what life in retirement looks like, the better we can be at planning for the retirement of our dreams. [**Go ahead and click here to see what today's retirees would do-over if they could go back in time.**](https://financeinsights.net/qq6liAD70hjzzb4U6aaqAc38NqO?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IjRRMU50ME5tamlPMTE1diIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. What's the first thing you want to do when you retire? Why? Hit "reply" and share your answer. I look forward to hearing about your plans and how you're working toward making them a reality. Sources 1.MassMutual, 2024 [URL: [https://www.massmutual.com/global/media/shared/doc/2024_massmutual_retirement_happiness_study.pdf](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cubWFzc211dHVhbC5jb21cL2dsb2JhbFwvbWVkaWFcL3NoYXJlZFwvZG9jXC8yMDI0X21hc3NtdXR1YWxfcmV0aXJlbWVudF9oYXBwaW5lc3Nfc3R1ZHkucGRmIiwiaGFzaCI6IjRRMU50ME5tamlPMTE1diIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)]

name: Add Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Tell Facebook to reverse its awful decision and reinstate fact-checking procedures
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Facebook reverse its decision to end fact-checking](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td875587e-b5d4-4f4f-88b0-f2f8134eadbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td84f3e82-edd1-4380-9ab4-d2e4260cd5d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Social networking company Meta (which owns Facebook, Instagram, and Threads) has decided to [END](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25d929fb-6393-4772-b4ca-6bfeaf0f4297/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) its fact-checking protocols and allow misinformation to freely flow on their platforms. [**This is a disastrous decision, and they need to reverse it immediately.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b65c58c-6916-4642-904b-4a91022d999b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This move is just to please Trump and his MAGA allies, who thrive on their lies and conspiracy theories being spread as far and wide as possible. Meta owner Mark Zuckerberg is bending the knee to curry favor with Trump before he takes office, at our expense. Now instead of news organizations or other third party fact checkers, the only safeguard against misinformation on Facebook and Instagram will be a "community notes" feature which relies on users to comment on false or misleading posts. With Trump about to take office, we need reliable fact-checking more than ever. We can't allow his lies and conspiracy theories to spread unchecked. [**Tell Meta to reverse this awful decision and reinstate fact-checking procedures >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e806b06-4c2e-4c3b-8644-5ad23ac14d7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfec3eb7e-b7b9-4d30-8859-337716b84f42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c1e326a-9980-45b2-b072-549de61d8afd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8da154b-bd3c-4e71-8a9f-050494cf2d51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a680711-51f8-4b05-aa15-235c89179efa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d583932-c326-436e-acc0-adafd3a5fcba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: The Flyover
subject: Trudeau Resigns, Trump Election Certified, and a $1 Million Tuna
body:
Embattled Canadian [Prime Minister Justin Trudeau](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd0RwwRAXFK9xl9duabFwndwIgwUkkf9-5e23mWY0R6PzdVtunhLl-3-_oetrWUDAyIXkwi7RUzoWPUS3IgKqAZ20yoDRkzbDw4nrNI1rHJUJAdQktREWRinXEOM1QBzInTQhhZWjnoS-BB2tDUp9e8RRWs-0wEi91MuzUO4PXNNR3lgvoWxDco_e98bUPwYzgzkfe2n9rBjMJ5jBLOQZhsH8KTVFnvHTGMzBZx_JZ75X2pBvlKl1rPz5ap0y7_UV0b94xUb3fA6G6uL-oZSoGcu0uG-e0u-L_peVt4OfAAAA__8gVGOW) announced his resignation as prime minister and leader of the Liberal Party on Monday, though he'll remain in office until the party selects a replacement.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwzAMBb9G2hJQlCw2g4Yu3tK1o8FYVMxWtgJXSJG_L1J07fzeHXDv5-nMWnW7vvEqqZc2IeBwAHcAmjJrfUzB5lREULyV5MhHjOEUol1SYcA8E0Rm5AsDk_ALeiYGLhzEanrawAG5IZwgHOeQiWbvLywyOGITQLL2th8_mm59kVIf7S77cW6rrWnp_Wb8q8HR4Jh33T7ruvXnaHD8u9o95du31qpfkUyA68paf_n-X8894U8AAAD__yn8TcU) | |
# Tuesday, January 7, 2025
---|---

If traveling is part of your plans for the new year, check out our story below about the new travel requirements for 2025, particularly the [use of REAL ID at U.S. airports](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAUhZ8Gb1j8xTgDQ6XKndKpUkfrBi7ObTGkmCbK21fO3vHokz6dcz5P8wkoUV7eYUXXYpmVUAcuJBd2DkDpMZsuuIioUHfopNWDGszRDN3FWdTiKIegAEYptfAeo4YxRgQjB9Qdud0mpLDyYI7C9N4Ea73WZ0A8SAvMCAzUSu2_CuV2wZge5Ya192Xtkru0dt2YfmFqYmqCs8943_ql7Jip6e20k48KN0xMTRnvvD0Dr_jzSxVXzG3jDb4pLxxjRN_4c18oK26NPKfcsGZoVDLsjq2V-mB6osD0q5RWqXG0pqsuXO-UEm2DZUYsK1B6dmz_fXZz6i8AAP__6kBulg). ## Canadian PM Trudeau Resigns
Embattled Canadian [Prime Minister Justin Trudeau](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd0RwwRAXFK9xl9duabFwndwIgwUkkf9-5e23mWY0R6PzdVtunhLl-3-_oetrWUDAyIXkwi7RUzoWPUS3IgKqAZ20yoDRkzbDw4nrNI1rHJUJAdQktREWRinXEOM1QBzInTQhhZWjnoS-BB2tDUp9e8RRWs-0wEi91MuzUO4PXNNR3lgvoWxDco_e98bUPwYzgzkfe2n9rBjMJ5jBLOQZhsH8KTVFnvHTGMzBZx_JZ75X2pBvlKl1rPz5ap0y7_UV0b94xUb3fA6G6uL-oZSoGcu0uG-e0u-L_peVt4OfAAAA__8gVGOW) announced his resignation as prime minister and leader of the Liberal Party on Monday, though he'll remain in office until the party selects a replacement. Trudeau became prime minister in 2015 and won re-election twice, but his party has seen a significant decline in voter popularity, [polling as low as 16%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OgzAQBOCnMZ2RvTY4FC6uocu1V6IFL2Ej8yPbCcrbn7j-mmlG-jSan_twR468Pb5xJV_mfQAFjVRaKjcE5PgZbBX8TARkKvLamRZa29m2WnyjjTLgRriNU6M1zl0gMN1tngOM0NqK_aUprZxubKdsPdng3GTMiESNdiisosBlT_Vz560sNMfP_qZUT_taRb-UcmRhvgT0AvrzPOtpG6erFNBftIBe6StaAf2EGwbM8ki8klx541woyecrF95kSa9A-JKJMj-2LDHLyCMljPLAVD4yEgZK9VLWWCUfjpNj5Nw6YdVjRY5_m8p_H709_AYAAP__JbhpaQ). His resignation leaves a successor with only a few months to prepare for an electoral campaign. The Liberal Party will hold [an emergency meeting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72O6yAUBOCngc4Wf4ZQUNzGXW67pXUMJ8mJsIkMjjdvv_L220wz0jear-t0Bcq03v_DgqHdyqSEGjohO-GmBJQ_k-Ep3BAVao5BOm2VNd5Y_gjy4qOXoOPshUkDejHbNMAlgpGzujhO4dSEFE4OxgvTR5Oci1rPgDhIB8wITNTK1j8Lre2Bt_wpb9z6WBaew6O1V2X6H1MjU-NxHD18U6lny9R42kyNQp5hmRqfe220dm3bE8LebVjpvtYuwgoJ-BbS66CcqVrHjLgvQPl3p_31-x3UTwAAAP__JMhY9Q) on Wednesday to discuss the next steps, but the party faces a surge in unpopularity due to economic and immigration issues. The Canadian Parliament will be "prorogued," or suspended, until March 24. Trudeau's departure and decline in popularity coincided with [polls indicating](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuhDAURL_GdEZ-YUPhIg3dpk2JLvZd1pGxkTGL-PuIFOnSzoxGR-frMT0gxJCWT1jR1meeBBMdZZwyM3kI8ZpU4-0TUaBs0HIjtdBqULp5WW16wfq5Z1oN3PF57lhvQEo3zGC6XjXB3m-MM8M7NTDVOuWNcVLOgNhxA0Qx9KHm0n7nkOoLn_HKbyyty2sT7avWbSfyg4iRiPE8z7bgUbHsd38nuURPxAgrluBgJ2J0kMAD3VZay-ERDgop5SM5pAX3sCSoISeKUOJF15w8XHSJeUa6Qoi04JZL3emfBU3E2BTrtzPEGHZtiGLLPf1FrP8pe1vxEwAA__8wSG7B) that his Liberal Party was likely to be defeated by the opposition Conservative Party in the upcoming election, expected by October.
## Feds Sign Record $1 Billion Nuclear Power Deal
The federal government awarded Constellation Energy [$1 billion in contracts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvrCAUhH8Ndhg4ouwWFNvY7Ste80qDcHR5QTBwXLP__sbb3Op2M5nMl8n8e05PG2JI6x-7oaElTyCg50JyoSdvQ_xMqvFmQQTsGjRSdwMM6q6G5mXmG6hF9vJ-k3624AG1UmgROmkXXPommIsmpNCyV3ehWqe81q7rZovYS22ZEugD5dL-zyHRC5f4yW8srctbE82LaK-sezAYGYznebZbTVfGYMTEj8pg3HMMFNwl16uaNkzEYHQ5VcIYLYWc-IpUueRziPGyIXGXExXrqHLKvB77Hj_8qPyHwdPhItrC93xiYTDawh8Pef6tN98U4_fzgtVBMyXWzYb4PZp-O_Ft4CsAAP__9ZN36Q) to supply nuclear power to 13 federal agencies over 10 years, marking its largest energy purchase. The deal will provide 10 million megawatt-hours to [80 federal facilities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtDAQg58mdEGZZCCiSPE3dPu3V6JZMkBOIVlBdhFvf8r1V1iyLOuT5a_H9KAQQ1r_086uLHnSSndSgVR28hTiPWHj3cKs2TTswJpe9zhg32yO9GA9ge2G_gmeAREGpKVTpIA66pvgKk2BstDhoLCd0Vs7G_Mk5g4sCVTsQ8lH-51DKhsv8c4fPto57010WymvU5h_Qo9Cj9d1tWXjDx8r14LQY8ULPUK1VWgMwlCj9J4j0yE58bHe0jNF-T7lWulp51TknNNZOEYqISe5ntQczr-uEGM4eytQrTuF-Luk_PXMx-mfAAAA__9152RR), including the Department of Transportation and Federal Reserve, starting April 25. The U.S. General Services Administration cites increasing power demands from data centers and AI facilities as motivation for securing fixed electricity costs. [Nuclear power stocks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3O4yAQRZ8Gd1j8xcQFRVaRu2yz0m5pYRjHJBgswEF--5XTf9VI946OdM-_x_jQzrvw_K1XUGWOIyPsggnFRI5WO3-MorFqBmDAG1BU8o51ohddsyjS6ytcBZ0ooWamwliQfW_nifSEiytpnDpphBJJL6InojXCSmk4nzTAhUqNBAHrSkztK7pQFpj9ET-QWhPXxqullC0jfkNsQGyotbZrDmeH2AAB7xmxYY0BjvPq9IZyJmE3HnTCuUTzzvi1rxt2AZcFcICKj7PTGU-79y4vWAftj1wyzgDfJ-3wFOOKt1ghufD8hhlMiQmxQSd8u9H6t94d4kM0ziJ-_3UahJr_QNqapOxW3QnvJBLkuWrnv4PKT4I_iv0PAAD__6dIgEo) surged following the announcement, with Constellation Energy rising 12% over two days.
## Winter Storm Turns Deadly
The first major winter storm of the year [impacted 62 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PozAYhH8NdEb-NhQurkmXa69EL_ZL8MnYke0FZX_9ijSpths9jzQazb_7fIcQQ3r8hR1tW_PMKVeEMkLN7CHE1yx7b1dEjqJHy4zQXMtJ6n6zRo0GtQI9ca2VGplYuQPGJjoC4iL7YK82yqhhSk5UDk56Y5wQCyAqZqCTFH1ouQz_c0htwzW-8oFlcHnvo91ae9ZO_On4reO38zyHtLiEZ738RRDahuVKITUs5ANiOJAsMT8-srZcdvIWX08PDSvZEI4XqSmfJDgkrcCBkWzwDcVXUlwCNmohpr5Y_zxDjKFq00n62CHE98j222mH5T8BAAD__47ecN8) people across the U.S., resulting in at least four deaths and leaving 300,000 without power, and causing 2,000 flight cancellations. The storm first [hit the West Coast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PozAYhH8NdEb-NhQurkmXa69EL_ZL8MnYke0FZX_9ijSpths9jzQazb_7fIcQQ3r8hR1tW_PMKVeEMkLN7CHE1yx7b1dEjqJHy4zQXMtJ6n6zRo0GtQI9ca2VGplYuQPGJjoC4iL7YK82yqhhSk5UDk56Y5wQCyAqZqCTFH1ouQz_c0htwzW-8oFlcHnvo91ae9ZO_On4reO38zyHtLiEZ738RRDahuVKITUs5ANiOJAsMT8-srZcdvIWX08PDSvZEI4XqSmfJDgkrcCBkWzwDcVXUlwCNmohpr5Y_zxDjKFq00n62CHE98j222mH5T8BAAD__47ecN8), where it spawned the first tornado of the year in California before extending eastward, dumping heavy snow and ice throughout the Plains, Midwest, and East Coast. Six states—Kansas, Missouri, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, and Delaware—have reported [over a foot of snow](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71urDAUhJ_G7rzyL-dSuLgN3aZNiYx9WE5kMDIOaN8-SiIlVaopRpr5vtf7eA-UaXu8hBV9m8uopXZCKiFhTIHyc7Q8-RlRo-HoFZhOd7a3HV-8Sn0EZxIonOd_DgClcpPsFThrI0RO_nNNKgnK2V7aW7QJIBozBUSnIDArMVEr9fZWaGsLzvlZTqy3WFae_dLafjDzn-mB6eHC0Jbvjulhw-v4jR_qTly0NaziaKWuYsqBqsh0onjfU2h48OrTflHOdHTArHysgfLXX_vL__T6IwAA__8AtFwB), with two locations in Kansas—Salina and Topeka, which received 18 inches.

Stay cozy, stay salty: Warm up your winter with today’s sponsor, | Canadian PM Trudeau Resigns Embattled Canadian announced his resignation as prime minister and leader of the Liberal Party on Monday, though he'll remain in office until the party selects a replacement. Trudeau became prime minister in 2015 and won re-election twice, but his party has seen a significant decline in voter popularity, . His resignation leaves a successor with only a few months to prepare for an electoral campaign. The Liberal Party will hold on Wednesday to discuss the next steps, but the party faces a surge in unpopularity due to economic and immigration issues. The Canadian Parliament will be "prorogued," or suspended, until March 24. Trudeau's departure and decline in popularity coincided with that his Liberal Party was likely to be defeated by the opposition Conservative Party in the upcoming election, expected by October. The U.S. General Services Administration cites increasing power demands from data centers and AI facilities as motivation for securing fixed electricity costs. surged following the announcement, with Constellation Energy rising 12% over two days. Winter Storm Turns Deadly The first major winter storm of the year people across the U.S., resulting in at least four deaths and leaving 300,000 without power, and causing 2,000 flight cancellations. The storm first , where it spawned the first tornado of the year in California before extending eastward, dumping heavy snow and ice throughout the Plains, Midwest, and East Coast. body:
I'm making you a promise.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100004605/521449748/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1790-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWM4ZWQxMC0wZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oJuu6g1S8D8Tm2uY7uI9YCGISlFM-Y_o-2PoOAe-meI=)
---
Peter, I'll level with you: I know you get a lot of political emails. You're tired of them. And frankly, so am I.
That's why heading into 2025, I'm making you a promise.

You're going to see fewer emails from me and my team and more substantive updates on the work my office is doing to fight for New Yorkers. But I want you to know that fewer emails mean each one we do send becomes that much more critical.

**Because as you know, every new year brings new challenges – and 2025 will be no exception.**
**That starts with our first public filing deadline of the year on January 11th** – meaning in just a few days, my fundraising numbers are going to go public, and the strength of this movement will be scrutinized by far-right extremists for any sign of weakness.

**And while I'm committed to not overcrowding your inbox, I really need fearless fighters like you to give what you can, whenever you can to reach critical public goals like this one.[ So please, will you give $5 or whatever you can spare right now toward my $25,000 January 11th public filing goal so I can tackle the challenges that lie ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100004606/521449749/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1790-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWM4ZWQxMC0wZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oJuu6g1S8D8Tm2uY7uI9YCGISlFM-Y_o-2PoOAe-meI=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100004607/521449750/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1790-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWM4ZWQxMC0wZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oJuu6g1S8D8Tm2uY7uI9YCGISlFM-Y_o-2PoOAe-meI=)
---
When I was sworn in as the first Black woman elected as New York AG, I made a promise to protect the voiceless and vulnerable, no matter what obstacles stood in my way. And in the years since, I've fought hard to make good on that promise. **But I'll be blunt, Peter: The challenges we face in 2025 are only going to get harder.**
**Increasing attacks on abortion, surges in corporate greed, and growing threats to our democracy are all waiting for us in the year ahead as the GOP settles back into power.**
And yes, while these new challenges won't be easy to overcome, the reality is that this is the same fight we've been powering through since the beginning.

I'm ready to fight back harder than ever before to ensure extremism doesn't take root in New York in the year ahead. **But with my plan to send fewer emails your way, I truly need each and every message to raise as much as possible to keep this movement going – ****and that includes Saturday’s public filing goal, where hitting my $25,000 goal is a must.**

clean_body: I'm making you a promise. | | | = Peter, I'll level with you: I know you get a lot of political emails. You're tired of them. And frankly, so am I. That's why heading into 2025, I'm making you a promise. You're going to see fewer emails from me and my team and more substantive updates on the work my office is doing to fight for New Yorkers. But I want you to know that fewer emails mean each one we do send becomes that much more critical. Because as you know, every new year brings new challenges – and 2025 will be no exception. That starts with our first public filing deadline of the year on January 11th – meaning in just a few days, my fundraising numbers are going to go public, and the strength of this movement will be scrutinized by far-right extremists for any sign of weakness. And while I'm committed to not overcrowding your inbox, I really need fearless fighters like you to give what you can, whenever you can to reach critical public goals like this one.= | | = When I was sworn in as the first Black woman elected as New York AG, I made a promise to protect the voiceless and vulnerable, no matter what obstacles stood in my way. And in the years since, I've fought hard to make good on that promise. But I'll be blunt, Peter: The challenges we face in 2025 are only going to get harder. Increasing attacks on abortion, surges in corporate greed, and growing threats to our democracy are all waiting for us in the year ahead as the GOP settles back into power. And yes, while these new challenges won't be easy to overcome, the reality is that this is the same fight we've been powering through since the beginning. I'm ready to fight back harder than ever before to ensure extremism doesn't take root in New York in the year ahead. But with my plan to send fewer emails your way, I truly need each and every message to raise as much as possible to keep this movement going – and that includes Saturday’s public filing goal, where hitting my $25,000 goal is a must. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for standing with me. – Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

January 7, 2025

**AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED**
Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to [ATX Pulse](https://substack.com/redirect/87ff1578-d5d3-4d46-a4b9-b83b4cd1af4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin?
