**» Read this morning's (free) edition **[here](https://substack.com/redirect/9992ec37-fd3f-40ac-a818-5b2cdc0b8898?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
>> SUBSCRIBE HERE: [ATXpulsepremium.com](https://substack.com/redirect/87ff1578-d5d3-4d46-a4b9-b83b4cd1af4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime)
* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**As battle cold sweeps through Texas, ERCOT says the power grid is stable,** " Texas Tribune's **Alejandra Martinez** -- "As an [arctic blast](https://substack.com/redirect/ad7d223a-48f6-4145-8346-971ee07883d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) settled over Texas on Monday, dropping temperatures into the low 20s in some areas, the state's grid operator said it's not expecting any power disruptions this week.

Meteorologists predict increased precipitation later this week, which is likely to bring icy conditions and snow to parts of the state: North Texas is likely to get 1 to 4 inches of snow, [according to one forecast](https://substack.com/redirect/9b2ea637-381f-4f87-9ac5-dcef5561e3c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while Central Texas could see ice.

The Electric Reliability Council of Texas has [issued a weather watch](https://substack.com/redirect/7d3fa311-88b7-4b62-9615-d10364ef1dc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) until Friday but has not requested that Texans reduce their power usage.

"At this time, grid conditions are expected to be normal, and there is no current expectation of an energy emergency," ERCOT said [in a written statement](https://substack.com/redirect/7d3fa311-88b7-4b62-9615-d10364ef1dc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), adding that it will continue to monitor weather conditions closely.

Energy supply is comfortably exceeding demand. As of Monday morning, the state's operating reserves -- or the energy that can be quickly deployed in the event of a sudden outage -- stand at 12,000 megawatts, far above the threshold of 2,500 megawatts when emergency measures would begin.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/77b0da4f-63fd-450b-aa95-1a3e0fde0ba5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The National Weather Service urged caution as wintry conditions are expected to persist through the week. Untreated roads could become slick with ice, especially Thursday and Friday, making travel treacherous. The Texas Division of Emergency Management [is recommending](https://substack.com/redirect/ea8ee4a6-f87a-4195-b5a3-8e3e38c0dafb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Texans stock up on groceries, check on neighbors, protect vulnerable pipes and plants, and stay informed as the cold snap continues.

This week's frigid temperatures come from a familiar culprit: the polar vortex. Typically confined to the Arctic region, the vortex is a band of strong winds that at times can weaken and move south, bringing extreme cold air to the U.S., as far south as Texas.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/77b0da4f-63fd-450b-aa95-1a3e0fde0ba5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This weather pattern is similar to what spawned Winter Storm Uri, a [February 2021 blast of arctic air](https://substack.com/redirect/10542fe8-bf65-4501-804b-833503baacff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that brought snow, ice and subfreezing temperatures to Texas and caused the near-collapse of the state grid. The storm triggered widespread power outages that left millions in the dark and cold for days, killed hundreds of people and brought sweeping changes to the state's grid operations." With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . » Read this morning's (free) edition . > SUBSCRIBE HERE: . ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "As battle cold sweeps through Texas, ERCOT says the power grid is stable, " Texas Tribune's Alejandra Martinez -- "As an settled over Texas on Monday, dropping temperatures into the low 20s in some areas, the state's grid operator said it's not expecting any power disruptions this week. Meteorologists predict increased precipitation later this week, which is likely to bring icy conditions and snow to parts of the state: North Texas is likely to get 1 to 4 inches of snow, , while Central Texas could see ice. The Electric Reliability Council of Texas has until Friday but has not requested that Texans reduce their power usage. "At this time, grid conditions are expected to be normal, and there is no current expectation of an energy emergency," ERCOT said , adding that it will continue to monitor weather conditions closely. Energy supply is comfortably exceeding demand. As of Monday morning, the state's operating reserves -- or the energy that can be quickly deployed in the event of a sudden outage -- stand at 12,000 megawatts, far above the threshold of 2,500 megawatts when emergency measures would begin. The National Weather Service urged caution as wintry conditions are expected to persist through the week. Untreated roads could become slick with ice, especially Thursday and Friday, making travel treacherous. The Texas Division of Emergency Management that Texans stock up on groceries, check on neighbors, protect vulnerable pipes and plants, and stay informed as the cold snap continues. This week's frigid temperatures come from a familiar culprit: the polar vortex. Typically confined to the Arctic region, the vortex is a band of strong winds that at times can weaken and move south, bringing extreme cold air to the U.S., as far south as Texas. This weather pattern is similar to what spawned Winter Storm Uri, a that brought snow, ice and subfreezing temperatures to Texas and caused the near-collapse of the state grid. The storm triggered widespread power outages that left millions in the dark and cold for days, killed hundreds of people and brought sweeping changes to the state's grid operations." * * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**As battle cold sweeps through Texas, ERCOT says the power grid is stable,** " Texas Tribune's **Alejandra Martinez** -- "As an [arctic blast](https://substack.com/redirect/c336af92-ba03-4648-bcfe-5c6a94d8ce8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) settled over Texas on Monday, dropping temperatures into the low 20s in some areas, the state's grid operator said it's not expecting any power disruptions this week.

Meteorologists predict increased precipitation later this week, which is likely to bring icy conditions and snow to parts of the state: North Texas is likely to get 1 to 4 inches of snow, [according to one forecast](https://substack.com/redirect/a5e81309-0f6c-44e9-b693-28df8f85e57d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while Central Texas could see ice.

The Electric Reliability Council of Texas has [issued a weather watch](https://substack.com/redirect/0db74b7b-3c5e-4560-954e-5caaab2e5f4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) until Friday but has not requested that Texans reduce their power usage.

"At this time, grid conditions are expected to be normal, and there is no current expectation of an energy emergency," ERCOT said [in a written statement](https://substack.com/redirect/0db74b7b-3c5e-4560-954e-5caaab2e5f4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), adding that it will continue to monitor weather conditions closely.

Energy supply is comfortably exceeding demand. As of Monday morning, the state's operating reserves -- or the energy that can be quickly deployed in the event of a sudden outage -- stand at 12,000 megawatts, far above the threshold of 2,500 megawatts when emergency measures would begin.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/a5523534-4cde-426b-92cf-646a47cd8340?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The National Weather Service urged caution as wintry conditions are expected to persist through the week. Untreated roads could become slick with ice, especially Thursday and Friday, making travel treacherous. The Texas Division of Emergency Management [is recommending](https://substack.com/redirect/4d9ead22-76c7-44df-99a8-802edc804b0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Texans stock up on groceries, check on neighbors, protect vulnerable pipes and plants, and stay informed as the cold snap continues.

This week's frigid temperatures come from a familiar culprit: the polar vortex. Typically confined to the Arctic region, the vortex is a band of strong winds that at times can weaken and move south, bringing extreme cold air to the U.S., as far south as Texas.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/a5523534-4cde-426b-92cf-646a47cd8340?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This weather pattern is similar to what spawned Winter Storm Uri, a [February 2021 blast of arctic air](https://substack.com/redirect/65f435da-9427-426f-85bb-5f65275adade?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that brought snow, ice and subfreezing temperatures to Texas and caused the near-collapse of the state grid. The storm triggered widespread power outages that left millions in the dark and cold for days, killed hundreds of people and brought sweeping changes to the state's grid operations." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/c75740d2-6509-406d-ae24-6515b78fbd76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "As battle cold sweeps through Texas, ERCOT says the power grid is stable, " Texas Tribune's Alejandra Martinez -- "As an settled over Texas on Monday, dropping temperatures into the low 20s in some areas, the state's grid operator said it's not expecting any power disruptions this week. Meteorologists predict increased precipitation later this week, which is likely to bring icy conditions and snow to parts of the state: North Texas is likely to get 1 to 4 inches of snow, , while Central Texas could see ice. The Electric Reliability Council of Texas has until Friday but has not requested that Texans reduce their power usage. "At this time, grid conditions are expected to be normal, and there is no current expectation of an energy emergency," ERCOT said , adding that it will continue to monitor weather conditions closely. Energy supply is comfortably exceeding demand. As of Monday morning, the state's operating reserves -- or the energy that can be quickly deployed in the event of a sudden outage -- stand at 12,000 megawatts, far above the threshold of 2,500 megawatts when emergency measures would begin. The National Weather Service urged caution as wintry conditions are expected to persist through the week. Untreated roads could become slick with ice, especially Thursday and Friday, making travel treacherous. The Texas Division of Emergency Management that Texans stock up on groceries, check on neighbors, protect vulnerable pipes and plants, and stay informed as the cold snap continues. This week's frigid temperatures come from a familiar culprit: the polar vortex. Typically confined to the Arctic region, the vortex is a band of strong winds that at times can weaken and move south, bringing extreme cold air to the U.S., as far south as Texas. This weather pattern is similar to what spawned Winter Storm Uri, a that brought snow, ice and subfreezing temperatures to Texas and caused the near-collapse of the state grid. The storm triggered widespread power outages that left millions in the dark and cold for days, killed hundreds of people and brought sweeping changes to the state's grid operations." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. * **TOP NEWS**

“**As battle cold sweeps through Texas, ERCOT says the power grid is stable,** ” Texas Tribune's **Alejandra Martinez** — “As an [arctic blast](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eLgP52KmpCiOYGubUgAoA1A9mR-NOZcUfyOYUJFSMbq6dQGdDpebep-QFhkIErjwlMA-oPVnv4q0dmvZOP54QuY8W1UGm5ekM7qK8cHCK5LnUNII8rSMXXNQFVtJE7wS5lqIo4YxxXmDDdq07E8EfA-BArdv2urm1dgO4Cv-LF1Xtqqu2Uqj5WNI75InIdb8rBiM50nTLcf1VFUxC-Sazx_7nuiB3tYtO9Q-i7Y1LQyGcbQe9O-YAevYQ2p2D8WFC2-uvwdMZ1cZ8MlF2XEBt3Q_a2g4N7n_lNqO6rxZF4ZSuvlEXLIiCgBWM8WDnGGLeoeeu6rA1Km5aso_JwGrSywQkXnXSYZ-zSdP1L06FnTxTDaa2DwpZOA_alIgjGxaME_SDfXLstPOPESJfROZNPIEICnHxSB_BpITkpShKfWrD0f-e_UvrHI2-dtosCcArJRfzX9yX1yfoRDrnoCuPO8xSq6C9JJxvR3T2v8ZVdOLZT-WqLzskXY5BUYlfUZO0EVhYAC9qcZbN3zNVDyxUwFzrxxEqb2xG7Sq1bKSaVrx/4cy/qH3G_UC6Tcuo6xuGYP9ozA/h10/h001.aPntw1OdIAUJnwfMJz_1HOOuzcevASSmJYzRI1rgysY) settled over Texas on Monday, dropping temperatures into the low 20s in some areas, the state’s grid operator said it’s not expecting any power disruptions this week.

Meteorologists predict increased precipitation later this week, which is likely to bring icy conditions and snow to parts of the state: North Texas is likely to get 1 to 4 inches of snow, [according to one forecast](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Tb7ejk-5QfVnOrZFvpt2rocEqAc7xbouvSw0p6HkDukNAzKDo1LasKEE0fvCSN6q3ea6No1ZywX2y9B_jNVbPWUIckT-S1CNW_Lp9oYIzi8le4eXQZi94LwuDjJh2BW12OIL_0g2MUyCjFkDP2dyjGfeI2ooh-QdVgfRSfyJ6VNu5HGuxKN9aAszJA9IdSIg_9mEjQU8CeKIkvT-1dM7I9BfcWrMveystkIzhjcXdCQPNb2mn7vdoo95BDxks0IBLsDMnFOXiMP2k0i7Npd46uy-AFLM2t-bL19LZeBJjGXzWqz378r2mZGK_x5njo4jIwMzFPfkZiXh2i4wkKX6LLX1l6hKvoHZbCmJ9kOktKfHrHa0dSqLuYrTH5uoH2RAGn3TP1xmAB5erTMJGdQnts4WA_ipDlHVBh0oA3fMd3K_eHy0qivdEY_aFsBc2co9bGmHbFwC6-hSRH7OfU3uKg/4cy/qH3G_UC6Tcuo6xuGYP9ozA/h11/h001.CLkSFJU7tYAHjZfq3nWgul4YJiLlnlbVpM6t8L76OQs), while Central Texas could see ice.

The Electric Reliability Council of Texas has [issued a weather watch](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eGIuojVBtfKcOXF-c7pCesl62qIz7ALF-yFpvywp0_61QuRXwpVLgTBOlO1talTGd0eT4jaUc1fKnoEhOupRNP9tMxfB-LnYlS_GxjC6Ohha1HwnBA1X4xfLLKKwchnyfBWf62JOzOn7c7PXUo9fjEzq_vHa9w5O1HWkKdqQjeSXcAvU89wcoHuJndV8H9_OWMI27ougm6laLEyIGTnF89jJDX0awAhUXlBXKsEeEVqKqucwxn3NgqmQK9SVhvvPlqcaL8qQ5OPXg826lXmdU1uQovvbs-L02Y7ORrScyoJvBe2dJL2K9rCK3cLTb0SdJXrYe4y3TthqromDJ2awn2MJ7lsXVfm6sF4PcO7Wkn5zeTbstLBVR3Su_yqRe9Ylo3LkI0vFM6yGicyjpW4zRKpWcv-qy5cB4J3N-kr_9JkU_akoNjgIr8mF2qr5Ksm8ow/4cy/qH3G_UC6Tcuo6xuGYP9ozA/h12/h001.kwaerQi6WbDA2MBjCwcfV-CDAUSpziPPK0E4RrbejYU) until Friday but has not requested that Texans reduce their power usage.

“At this time, grid conditions are expected to be normal, and there is no current expectation of an energy emergency,” ERCOT said [in a written statement](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eGIuojVBtfKcOXF-c7pCesl62qIz7ALF-yFpvywp0_61QuRXwpVLgTBOlO1talTGd0eT4jaUc1fKnoEhOupRNP9tMxfB-LnYlS_GxjC6Ohha1HwnBA1X4xfLLKKwchnyfBWf62JOzOn7c7PXUo9fjEzq_vHa9w5O1HWkKdqQjeSXcAvU89wcoHuJndV8H9_OWMI27ougm6laLEyIGTnF89jJDX0awAhUXlBXKsEeEVqKqucwxn3NgqmQK9SVhvvPlqcaL8qQ5OPXg826lXmdU1uQovvbs-L02Y7ORrScyoJvBe2dJL2K9rCK3cLTb0SdJXrYe4y3TthqromDJ2awn2MJ7lsXVfm6sF4PcO7Wkn5zeTbstLBVR3Su_yqRe9Ylo4ClOccji81Y39yyvg3ZVA6_HomZSB8KYqoNbTlTvRLuh1Wp-Bl-5NwWLRPP7CxtuQ/4cy/qH3G_UC6Tcuo6xuGYP9ozA/h13/h001.KR6XjjQaqJeW7l-8NDxL46IILVS0Z0ZkZjQNF2siS8I), adding that it will continue to monitor weather conditions closely.

Energy supply is comfortably exceeding demand. As of Monday morning, the state’s operating reserves — or the energy that can be quickly deployed in the event of a sudden outage — stand at 12,000 megawatts, far above the threshold of 2,500 megawatts when emergency measures would begin.

The National Weather Service urged caution as wintry conditions are expected to persist through the week. Untreated roads could become slick with ice, especially Thursday and Friday, making travel treacherous. The Texas Division of Emergency Management [is recommending](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Tb7ejk-5QfVnOrZFvpt2robN1CT_YPLGJ4vLwQRvWYNFErvLGmEJLvFPIFPF2M1N_eld81WmE6fWMNlGrUv_WjwDM5PqNDx_FrVTz6mXfhKO6TQoIxVXKiCBQCyVvYSMxzMs0lLe0Mw-LufeU5S4X3RLrMJqo_zrRmxb-XOXNYxNkIIDZNsYu3yjPNxC_V5Wr6fBQqzjlVi-v_w85HKzq49H-NLqpFhSxBqmLTX9fhvppnubJ2wSpz83Sx27Si4y-ZeD8zT8aRI7Kb4lOTKUuWy-OFwU3Yt4YPS2mIuY2f-kyRZnMljclhMe923JeQu8WxOd_CbtGNytPsB__Yfw9ecOAa9HpJ0sEO04hUFk3gxeEzLVOHsZpPb88UBT61vHtYMoJgJcLqd5yGKo_ItmjtODbVXAr08MjtUe2LkIoC0Cl4v7YpAprPvKCikBnLTC/4cy/qH3G_UC6Tcuo6xuGYP9ozA/h15/h001.fPrM1kiaU5gR2EQF5SI03nYQMxjxcEMbrlFc04zMTbs) that Texans stock up on groceries, check on neighbors, protect vulnerable pipes and plants, and stay informed as the cold snap continues.

This week’s frigid temperatures come from a familiar culprit: the polar vortex. Typically confined to the Arctic region, the vortex is a band of strong winds that at times can weaken and move south, bringing extreme cold air to the U.S., as far south as Texas.

With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed.” – Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) | AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . » Read this morning 's (free) edition . > SUBSCRIBE HERE: . ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) | TOP NEWS “As battle cold sweeps through Texas, ERCOT says the power grid is stable, ” Texas Tribune's Alejandra Martinez — “As an settled over Texas on Monday, dropping temperatures into the low 20s in some areas, the state’s grid operator said it’s not expecting any power disruptions this week. Meteorologists predict increased precipitation later this week, which is likely to bring icy conditions and snow to parts of the state: North Texas is likely to get 1 to 4 inches of snow, , while Central Texas could see ice. The Electric Reliability Council of Texas has until Friday but has not requested that Texans reduce their power usage. “At this time, grid conditions are expected to be normal, and there is no current expectation of an energy emergency,” ERCOT said , adding that it will continue to monitor weather conditions closely. Energy supply is comfortably exceeding demand. As of Monday morning, the state’s operating reserves — or the energy that can be quickly deployed in the event of a sudden outage — stand at 12,000 megawatts, far above the threshold of 2,500 megawatts when emergency measures would begin. » The National Weather Service urged caution as wintry conditions are expected to persist through the week. Untreated roads could become slick with ice, especially Thursday and Friday, making travel treacherous. The Texas Division of Emergency Management that Texans stock up on groceries, check on neighbors, protect vulnerable pipes and plants, and stay informed as the cold snap continues. This week’s frigid temperatures come from a familiar culprit: the polar vortex. Typically confined to the Arctic region, the vortex is a band of strong winds that at times can weaken and move south, bringing extreme cold air to the U.S., as far south as Texas. » This weather pattern is similar to what spawned Winter Storm Uri, a that brought snow, ice and subfreezing temperatures to Texas and caused the near-collapse of the state grid. The storm triggered widespread power outages that left millions in the dark and cold for days, killed hundreds of people and brought sweeping changes to the state’s grid operations." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. | | [](https://substack..HavWTbHLcDArDm9ESl4LnQHpskeC90GqyymyTkKScXQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/hospital-horror-virginia-nurse-abused?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This story is almost beyond comprehension. Erin Elizabeth Ann Strotman, a 26-year-old registered nurse, has been charged with breaking the bones of infants, who are disproportionately Black infants, in the Henrico Doctors Hospital NICU in Henrico County, Virginia. As of now, authorities are aware of at least seven babies she abused, with one baby suffering 12 fractures. The now active investigation may uncover more such cases of horrific abuse.
This is not a crime from some dark chapter of history. This is happening in 2025 America, and it is more common than most realize. **Let 's Address this.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cIHybwTicBsi5rNg2lrdpYZNAWEQnGNODgMC73q0Eo0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=154335687)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6fcabf6a-f8c7-43c0-8907-2506bd14c188?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Erin Elizabeth Ann Strotman, 26, of Chesterfield County, Virginia, has been charged with malicious wounding and child abuse. Photo: _Henrico County Police_
## The Background of the Abuse
The details are horrifying enough on their own, but what makes this story even more outrageous is how the hospital appears to have handled it. According to reports, Strotman was suspended with pay after initial suspicions of abuse--only to be brought back to work without consequence. When the abuse began once more, the authorities were notified. Now finally, Strotman has been charged, arrested, and denied a bond hearing--meaning she'll remain in custody until a court date in March.
But I'm writing about this horrifying case because it speaks to a broader issue.
Indeed, we must ask: Who else knew about this abuse and did nothing? And who allowed her to return to care for vulnerable children, without consequence? The hospital's role in this case raises troubling questions. Was this a case of gross incompetence, or was the hospital complicit in covering up harm done to Black infants? Either way, the system failed catastrophically.
My wife and I experienced this very hospital first hand. In 2013 my wife delivered our second child at Henrico hospital and we had a terrible experience dealing with the nurses and staff. At the time, I chalked it up to a one-off situation. But now? I cannot help but wonder if that experience was part of a broader, systemic issue within this hospital?
Regardless, the reality is that what happened in Henrico is not an isolated incident. It's part of a long-standing pattern of racial disparities in healthcare that puts Black and Indigenous children and mothers at greater risk of harm. And the data on that systemic harm is daunting.
## **Deadly Disparities in Maternal & Infant Healthcare**
We must recognize the brutal reality in this country: Black children are nearly three times more likely to die in infancy than white children. Black mothers are also nearly three times more likely to die from pregnancy-related complications than are white mothers. Indigenous children and mothers suffer a rate double that of white families.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/921b8de1-c9ce-4229-a7b3-60724b751bd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: March of Dimes
According to the March of Dimes, the average infant mortality rate between 2020 and 2022 was 10.6 deaths per 1,000 live births for Black infants, compared to 4.4 deaths for white infants. And 8.1 for Indigenous children. These disparities are not coincidental--they are the result of a healthcare system built on structural racism, implicit bias, and profit-driven policies that treat human lives as commodities. And they are even more pronounced in Neonatal Intensive Care Units (NICUs), where the most vulnerable infants, like those abused by Erin Strotman, receive care.
When a nurse in a NICU--a place meant to save lives--becomes the source of harm, it exposes a healthcare system that has lost its way.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cIHybwTicBsi5rNg2lrdpYZNAWEQnGNODgMC73q0Eo0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154335687)
## **For-Profit Healthcare Model Continues To Fails Us**
This is why we must confront the reality that healthcare in America is not designed to protect everyone equally. It's designed to maximize profit. It's no wonder The Lancet reports that our current exploitative for profit model results in at least 68,000 annual preventable deaths. That's one preventable death every 7.5 minutes--year round.
Under the influence of HELL Corporations, healthcare providers prioritize bottom lines over patient care. They cut corners, reduce staffing levels, and rely on flawed oversight mechanisms that fail to prevent tragedies like this. And when abuse or negligence happens, they often look the other way to protect their reputations and financial interests. It is no wonder that nurses nationwide are striking for better working conditions.
As I've written many times before, especially in the last few months, we desperately need a system that treats healthcare as a human right. A system that operates with high levels of regulation and accountability to prevent harm and protect the most vulnerable among us. Healthcare should never be about profit margins. It should be about saving lives.
## **What Actions Can We Take?**
First, if you have any information about what happened in Henrico, please contact the authorities:
* **Henrico Police Det. M. Lynch** : [police@henrico.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/e5f70042-79bb-4812-939e-ffca1b4e6580?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Crime Stoppers** : (804) 780-1000

Second, take it from a father of three, be vigilant in your own healthcare experiences.
* **Know your doctors and nurses**. Build relationships with the medical professionals who will care for you and your loved ones.
* **Ask questions**. Don't be afraid to demand transparency and accountability from healthcare providers.
* **Trust your instincts**. If something doesn't feel right, speak up. Your vigilance could save a life.

Finally, continue to speak up to your elected officials and demand they stop taking corporate money from HELL corporations, and start demanding guaranteed universal healthcare as a human right.
We must push for systemic changes to ensure this never happens again. That means advocating for universal healthcare, increased regulation to prevent abuse, and holding hospitals accountable when they fail their patients.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..cIHybwTicBsi5rNg2lrdpYZNAWEQnGNODgMC73q0Eo0?&gift=true)
## **Words of Accountability, Not Comfort**
Nurses have tough jobs. And the horrific acts of Erin Elizabeth Ann Strotman should not malign a noble profession. Similarly, it would be a grave mistake to dismiss what happened in Henrico as the act of one evil person. This is not just about holding Strotman accountable. It is about holding an entire system accountable--a system that allowed this abuse to happen in the first place. While this abuse may have been committed by one person, it was enabled by an entire system and administration that puts profit over people. This abuse is a symptom of a sick healthcare system that consistently undervalues human life for shareholder value--and it is not a system we can continue to tolerate.
I am hopeful that the families of these beautiful infants find some semblance of justice in the coming months and years. But until we as a society recognize the violence and racism embedded in our for profit healthcare policies and practices, and act to change these exploitative for profit models that help enable such abuse, we will continue to see stories like Strotman. Let us instead take action as mentioned above, and demand better.
For our children. For our families. For all of us.

Our records show you haven’t had a chance to get a member card before, and we’d love to change that this year. Here’s what we have on file for you:
_**Democratic National Committee 2025 Member Card Record**_
**Name:** Derek
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Previous Member Card Holder:** No! ❌
**Suggested Action:[Donate now to reserve your member card.**[

By getting your very own member card you’re sending a powerful message that you’re ready to build the strongest possible Democratic Party, invest in state parties all over the country, win key statewide races in states like New Jersey and Virginia this year, win back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. [**So we’re asking: Can you donate $3 today to reserve your member card and get it delivered to your door?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20250107_2489_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2506_22930333_y0SFdi&akid=2506%2E22930333%2Ey0SFdi) We’re ready to get to work and we hope you’ll join us. Thank you. The Democrats

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Hey Peter, just checking in…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
I wanted to catch you up on our BIG WINS!| | | [](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=33c118212d654f10b6d3b43f4c054b3b&_e=3iRk6u_ELD2U9GY33Q5eLeOHOyvnIUp2BmEBwDxQSu_oy23yKiJ4viGJzc4KK41aFsqh4XCTKLHD91dpckgSrh_2pwkXfmYaqxBcVElG4SwX7Rrfb-fbg_YkSEZ5dSKCHcsNqYQN2M4FN7O4r8KjDroMwhErByxLx3MEJlpELzmatNLG3xT-sp4NalpITlTyFWEIRpLpAre778pkECaqlmMsp2EJSk8PWbSHKRq4Kg1qEC_ma45ZArqad_pGlp5mEjNgkxd3YjAGSNjW8cSstBT672k6IU2hq5VdWHT_7rHdOp_-e0DZ_A9KrUzFVYCJM33uENuU1dZRF5YnAF21-HYGxKRWZ-1_F9i_KxDZuiA_uOntV8CMFjxam518q5XWOkA8JYOAqwtGj1JOvv4wjQ%3D%3D)

Peter, I know it’s been a little while since we’ve talked, but I wanted to check in and share all of the big wins we’ve had in Arkansas over the last few years! ✅ Banned indoctrination in our schools...✅ Cut income taxes THREE times... ✅ Passed Arkansas LEARNS - the most comprehensive education reform in generations, including universal school choice...✅ Stood up to Joe Biden at every turn and delivered the GOP response to his State of the Union... ✅ Locked up violent, repeat criminals...✅ And became the first governor to kick Communist China OUT of our state and off our farmland. **All of these successes have only been possible because of the support of patriots like you!** Although we’ve had big wins as we fight every day to defend our freedoms, **there is still a lot more to do.**
So, I’m asking that you **[**sign your name and become an active member of Team Sarah today**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=33c118212d654f10b6d3b43f4c054b3b&_e=3iRk6u_ELD2U9GY33Q5eLeOHOyvnIUp2BmEBwDxQSu_oy23yKiJ4viGJzc4KK41aFsqh4XCTKLHD91dpckgSrh_2pwkXfmYaqxBcVElG4SwX7Rrfb-fbg_YkSEZ5dSKCHcsNqYQN2M4FN7O4r8KjDroMwhErByxLx3MEJlpELzmatNLG3xT-sp4NalpITlTyFWEIRpLpAre778pkECaqlmMsp2EJSk8PWbSHKRq4Kg048RK6Yh9qnBGz_Pak-7faPyw2MATZugUnRQ2NVHnTP_Fxa9sIb1JDBP2H0atb7hkHLfVT1uSHrkkxBYRqJtmXkiZov_IqK0-Vw-3sY9zo2liv3huA6lWLrMAG3dC2y5ewjut1TNrZHIg8NfKkB0hEdwOE1Y9PnYBHIxsQ4T-TXA%3D%3D)** so we can keep up the fight.
---
[**JOIN TEAM SARAH TODAY**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=33c118212d654f10b6d3b43f4c054b3b&_e=3iRk6u_ELD2U9GY33Q5eLeOHOyvnIUp2BmEBwDxQSu_oy23yKiJ4viGJzc4KK41aFsqh4XCTKLHD91dpckgSrh_2pwkXfmYaqxBcVElG4SwX7Rrfb-fbg_YkSEZ5dSKCHcsNqYQN2M4FN7O4r8KjDroMwhErByxLx3MEJlpELzmatNLG3xT-sp4NalpITlTyFWEIRpLpAre778pkECaqlmMsp2EJSk8PWbSHKRq4Kg3MhHLgGp-MCVc7GVXNf6qFso6o5bEncBiKKdjkMJVNMTGe_DVzctnH90MmEuwxB0JpT-3gjxKeEjSpbJPNvEMebyBk6E-hKYwaL25XGGpJqv8sbArU5Rs6RFCoVWhBFhE8Yw7iLvBsYJYIpc1vfyi1DxPsLwCm4LQ6yR4Xpx9OYA%3D%3D)

As grassroots Republicans continue to express outrage over McCombie's "Woke Vote," filings reveal huge donations from a transgender health group.

IL GOP Leader McCombie Votes for ‘Woke’ Patient Bill, Accepts $47,500 from Far-Left Hospital Group Promoting Better Care for Transgender, Non-Binary Individuals (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/01/il-gop-leader-mccombie-votes-for-woke-patient-bill-accepts-47500-from-far-left-hospital-group-promoting-better-care-for-transgender-non-binary-individuals.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=af203c1358-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/01/il-gop-leader-mccombie-votes-for-woke-patient-bill-accepts-47500-from-far-left-hospital-group-promoting-better-care-for-transgender-non-binary-individuals.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=af203c1358-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(State Rep. Tony McCombie/website)
By Illinois Review

Illinois House Republican Minority Leader Tony McCombie is taking heat for her controversial vote in favor of a ‘woke’ bill in 2023 which went into effect on January 1, 2025, that mandates insurance coverage for certain exams – specifically, “cervical” exams for males and “prostate” exams for females – but leading up too, and after voting in favor of this bill, McCombie received an influx of campaign donations from a progressive hospital association that’s been advocating for improved care for transgender and non-binary patients.

The Illinois Health and Hospital Association, which has offices in Springfield, Chicago and Naperville, advocates on behalf of hospitals, patients and communities to “develop sound healthcare public policy solutions that will broaden healthcare access, make healthcare more affordable and improve the quality of care to all Illinoisans.” The association also focuses on Diversity, Equity and Inclusion initiatives – including improving patient care for transgender and non-binary individuals.

On September 11, 2023, months after HB2350 was approved by Gov. JB Pritzker, the hospital group hosted a gathering titled, “Sexual Orientation & Gender Identity Data Collection & Legal X Webinar,” where they discussed topics such as pronouns, how to appropriately address transgender and non-binary patients and sex assigned at birth versus gender identity. The webinar also discussed placing an “X” under “sex” if someone doesn’t identify as either male or female.

IR's publication of this article yesterday created another firestorm of activity on social media, with many conservative leaders weighing in on Leader McCombie's vote.

subject: I've got some incredible news to share with you

body:
I took the oath of office

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, it’s Troy. Have you heard the news? _**I’ve officially taken the oath of office!**_

I’m incredibly honored to serve my country in the U.S. House of Representatives, and I don’t take this task lightly. I’m here because of supporters like YOU who believed in me from the start, so I promise to fight for our shared values of faith, family, and freedom every step of the way.

[**As one of my most loyal supporters, I invite you to be among my first 100 donors as a member of Congress:**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._v2Pdg)
---
[ JOIN TROY'S 100 CLUB](https://trk.emails.troydowning._4m54w)
---
[ DONATE NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Your continued support will help me fight to secure our borders, strengthen national security, and prevent the radical Left from ever coming close to taking over our country again. [**Please do me the honor of becoming one of my first 100 supporters as a newly sworn-in Congressman today!**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-QRp789soW2p9yPygA)

Thank you for your unwavering support,
Troy Downing

I just turned 80, so you better believe I've seen a lotta crazy stuff go down in politics -- but I won't lie, last year's election had my stomach in more knots than a kitten's yarn. **Now it's more important than ever that we make a plan to stop Trump, flip the Senate, and keep pushing forward.**

I'm waiting with bated breath to see how this team responds -- **because if we don't get fired the hell up, the Senate could be putty in Trump's tiny hands for his entire presidency.**

We can't let that happen, and that's why I selected you to take my **brand new strategy survey****.** I need to hear firsthand from Democrats across the country -- not more pundits in DC!! -- so I can help my friends at the DSCC lead the charge against MAGA Republicans and win back the Senate.

**Will you calm my nerves by being one of the first to take my new survey and proving that we're not gonna back down to Trump's wackos?** [**www.dscc.org/StrategySurvey**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20961?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250107-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250107-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19295%2E9716520%2ErH2gIK)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, we have some bad news. Despite our efforts to raise $10,000 before midnight on the anniversary of the January 6 attack, we missed our goal by just $1,378. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: Now is the time to send a message to MAGA extremists that we’re not backing down. Trump’s win is a setback, but not a defeat. But it’s up to all of us to prove it. Here’s the good news: If everyone reading this email chips in just $3, we can reach our new goal of $15,000 before midnight tonight and cover the ground we lost. = = | | = | = We know it’s hard to have hope in times like these. But in 2026, we’re going to re-elect Sen. Jon Ossoff and a slate of Democratic champions up and down the ballot in the Peach State — whatever it takes. It’s up to every last one of us to build the coalition we need to secure key victories in the upcoming cycle. = | = | = — Georgia HQ | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. The Democratic Party of Georgia works year-round to elect Democrats who share our values of a strong middle class, integrity in government, and equality and justice for all Georgians. name: Team Swalwell
subject: Are you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Hey friend,

If you're reading this, it means you're one of our most committed defenders of democracy. And that's why I'm thrilled to introduce you to something we're calling Swalwell's Circle — a new way to take our fight to the next level.

This is Eric's inner circle of supporters, folks who are ready to step up and fight back against MAGA madness, election interference, and attacks on our rights. As a member of Swalwell's Circle, you'll be part of the action and receive exclusive benefits: direct updates from Eric himself, insider briefings, and, yes, some good old-fashioned trolling of our GOP friends.

Here's the deal: The entry-level is $50. By joining, you're saying, "I'm not here to sit on the sidelines while MAGA Republicans try to rewrite our country's future."

So, are you ready to take this fight all the way? Secure your spot in the Circle today and help us keep up the momentum against those who'd rather take us backward than fight for a better tomorrow. This isn't just a club; it's a movement. Welcome aboard.

— Team Swalwell

body:

| |
---
| Good morning Friend, We are excited to invite you to a special lunch event featuring **Pastor Joshua C. Robertson** , Senior Pastor of The Rock Church in Harrisburg, PA, and Founder of Black Pastors United for Education (BPUE). Pastor Robertson is a dedicated advocate for educational equity and youth empowerment. He will share his insights on the **impact of school choice and its necessity** in today's educational landscape.

Trump blasts ongoing 'lawfare' in 1st public remarks since Congress certified his election

President-elect Donald Trump railed against the ongoing "lawfare" against him during his first public remarks since Congress certified his decisive election win over Vice President Kamala Harris.

"It's called lawfare, it's called weaponization of justice," Trump said Tuesday during a press conference at Mar-a-Lago.

clean_body: Lt. Governor Aruna Miller here, team. I don’t take anyone’s support — including yours — for granted. Here’s why: I know that when you donate, you’re trusting me, Wes, and our team to get the job done — and that’s exactly what we’re going to do this legislative session. And with your support, we’ll deliver again. But when Maryland’s 447th legislative session starts tomorrow — my team legally can’t accept any donations until the session ends. We have to power our work now. So please, chip in to support our movement through this fundraising freeze: = Thank you, thank you, thank you Aruna Miller

name: Pat Herrity
subject: Tonight: First Test of the LG Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
In 2025, it is critical that Republicans hold our statewide elected offices and continue the legacy of commonsense, conservative leadership that Gover |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter,

Since announcing my campaign for Lieutenant Governor last Friday, I've been overwhelmed by the outpouring of support from across the Commonwealth.

This weekend I hit the campaign trail in Virginia Beach and Loudoun, and was thrilled by the enthusiastic reception from day one supporters, and volunteers already working hard gathering petitions for ballot access.

Everyone I've met is enthusiastic to continue Governor Youngkin's commonsense, conservative leadership in Richmond, and I'm thrilled at the opportunity to play a big role in continuing that legacy.

This week I'm headed to Richmond, the Shenandoah Valley, and out to Southwest Virginia to continue meeting with Republicans across the Commonwealth.

Just a few short days after announcing, my campaign is facing our first fundraising deadline of the year.

We're required to file a report disclosing contributions received prior to the beginning of the General Assembly Session in Richmond, which begins on January 8th. That means we need to disclose contributions received between my announcement on January 3rd, and the last pre-session day of January 7th.

It is **critical that we show a strong fundraising number** from these first couple of days, and a report that demonstrates **grassroots support from across the Commonwealth**.

Thankfully, a long-time friend and supporter has offered to match all contributions made before tonight, January 7th at midnight, up to $25,000.

Would you consider making a [contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 or even $250 to make double the impact](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=3c9359a7f1&e=a1ea0f9c99) and help us maximize this supporter's generous offer?

---
| [Contribute $10](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=cd9506ba81&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=fb8007ed91&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=6e7f1b932c&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=56a630171e&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute $250](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=c269983a39&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Contribute $250")
---
|
In 2025, it is critical that Republicans hold our statewide elected offices and continue the legacy of commonsense, conservative leadership that Governor Youngkin has brought to Richmond.

I'm glad to be a part of that fight, and I'm committed to seeing it through.

I'm deeply grateful for your support, and I look forward to having the opportunity to talk more with you over the coming months!

Thank you,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

|

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m no stranger to tough re-election campaigns and neither is Marie.

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39380%2E3422442%2EFYSvQG)
Derek,
I was proud to endorse and support Marie Gluesenkamp Perez in her re-election campaign this last November.
Marie is a parent, small business owner, and Member of Congress since 2023. She won re-election by just 3.8% in November, in a district she flipped blue in 2022.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250107-marie?refcode=em20250107-39380&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39380_3422442_FYSvQG&akid=39380%2E3422442%2EFYSvQG)
I’m no stranger to tough re-election campaigns. I know that early donations make the biggest difference, which is why I’m reaching out to you today.
In a competitive district like WA-03 we need to help Marie prepare early for her 2026 campaign because we know Republicans will do everything they can to oust her.
**[Will you split a $5 donation between Marie Gluesenkamp Perez and Truth to Power today? Marie rejects all corporate PAC contributions so your donation will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250107-marie?refcode=em20250107-39380&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39380_3422442_FYSvQG&akid=39380%2E3422442%2EFYSvQG)**

If we want to make a real, lasting change for working people, then we need to keep people like Marie in Congress.
Thank you. Your support means so much.
–Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250107-39380&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39380_3422442_FYSvQG&akid=39380%2E3422442%2EFYSvQG)**

name: David Hogg
subject: Time to get back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Friend, **It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next.** After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — **nothing would have changed.** Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times. This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either. Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge: We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads. Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom. We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature. We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House. Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them. Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with Serve America, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. [**Will you split a $20 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help us recruit, train, and elect the next generation of progressive champions?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100013926/521479294/-150563143?refcode=250107_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWU0MmFiNS0xZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VcKXQGdz_DhGIb_aQCz5cVMxyqdEFt7Pfj1cIwxLW2I=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100013927/521479295/-442632316?refcode=250107_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWU0MmFiNS0xZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VcKXQGdz_DhGIb_aQCz5cVMxyqdEFt7Pfj1cIwxLW2I=) Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either. Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with Serve America, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. [**Will you chip in $20 now, split between our organizations, to help us continue this vital work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100013928/521479296/-150563143?refcode=250107_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWU0MmFiNS0xZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VcKXQGdz_DhGIb_aQCz5cVMxyqdEFt7Pfj1cIwxLW2I=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100013929/521479297/-442632316?refcode=250107_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWU0MmFiNS0xZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VcKXQGdz_DhGIb_aQCz5cVMxyqdEFt7Pfj1cIwxLW2I=) In service, David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100013930/521479298/-150563143?refcode=250107_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWU0MmFiNS0xZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VcKXQGdz_DhGIb_aQCz5cVMxyqdEFt7Pfj1cIwxLW2I=)

body:
there’s plenty of work to do
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100014232/521480728/-1995327540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQxODgyNC0xZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soJN85PFVDdZGgifn0VIC7_WBO6tl8M_dWOQTuUZes0=&emci=a73e026a-0acd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=28d18824-1fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)

Hey everyone,
The team here at NextGen has been working hard to finalize our plans for 2025, and I’m excited about what’s ahead!
But for us to accomplish everything we have planned, we _**urgently**_ need your help. Pushing young voters forward can only happen if we have you standing with us. Are you in?
| [LET’S DO THIS →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100014233/521480729/-635441423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQxODgyNC0xZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soJN85PFVDdZGgifn0VIC7_WBO6tl8M_dWOQTuUZes0=&emci=a73e026a-0acd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=28d18824-1fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
---
_Here’s what’s on our checklist this year:_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100014234/521480730/-635441423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQxODgyNC0xZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soJN85PFVDdZGgifn0VIC7_WBO6tl8M_dWOQTuUZes0=&emci=a73e026a-0acd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=28d18824-1fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
[It’s a pretty ambitious list. But we’re confident that we can accomplish EVERYTHING with your help. Can we count on you to make a new year’s investment in the youth vote today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100014235/521480731/-635441423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQxODgyNC0xZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soJN85PFVDdZGgifn0VIC7_WBO6tl8M_dWOQTuUZes0=&emci=a73e026a-0acd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=28d18824-1fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
| [COUNT ME IN →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100014236/521480732/-635441423?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQxODgyNC0xZmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=soJN85PFVDdZGgifn0VIC7_WBO6tl8M_dWOQTuUZes0=&emci=a73e026a-0acd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=28d18824-1fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
---
I won’t sugarcoat it: Crossing off everything on this list will be a lot of work.
With just days left until Trump assumes office, I know that the next four years won’t be easy for any of us. The authors of Project 2025 were very clear about the direction they want to take us in. And it won’t take long for Trump and his cabinet of billionaires to try dismantling our democracy piece by piece.
But I also know that young voters nationwide will not sit idly by and let that happen without a fight.
Our plan is to give them the tools and knowledge they need to fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda.
**But to do that, we’re going to need your help.**

clean_body: there’s plenty of work to do | Hey everyone, The team here at NextGen has been working hard to finalize our plans for 2025, and I’m excited about what’s ahead! But for us to accomplish everything we have planned, we urgently need your help. Pushing young voters forward can only happen if we have you standing with us. Are you in? | Here’s what’s on our checklist this year: | I won’t sugarcoat it: Crossing off everything on this list will be a lot of work. With just days left until Trump assumes office, I know that the next four years won’t be easy for any of us. The authors of Project 2025 were very clear about the direction they want to take us in. And it won’t take long for Trump and his cabinet of billionaires to try dismantling our democracy piece by piece. But I also know that young voters nationwide will not sit idly by and let that happen without a fight. Our plan is to give them the tools and knowledge they need to fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda. But to do that, we’re going to need your help. | | | | | | Thank you for all your support, Tzintzún Ramirez President & Executive Director NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

Peter, Republican Speaker Mike Johnson survived a dramatic vote once again and will serve another term as the Speaker of the House. I joined _CNN’s_ State of the Union on Sunday to discuss House Republicans’ plans with Jake Tapper. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100014919/521483557/1689315168?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWEwYmE1Zi0yMWNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnPbampFjW1U3dQYIA0_eaKN0n7VyogS_yhah5Th6cY=) We know their playbook — Republicans are looking to enact an extreme, right-wing agenda that will target immigrants, individuals protected by DACA, and mixed-status families across the U.S. Here in Arizona, we know the reality of the crisis at our border — but we can create a stronger legal pathway to citizenship that is just, humane, and respects the dignity of those seeking to build a life in the U.S. [**I’m fighting for comprehensive immigration reform that respects the dignity of immigrants and refugees while also keeping our border safe and secure. I'm ready to work across the aisle to pass meaningful, comprehensive immigration reform while also fighting to respect the rights and dignity of immigrants. We need to focus on securing our border without spreading lies, misinformation, and making xenophobic attacks that put peoples’ lives at risk.
A nation with a safe border and a strong and efficient immigration process is possible, but it’ll take hard work to get there.
Thanks for all you do, Peter.
— Yassamin Ansari

clean_body: | Peter, Republican Speaker Mike Johnson survived a dramatic vote once again and will serve another term as the Speaker of the House. I joined CNN’s State of the Union on Sunday to discuss House Republicans’ plans with Jake Tapper. = We know their playbook — Republicans are looking to enact an extreme, right-wing agenda that will target immigrants, individuals protected by DACA, and mixed-status families across the U.S. Here in Arizona, we know the reality of the crisis at our border — but we can create a stronger legal pathway to citizenship that is just, humane, and respects the dignity of those seeking to build a life in the U.S. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I'm ready to work across the aisle to pass meaningful, comprehensive immigration reform while also fighting to respect the rights and dignity of immigrants. We need to focus on securing our border without spreading lies, misinformation, and making xenophobic attacks that put peoples’ lives at risk. A nation with a safe border and a strong and efficient immigration process is possible, but it’ll take hard work to get there. Thanks for all you do, Peter. — Yassamin Ansari Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ad26431d6bc454f9ebdf72ca869fb9e&_e=es8o1Z0ch_mXo9JvGIRS-45Njlan1syqZxlE6Yu05eU_MEuQAB2QXzU0f3d_ZoqNvwPslZDIFyo-A7QR4IIHb9E0xUIaEDthkFErg61mfbLDJ5CowmBQLmQta3Us3kQ51ce1fh-iGEwC3R5OBAa-kiv-SJxxLJv0EdEAaeLo5WvT3fBvco_dSG5X9m-rJbZamFB5SF2Zd5TIjX79hRzyh9-MPCMwzuEjUHrKU2Bl3ChZwn4krUoUo5NyjzmVdVVmHDi515BEJoDAv8W4SasLERbjciGr31TMO6KerMQyl8eYmoSHOBx0llH2NPCLoCcL2rvnR9GwyAuuAc0aIuQst9wWAQk-6cbdJ40uYyQwrkMD-rCkDbSmtjR_Ntbmv_B2MWv-dP3Luab3JXiDazchtjR-JiA4MKatrKzWTVaNpkVeEaBm3kbZUzdoHA7bfZ6wFHzf-Bh1ubraXKLOYyaVqA%3D%3D "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.

body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=099ccd9289974d24ab1aba3d052f6c07&_t=-BWH328c_xGGyUsLhPchJM5ZOxxsQ0PQw770URzDSViSCw-LdIx6oX3uKs9ciGV9b90P3AbdUgc0owmayu5GyS6fGQXG34IOlfCKbnFSes-I8Vr2JsUKLgyL-OtVw7_M)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=099ccd9289974d24ab1aba3d052f6c07&_e=5i2-YizfCL4Appx8iAOyeFa1Zl5OXy5NfkLOWov9mXsOQJGb_KsjhPZR_8BOs7ML4GO8oluvsLfEYtm2yEUyoAnT6pni18vBZoXJHLCQzHxx74O5UHZ00x1BscxQgUF9DOs5cZusrWgjEJHZ-7PR6VNPuoqQDFK-61H3leGJigMRDtKlIL_DFeEc8abdu6QRXsTx1tHmLBS61BQFqE8nkWwAUc6wygcQzOGnxmCqjxIIvAibXgL4Gkr0LGCL8KnLkfWbi4e-O25tRLXYzYTvJLZkXUxeDec99iGvo8n3jllLaEf0cx7RSTlQGgNVALXVn1bRNmhObXziQQAkV-xyOm0LCuQd2JUrwjnanjuq9249UJgxSd_xJVUU9fGFqxYwiIRFMNm5W8n4rNqgfoEPXQ%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=099ccd9289974d24ab1aba3d052f6c07&_e=5i2-YizfCL4Appx8iAOyeFa1Zl5OXy5NfkLOWov9mXsOQJGb_KsjhPZR_8BOs7ML4GO8oluvsLfEYtm2yEUyoAnT6pni18vBZoXJHLCQzHxx74O5UHZ00x1BscxQgUF9DOs5cZusrWgjEJHZ-7PR6VNPuoqQDFK-61H3leGJigMRDtKlIL_DFeEc8abdu6QRXsTx1tHmLBS61BQFqE8nkWwAUc6wygcQzOGnxmCqjxIIvAibXgL4Gkr0LGCL8KnL21CIdDFmQKDSTT1qtBRxspkQN88Z_TOYIAA8b8YsX7J0IKZS8OJ9F8Bz4oskH76cMs60hW4mZaEcR7cn0r9I5HFjbrNMpD-ZvjYFHdr8z7Ie4bsg23KhQKkoNzUiCI5Imnf5TIoCLKXdUj8wW69SFQ%3D%3D)

The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty.

Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=099ccd9289974d24ab1aba3d052f6c07&_e=5i2-YizfCL4Appx8iAOyeFa1Zl5OXy5NfkLOWov9mXsOQJGb_KsjhPZR_8BOs7ML4GO8oluvsLfEYtm2yEUyoAnT6pni18vBZoXJHLCQzHxx74O5UHZ00x1BscxQgUF9DOs5cZusrWgjEJHZ-7PR6VNPuoqQDFK-61H3leGJigMRDtKlIL_DFeEc8abdu6QRXsTx1tHmLBS61BQFqE8nkWwAUc6wygcQzOGnxmCqjxIIvAibXgL4Gkr0LGCL8KnL40B8VSk95XHzQbkaHPCWHkv329vxcLk0-w0UdSylQ1jPFVLh4EjSqXOYd6ZBxRglbsClwDcn8E-jTQyS96GovEYZAMQEnwdin3UL0gm6YuVa5k_ZkTtD35TRJIHyRgF8aBfBjsh8sDDni7rEd6knCQ%3D%3D)

Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."**

Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion."

These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties.

You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course.

**The first step is ...EDUCATION.**

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.**

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=099ccd9289974d24ab1aba3d052f6c07&_e=5i2-YizfCL4Appx8iAOyeFa1Zl5OXy5NfkLOWov9mXsOQJGb_KsjhPZR_8BOs7ML4GO8oluvsLfEYtm2yEUyoAnT6pni18vBZoXJHLCQzHxx74O5UHZ00x1BscxQgUF9DOs5cZusrWgjEJHZ-7PR6VNPuoqQDFK-61H3leGJigMRDtKlIL_DFeEc8abdu6QRXsTx1tHmLBS61BQFqE8nkWwAUc6wygcQzOGnxmCqjxIIvAibXgL4Gkr0LGCL8KnLBHNOONWQKDpwqTf1VsvIYgn0gS6JAN9mfo7hIaPfQ5O5sVDQni2a3QWB8gntTpPqLZ8Ba-lr8qL6-y6w3kXmVXP6SrSx2QwMUhD1w77vKzi11fuNd8b-HthjYL_H97G70W8NIxhiQyIUlOVPgTSgGw%3D%3D)

Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| Dear Friends,
To everyone's surprise, the Healey-Driscoll Administration finally broke their silence on the migrant crisis last night.
But, to no one's surprise, their solution is throwing an additional $425,000,000 at the problem.
Massachusetts Republicans stand strong in our call to amend the Right to Shelter Law residency requirements.
Throwing money at our problems is no solution at all.

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1dd4fb0f07d54245b9b4fed181fd63ed&_e=Hv0JpoFVOe1kIPr_k1RLCOU6Uvk53AmF17ky01OHf0cnDg6CMx_izhm0W8YoYsrSP9s4Nsr98nY9_4j8e7aXP7yRFGCNotWK_JTDNAonFMtsMmJJmJQX1gLrbmU0VkBp4lLzzx3GxzfOc32K4pWNorjLWLuNjAMa6z9FUUzy2xOMtzmB9A3rChqxiULakSTBFULeGcTm1gtDoNy1DSmSw8Pqzuu3-cX3S1epPq2SS2X2fVBlN36lJ-PA_UIQWOQMd16Y2lkD2K1xk7UdycMtGDUNMqRcoBgIz-36xBoXs36Pdj2bdyareEiEEiHdqgMEwhQ1aXtz-aMSzO3i6nDV8OkyQoOQOrjsWQrWJ3aGSZ0hq5U0MuY8fnivrBiEY_AMiDPQVLP_tX0Iu4-5PTgBvg%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Re: Peter, will you join our Town Hall Team?
body:
| | | Hi Peter, Happy new year! We’re getting into the swing of things, and starting off the new year strong with the 2025 legislative session on the horizon. **Right now is the perfect time to become a superstar climate activist by joining our Town Hall Team!** With OLCV’s Town Hall Team, you will join a team of activists who will attend local town halls with your lawmakers to make sure that they are following through on their mandate to act on climate. We’ll provide you with resources and support to help you prepare and know what to expect for each town hall. There’s no better way to start out the new year than by using your voice and joining in the fight for our climate. [**Join our town hall team by clicking here and our organizers will be in touch with you shortly!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100016000/521486769/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MWMzODYxLTIyY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8BSjAOD2y3H2z-KjFHMRgnQhOLJ1niWLkLYlA-6WF4w=&emci=4982baf9-88cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c71c3861-22cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
[Join our town hall team!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100016001/521486770/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MWMzODYxLTIyY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8BSjAOD2y3H2z-KjFHMRgnQhOLJ1niWLkLYlA-6WF4w=&emci=4982baf9-88cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c71c3861-22cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)

Britney VanCittersOLCV Political & Organizing Director

---
| | **Dear Peter, the countdown to the 2025 legislative session has begun!**
---
This session will be the first with the newly elected supermajorities in the State House and Senate. These supermajorities provide Democrats with a mandate to take action to protect our clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate, but **it’s up to us to make sure that they follow through**. There’s so much at stake this session, and we can’t afford to let anything slide. [**So, are you ready to be one of OLCV’s superstar activists standing up for our climate and environment this year?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100016003/521486772/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MWMzODYxLTIyY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8BSjAOD2y3H2z-KjFHMRgnQhOLJ1niWLkLYlA-6WF4w=&emci=4982baf9-88cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c71c3861-22cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230) OLCV’s Town Hall Teams will help you do just that! Depending on your location across the state, OLCV is organizing teams specific to your area. We’ll help equip and encourage you on your activist journey, as you defend our climate and make your voice heard at town halls in your district.
[**You can become a climate activist this year by signing up to join our Town Hall Team!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100016004/521486773/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MWMzODYxLTIyY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8BSjAOD2y3H2z-KjFHMRgnQhOLJ1niWLkLYlA-6WF4w=&emci=4982baf9-88cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c71c3861-22cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)**** Once you’ve signed up, our organizers will reach out to you with more information. They will provide you with your town hall toolkit (full of tips, talking points, and what to expect), more information on upcoming town halls, and how to best prepare. These town halls will be hosted by your state lawmakers and close to home, making it easy to join and take action!
---
[Sign up here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100016005/521486774/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MWMzODYxLTIyY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8BSjAOD2y3H2z-KjFHMRgnQhOLJ1niWLkLYlA-6WF4w=&emci=4982baf9-88cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c71c3861-22cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
Advocating for our climate and environment is one of the most urgent issues of our time. There’s no denying that the future of our home is at stake if we don’t continue to make progress on climate. One of the most impactful things any of us can do in this fight is use our voice and speak to those in power about climate action. It reminds lawmakers of their duty and responsibility to all of us.
[**Join our town hall team by clicking here and our organizers will be in touch with you shortly!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100016006/521486775/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MWMzODYxLTIyY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8BSjAOD2y3H2z-KjFHMRgnQhOLJ1niWLkLYlA-6WF4w=&emci=4982baf9-88cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c71c3861-22cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)****
---
[Join our team](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100016007/521486776/-1911642854?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MWMzODYxLTIyY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8BSjAOD2y3H2z-KjFHMRgnQhOLJ1niWLkLYlA-6WF4w=&emci=4982baf9-88cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=c71c3861-22cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
I hope you’ll sign up to make your voice heard. **Our voices will make a big difference going into 2025 and beyond!** Thank you for your support of this fight.
Together,
---
---
Britney VanCittersOLCV Political & Organizing Director
---
