This session will be the first with the newly elected supermajorities in the State House and Senate. These supermajorities provide Democrats with a mandate to take action to protect our clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate, but it’s up to us to make sure that they follow through. There’s so much at stake this session, and we can’t afford to let anything slide. OLCV’s Town Hall Teams will help you do just that! Depending on your location across the state, OLCV is organizing teams specific to your area. We’ll help equip and encourage you on your activist journey, as you defend our climate and make your voice heard at town halls in your district. ** Once you’ve signed up, our organizers will reach out to you with more information. They will provide you with your town hall toolkit (full of tips, talking points, and what to expect), more information on upcoming town halls, and how to best prepare. These town halls will be hosted by your state lawmakers and close to home, making it easy to join and take action! Advocating for our climate and environment is one of the most urgent issues of our time. There’s no denying that the future of our home is at stake if we don’t continue to make progress on climate. One of the most impactful things any of us can do in this fight is use our voice and speak to those in power about climate action. It reminds lawmakers of their duty and responsibility to all of us. I hope you’ll sign up to make your voice heard. Our voices will make a big difference going into 2025 and beyond!** Thank you for your support of this fight. Together, Britney VanCittersOLCV Political & Organizing Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

| |
---
| | | I love President Trump - I'm humbled to have earned his endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State - I'm honored to serve as Florida's CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. **I 'm Trump's guy running in the Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat in Congress.**

Early voting is about to begin here so I won't beat around the bush with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN margin. I'm the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I can't fill Matt Gaetz's seat without some more help.

**_[That's why I'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 - before my all-important Special Election - to help win key races like this.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a16cce868e724a30ac4799b91f8e03f2&_e=rPXsm91Itw_8y41HlihLCbwZxaIuzdBQbE69TKS-bpDO4VGnn44r_CnUJ4v5R912NBtkGtKgv1y_rX7H5fbdz3XYuVgkDo9KWT7GEt2-8cWFu_tC1r_iM5Yh85Xod_5wKOJyLeHWkT1-1BZwVYhRDUptiaraDwi5ibI4jv40kscDjyMYp13nHwyB4JZob70eEq3Z4BYQAAMvv-CdeybspPvQVaqfXSdzK-fJSkFhICj1KbZhYhO7ufohn1joLDLoikt8bv88uJhxT-irUwqGCRJXF1Gtx8MkidBaLDZMbQyj_7Z8oF25Gg_V0JQrv0zwOlOm_CSEamSFL1eyN0DBYPiwOD2RdXYjjuy-Ebg-ByHt-sIULBBxSNzZHL4S0awX0FsbC-IzogqmqxSPsnSDcbpmBzu5M2EnEWozE3TGIKHKjnXsWERViLibbOnroUEckuFP90g8qTzHZLjBSXuHUQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $50,000 – before my all-important Special Election – to help win key races like this.")_**

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _

Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an America First Conservative.

It's a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump's agenda ASAP.

**But that means EVERY SECOND counts between now and the Primary in a few short weeks.**

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that's what you want too, I believe I'm the right man for the job.

I'd be honored to have your support right now.

To victory,
_- Jimmy_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100016244/521487824/-1002854418?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTczNzA1Mi0yM2NkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WILZdqDana_i7BjzIz3j3VItxuCiQL3JsxOVO0KjIkk=) Hi Peter, I wanted to take a moment to extend my warmest wishes to you and your loved ones for a safe, happy, and prosperous new year. Words cannot express the gratitude I hold for this team. With the incoming Trump administration, it’s important that Fair Shot PAC is equipped to uplift candidates who are invested in leading our country to a brighter future. Thanks to you, we can continue working toward that reality. We’re finalizing our strategy for 2025, and I want to hear from you, Peter. name: MassGOP
subject: Governor Healey’s Inspection Call Is Too Little, Too Late, Masking Years of Neglect on Migrant Housing Crisis
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B3bEm-1bXf1s_pzmtGxT2NH-Ww_GDVBG_6oA6Rr3Y9ceS4LNuKCG1-JDxynJJHvlBnyGUUvK2fPK0Ct6cXZJJavHijayTtfbt8UsaZ9hsAn27TmtN4LbuI76oCmhfSZO45DePxSRgjs6zqxwt6eTOg==&c=uFiwKunw45pJ5GvPMpru-PdaIAp_2vd5DasvP0GL6xzp1xb_GMjWqw==&ch=qsJpMeaGrsGi350Xy2ZPJLHFSLSmeeDEoojFvsgUGJaTSbGPW9YQoA==)
---
| Governor Healey's Inspection Call Is Too Little, Too Late, Masking Years of Neglect on Migrant Housing Crisis
---
---
| Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party (MassGOP) today condemned the Healey-Driscoll Administration for its failure to address the widespread violence and chaos in taxpayer-funded migrant shelters. Recently obtained information through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request, by the MassGOP, reveals that incidents of physical and sexual assault in emergency housing have been rampant since 2022, yet Governor Healey and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll have remained silent until a high-profile incident forced their hand.
One incident in the report closely resembled the recent arrest of an illegal immigrant found in possession of an AR-15 and nearly five kilograms of fentanyl. When this information became public, Governor Healey expressed shock and outrage in her response. However, her reaction rings hollow, as a similar incident occurred in February 2024 but was never disclosed to the public. In that case, a migrant was arrested with 900 pills, 30 grams of cocaine, and ammunition in an apartment within a migrant shelter. These incidents have been occurring for years, but the Healey-Driscoll administration has successfully kept them hidden--until now.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale blasted the administration's call for inspections as nothing more than a political show, emphasizing that the administration has long been aware of the dire conditions within these shelters.
"I can't stress enough that what's happening in these migrant shelters is worse than anyone could ever imagine, and it's been going on unabated for years," said Carnevale. "The Healey-Driscoll Administration has overseen a state-funded humanitarian crisis, funded entirely by taxpayers, and now they want even more money to sustain this broken system. Inspections might uncover more horrors, but they don't solve the root problem: Massachusetts' overly generous Right-to-Shelter law, which has become a magnet for migrants and illegal immigrants worldwide."
Chair Carnevale pointed out the dire need for reform, proposing at least a six-month residency requirement for access to the Right-to-Shelter program. "This program was designed to help Massachusetts families who have fallen on hard times--not to provide housing for individuals traveling from across the globe to take advantage of our system. If we don't act now, this humanitarian disaster will worsen, crime will rise, and our state will run out of funding for critical services for our seniors, veterans, local aid and other important programs."
The FOIA documents expose a grim reality that has been hidden from the public: crime, systemic violence, including sexual assaults, within state-funded shelters. Despite knowing the severity of the situation, the Healey-Driscoll Administration failed to act, only stepping forward now that the issue has become impossible to ignore.
"Massachusetts taxpayers are footing the bill for a crisis fueled by failed leadership and reckless policies," added Carnevale. "It's time to take meaningful action--not political stunts. The administration must prioritize the safety of Massachusetts families and restore accountability to our citizens before it's too late."
The MassGOP vows to continue exposing the failures of the Healey-Driscoll Administration and fighting for reforms that prioritize the well-being of Massachusetts residents.
###
---

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: In 2025 and beyond, we’re not stopping
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=QbbjGwyQA7u4G%2FeUKvqZVt1cMGddWT%2FoNcHIh68o%2Fjx6C5hI9OZgmH3a21fh9FWmqDpgRMM37Na%2F%2BaZorUGuWEz0LScvMyadTOlIAvePdCkFhnz98hFJv2J03g2%2F%2BHQ7XsYMp5i4L0Biqme8UmP%2FCPE3iKbLeOlSDGwRs3nwVxQUJoegzba20mN3kSkwwjQPuBYmpo%2BaQrxFsmHbkTrOIAHA1N5adAET7Zqcc9ElE6%2BuhUpWPs6wyj4Wf9W0wt6j946A4ePlqL8SwGU4oqBK69NbQfChH%2F%2FJQGkHKqkwUxzoPV6FRrNWpixZ3A74hrsIfABJ0N5e1neHtDGeJdXTCZHaKPdHNJZV3Q6CUrv73XN3IJ%2BtVDRC%2F5XrPYl4aAf9WcVIGdYBvX%2BEkxu0K%2FBI%2Fzktzq6qWhUvxNNcytmH7so%3D]

# [#]
Hi Peter,

In 2024, 2,419 of you donated to our efforts. Those donations helped support our canvassing efforts and get-out-the-vote campaigns boosting Texas progressives up and down the ballot.

Like so many, we felt the weight of this past presidential election in our state. If there’s one thing we’ve learned from 2024, it’s that progress is neither linear nor quick—it’s a marathon, not a sprint.

So in 2025 and beyond, we’re not stopping. We’ll keep building power to help elect progressives who will protect reproductive freedom, fight for immigrants’ rights, and advance the priorities of our most vulnerable communities.

But it’s going to take a strong coalition of grassroots donors to help elect those progressives, and building that coalition starts today.

So Peter, if you want to be a part of the change to make Texas a better place for all of us regardless of race, income, gender, preferred language, or ZIP Code, will you become a 2025 Founding Donor today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25]

Become a founding donor » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25]

The work we do NOW, informs our tomorrow. That’s why we hope you’ll join us by becoming a 2025 Founding Donor. Even just a $5 or $10 donation counts!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

DONATE $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25?amount=&express_lane=true] DONATE $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25?amount=&express_lane=true]

Texas Organizing Project PAC

body:
|
#
Team, The new Congress just began, and Tina and our team are preparing for the hard work ahead of us. Tina is ready to defend Social Security and Medicare from cuts, expand housing supply, lower prescription drug costs, protect reproduction freedoms, and so much more. _That’s just the tip of the iceberg of her priorities!_ **We have a lot to do this year — including defending our rights and freedoms from the Trump Administration.** Tina wants to hear directly from you. subject: URGENT: Trump issues new directive on his nominees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

ATTN: Friend,

This should outrage you...

_**[Senate Democrats are already plotting ways to undermine President Trump and his nominees before he's even been inaugurated!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f394f95251c465ab2c85073ca00c121&_e=BRfWT5VmslwNZN51mX7gzcUK69x8QY6UBuoecrFLCKzqzUrSfKdzCeIB7kGxQtrxHJVdc7biCxqbGPn85sjKAukpRXNfBjXHE6aMDNIWmTK9zjLh5_nMsE1cMCkRqhlkQlh4mNP-2M9BkVL1uY8rMfeUkdgTP2KwmvIdVHl-O1uZ7T2I52dUzi3c6RFnC1R_rmoi1SM-LCpsC8Xy0K2LXSt4VTJXBTYw881kdC6HfrUzIe6KbSeu5-_orCk3Z9DRoRQs-J6aVEDTLvJo0iubr9NDRwaTBg78tMDvxbFSneaj7Ycgvtz5YoRkyyeYgDmvAJVkN6ViANmRqqDCEOfdD6LXTd6c_pDsPEW8hoebxuU0BVauk-VdpG3r34lrexMxYkJTKHVkEx3ZQ1oQzgUZd1ThzQYuf3bOf-hLzXx6iETwexA4um9VIZtN_IkTEA72_4DR5eyk5AifR-H1bjughUDI7jOuRHPxHYdei9vy48I%3D)**_

The American people made their opinion clear when they gave President Trump a sweeping mandate. He should have his nominees confirmed!

But the Left doesn't respect the will of the people, so they'll stoop to all kinds of dirty tactics to sabotage the confirmation process.

_Enough is enough, friend._

_We need to start fighting back IMMEDIATELY if we 're going to overcome the Democrats' plot to sabotage his second presidency._

**[That's why President Trump just issued a directive urging Republicans not to cut ANY kind of deals with these America Last radicals - and instead, to vote to confirm ALL of his nominees when he takes office!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f394f95251c465ab2c85073ca00c121&_e=BRfWT5VmslwNZN51mX7gzcUK69x8QY6UBuoecrFLCKzqzUrSfKdzCeIB7kGxQtrxHJVdc7biCxqbGPn85sjKAukpRXNfBjXHE6aMDNIWmTK9zjLh5_nMsE1cMCkRqhlkQlh4mNP-2M9BkVL1uY8rMfeUkdgTP2KwmvIdVHl-O1uZ7T2I52dUzi3c6RFnC1R_rmoi1SM-LCpsC8Xy0K2LXSt4VTJXBTYw881kdC6HfrUzIe6KbSeu5-_orCk3Z9DRoRQs-J6aVEDTLvJo0iubr9NDRwaTBg78tMDvxbFSneaj7Ycgvtz5YoRkyyeYgDmvAJVkN6ViANmRqqDCEOfdDz-PrsIKj6NdTCyAOZ00LcWWLzKacN_6vWE9SMaYckwun9HWcZ5HoKpjWCp2WVngCZKjxxIdVMZwAXPleNVxqqUPL8ETnh3A1nMWnrcMmUSb2Mq-3BkjDGB3y67N5Htsvw_7ONWG-uAGAaQ_KbJ316w%3D)**

**_[Newsweek:
Donald Trump hands down new directive to Senate Republicans](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1f394f95251c465ab2c85073ca00c121&_e=BRfWT5VmslwNZN51mX7gzcUK69x8QY6UBuoecrFLCKzqzUrSfKdzCeIB7kGxQtrxHJVdc7biCxqbGPn85sjKAukpRXNfBjXHE6aMDNIWmTK9zjLh5_nMsE1cMCkRqhlkQlh4mNP-2M9BkVL1uY8rMfeUkdgTP2KwmvIdVHl-O1uZ7T2I52dUzi3c6RFnC1R_rmoi1SM-LCpsC8Xy0K2LXSt4VTJXBTYw881kdC6HfrUzIe6KbSeu5-_orCk3Z9DRoRQs-J6aVEDTLvJo0iubr9NDRwaTBg78tMDvxbFSneaj7Ycgvtz5YoRkyyeYgDmvAJVkN6ViANmRqqDCEOfdD52Xj6reOFmR-Wu3tB7VpALhAaY2tAIdLj08zgCQIT7xc5PR1xU8cSmNpzuE_ii4gNYLHnHuboQdzpP3TSaAZvY_mOB9EwvmBsfxfkFaYJFkEii3bsxn3GeJV0kZumjlBOhhgOllBX7ru8AHbMveRd4%3D)_**

Now, we need your help to reinforce his message by flooding Washington with petitions from millions of grassroots Americans like _YOU_ echoing President Trump's call.

The best way to get his nominees confirmed is for the American people to make their voice heard!

name: Voter Action Project
subject: One way or another
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010725_1&amount=25]
MSNBC: Jamie Raskin thinks the Electoral College threatens democracy. He's right. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010725_1&amount=35]
Congressman Jamie Raskin knows the score, friend. Here's what he had to say:
“ I think that the Electoral College now, which has given us five popular vote losers as president in our history, twice in this century alone, has become a danger not just to democracy, but to the American people . It was a danger on January 6th, 2021. There are so many curving byways and nooks and crannies in the Electoral College that there are opportunities for a lot of strategic mischief. ”
The Electoral College isn’t just a vestige of the past; it is a ticking time bomb for exploitation in our democratic system. Congressman Raskin knows this, which is why he wanted the Jan. 6th Committee to propose getting rid of it. They didn't all agree, so it didn't make their list of final recommendations to Congress.
We know the vote suppressors will do anything in order to win. We have to remove this danger once and for all -- chip in $5, $15, $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010725_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010725_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010725_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010725_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010725_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=010725_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010725_1&amount=35]
We don’t have to wait for Congress to act, either. The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) is an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia.
16 states plus DC have already joined, accounting for 206 electoral votes and 76% of the states needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Maine is also moving a bill through their state legislature to join.
Whether it's the NPVIC or something else, the Electoral College needs to go.
Help us end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=010725_1&amount=25]
Thanks,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010725_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010725_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010725_1&amount=25]

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] MSNBC: Jamie Raskin thinks the Electoral College threatens democracy. He's right. [] Congressman Jamie Raskin knows the score, friend. Here's what he had to say: “ I think that the Electoral College now, which has given us five popular vote losers as president in our history, twice in this century alone, has become a danger not just to democracy, but to the American people . It was a danger on January 6th, 2021. There are so many curving byways and nooks and crannies in the Electoral College that there are opportunities for a lot of strategic mischief. ” The Electoral College isn’t just a vestige of the past; it is a ticking time bomb for exploitation in our democratic system. Congressman Raskin knows this, which is why he wanted the Jan. 6th Committee to propose getting rid of it. They didn't all agree, so it didn't make their list of final recommendations to Congress. We know the vote suppressors will do anything in order to win. We have to remove this danger once and for all -- chip in $5, $15, $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] We don’t have to wait for Congress to act, either. The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) is an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia. 16 states plus DC have already joined, accounting for 206 electoral votes and 76% of the states needed to essentially make the popular vote the law of the land. Maine is also moving a bill through their state legislature to join. Whether it's the NPVIC or something else, the Electoral College needs to go. Help us end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [] Thanks, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=88a248ba6ea7475d94fa15110c052435&_e=AQCFAqALYsxlhCPMg8_4W9DBqzg1nnQcJ5b48L2RftdWllLGUR0P0Nx2Jk59i3BDfVcu7t403FCOIs1P0QYjUPHbUj0geLbhnof1i7CsJioFxXlG462wdvp5Z0wXlUf3rxRasAq-px7Ak68GF0CUSYD9ANAfjwGNUCiKovPH-UTELnivtNjixqwWGl5UT14FOBNZq_0Lp9qiZ024rzUbaet2kkPinHTqVEp72g6UM2qF2sxHKf_2Ui_ggCYAqYhc1v-LIAQOxwVZDjVTT7lfntVutoqbwJBEePXriGmTOZYyAgK5b4SJ4EEQ7LbtMV46T-Kz_DN7pNVoIEO2fCSgsg%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,
---
Happy Testimony Tuesday! For today’s testimony, I want to share the good news coming out of Facebook (as crazy as that may sound)! For YEARS, our accounts have been censored, suppressed, and shadow banned. The social media reach for Let Us Worship could have doubled or tripled had it not been for Facebook's persecution, but today is a new day!

Mark Zuckerberg announced an END to social media suppression and a newfound commitment to free speech. We don't know if this is a true change in his heart or moving with the winds of political change, but for us, it doesn't matter-- we will now be able to share the life-saving message of the Gospel farther and wider than ever before, and for that, we say, "Praise the Lord!"

President-elect Donald Trump, never one to mince words, slammed Merchan in a scathing Truth Social post on Saturday, calling him “the most conflicted judge in New York State history.” The trigger? Merchan’s ruling that Trump must report [...] Well, folks, here we go again. Another Sunday morning political panel, another attempt to convince the American people not to believe their own eyes and ears. This time, it was MSNBC’s Symone Sanders-Townsend taking to the airwaves to deliver a masterclass in spin, arguing that President Joe Biden is “unequivocally” more mentally fit than President-elect [...] P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Unsubscribe .

Peter, let's talk 2025 → |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018637/521496514/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE108_20250107_WhatsAhead_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055568&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQwZTJiMy0yZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJZPr2MpVw8a112nBn4RCrzutgOhjNCO7meIM8QPyiI=) Peter, let's talk 2025.

As an EMILYs List supporter, you know better than anyone that the fight for our fundamental freedoms never takes a year off. Over the next 12 months, all across the country, our rights WILL be back on the ballot. We put together a**2025 Key Summary** of many of this year's upcoming elections and issues for top supporters like you, Peter. [**Can we count on you to fuel our 2025 mission and support this vital work helping elect more Democratic pro-choice women? Now is the time to invest early and powerfully in courageous pro-choice candidates.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018640/521496527/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE108_20250107_WhatsAhead_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055568&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQwZTJiMy0yZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJZPr2MpVw8a112nBn4RCrzutgOhjNCO7meIM8QPyiI=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018641/521496531/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE108_20250107_WhatsAhead_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055568&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQwZTJiMy0yZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJZPr2MpVw8a112nBn4RCrzutgOhjNCO7meIM8QPyiI=)

**2025 KEY SUMMARY
Prepared for dpwillis67@gmail.com**
🏙️**A new governor in New Jersey **
**Rep. Mikie Sherrill** has an impressive record of fighting for her constituents and standing up for women and families in Congress, and we're proud to endorse her for the next governor of New Jersey.
❤️**Up and down the ballot in Virginia **
EMILYs List is proud to endorse former Rep. **Abigail Spanberger** for governor, state Sen. **Ghazala Hashmi** for lieutenant governor, and **Shannon Taylor** for attorney general. We know that when EMILYs List women lead together, they make life better for all of their constituents!
**🗳️ Critical state and local elections **
Keep an eye on your inbox for new endorsements at the state and local level soon!
**🚫 Abortion bans and restrictions **
Anti-choice Republican extremists will continue to _stop at nothing_ to take away our reproductive rights this year, and Democratic pro-choice women WILL fight back with everything they've got.
**📣 Recruiting for 2026**
Control of the U.S. Senate and the House after 2026 will come down to how we prepare now. We have already begun recruiting Democratic pro-choice women across the country to run!
**❓ Everything we DON'T know (yet)**
Special elections, runoffs, retirements, GOP attacks on choice, scores of new opportunities to elevate and support Democratic pro-choice women — you name it, EMILYs List is READY for it!
[**Peter, we know there's no such thing as a political "off year." We can't wait to support more outstanding women running for office this year and in 2026, and we can't do any of this work without YOU. Donate today to help elect pro-choice leaders all across the country:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018642/521496532/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE108_20250107_WhatsAhead_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055568&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzQwZTJiMy0yZGNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RJZPr2MpVw8a112nBn4RCrzutgOhjNCO7meIM8QPyiI=)

clean_body: Peter, let's talk 2025 → | = Peter, let's talk 2025. As an EMILYs List supporter, you know better than anyone that the fight for our fundamental freedoms never takes a year off. Over the next 12 months, all across the country, our rights WILL be back on the ballot. We put together a2025 Key Summary of many of this year's upcoming elections and issues for top supporters like you, Peter. = | = 2025 KEY SUMMARY Prepared for dpwillis67@gmail.com 🏙️A new governor in New Jersey Rep. Mikie Sherrill has an impressive record of fighting for her constituents and standing up for women and families in Congress, and we're proud to endorse her for the next governor of New Jersey. ❤️Up and down the ballot in Virginia EMILYs List is proud to endorse former Rep. Abigail Spanberger for governor, state Sen. Ghazala Hashmi for lieutenant governor, and Shannon Taylor for attorney general. We know that when EMILYs List women lead together, they make life better for all of their constituents! 🗳️ Critical state and local elections Keep an eye on your inbox for new endorsements at the state and local level soon! 🚫 Abortion bans and restrictions Anti-choice Republican extremists will continue to stop at nothing to take away our reproductive rights this year, and Democratic pro-choice women WILL fight back with everything they've got. 📣 Recruiting for 2026 Control of the U.S. Senate and the House after 2026 will come down to how we prepare now. We have already begun recruiting Democratic pro-choice women across the country to run! ❓ Everything we DON'T know (yet) Special elections, runoffs, retirements, GOP attacks on choice, scores of new opportunities to elevate and support Democratic pro-choice women — you name it, EMILYs List is READY for it! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you — and let's get ready to WIN! the EMILYs List team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: With deep gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4554%2E35263%2EMhgIOS)
Hi Peter, I hope you and your loved ones had a great holiday season! Last week, I was sworn in to a new term as Wisconsin’s Senator — and **I could not be more grateful for your support as I get back to work.** All eyes were on Wisconsin in 2024, and thanks to this grassroots team, we defended Wisconsin’s Senate seat in the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen. Now, our attention turns to the work ahead of us. Although Democrats no longer control the Senate majority, I will do all I can to make a difference for the people of Wisconsin. I’ll work with anyone — Democrat or Republican — to deliver meaningful change, like lowering costs, increasing housing supply, and improving benefits for veterans. **I got into public service to get things done and to make life better for the people I represent. I’m ready to continue fighting for Wisconsin in the Senate.** It will take each and every one of us working together to make progress for the American people in the face of the extremism in Donald Trump’s White House. Standing up for our shared values and delivering wins for Democrats in 2026 means building the stepping stones for a powerful grassroots movement now — because the future starts today and our success depends on early action. This team is no stranger to a tough fight, so I know we have what it takes. Thank you for standing by my side during the toughest campaign of my career. I wouldn’t have been able to do it without you — and I’m glad to be working with you in the fights ahead. With gratitude, Tammy | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan2025.tQCIqp&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20250107_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4554%2E35263%2EMhgIOS)
---
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4554%2E35263%2EMhgIOS) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4554%2E35263%2EMhgIOS)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

subject: There are more open seats on the ballot in 2025 than in 2024.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Big Oil wants every last one of them. Let’s out-organize them.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018691/521496755/1328794144?refcode=ea.62862675-2ecd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.62862675-2ecd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyODYyNjc1LTJlY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mLRvib0foZIcBoQiR1OX51BO9AmyeMo81mA27mNNj4s=&emci=2969cd6d-2ecd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=62862675-2ecd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)
---
If you thought 2024 was a defining election year for climate action, buckle up. **There are more open seats on the ballot in 2025 than in 2024 — with more than 100,000 seats up for grabs and over 90,000 of these elections happening in the first six months of the year.** | _**What’s at Stake in 2025**_ **🗳️ _100,000+ seats_ on the ballot in 2025** **📍 _46 states_ have open seats this year** **🌎 Over _104,000 seats_ are local & city elections** **📅 _90,000 elections_ happen before July**
---
These races include governors, mayors, city councils, and school boards across the country. Each one is a chance to strengthen the firewall against Donald Trump’s incoming administration and Big Oil’s relentless greed.
**[If we don’t act now, we risk losing critical ground to the fossil fuel lobby. Can you pitch in a few dollars today to help us fight for climate champions in 2025?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018692/521496756/2105508926?refcode=ea.62862675-2ecd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.62862675-2ecd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyODYyNjc1LTJlY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mLRvib0foZIcBoQiR1OX51BO9AmyeMo81mA27mNNj4s=)**
In 2024, JanePAC supporters like you helped elect **_nearly 100 climate champions_** to key down-ballot positions across the country. These leaders are now in critical positions, ready to block fossil fuel companies from polluting our communities and keep climate priorities on the agenda.
But with an incoming Trump administration, a Republican-controlled Congress, and a fossil fuel industry ready to spend millions to dismantle federal climate policies, we need to work twice as hard.
We need to recruit candidates, train organizers, educate the public, and turn out voters for every race we possibly can this year. All of that takes time and resources. So, if we don’t organize now, Big Oil will use these elections to flood local governments with their allies and push through their dangerous agenda.
Climate champions are ready to run. Voters are ready to push back. But we can’t do this without your help. **[Will you rush a donation today to help power this work before it’s too late? Every dollar you give fuels the grassroots momentum we need to protect our communities and stop Big Oil.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018693/521496757/2105508926?refcode=ea.62862675-2ecd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.62862675-2ecd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyODYyNjc1LTJlY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mLRvib0foZIcBoQiR1OX51BO9AmyeMo81mA27mNNj4s=)**

clean_body: Big Oil wants every last one of them. Let’s out-organize them. | If you thought 2024 was a defining election year for climate action, buckle up. There are more open seats on the ballot in 2025 than in 2024 — with more than 100,000 seats up for grabs and over 90,000 of these elections happening in the first six months of the year. | What’s at Stake in 2025 🗳️ 100,000+ seats on the ballot in 2025 📍 46 states have open seats this year 🌎 Over 104,000 seats are local & city elections 📅 90,000 elections happen before July These races include governors, mayors, city councils, and school boards across the country. Each one is a chance to strengthen the firewall against Donald Trump’s incoming administration and Big Oil’s relentless greed. = In 2024, JanePAC supporters like you helped elect nearly 100 climate champions to key down-ballot positions across the country. These leaders are now in critical positions, ready to block fossil fuel companies from polluting our communities and keep climate priorities on the agenda. But with an incoming Trump administration, a Republican-controlled Congress, and a fossil fuel industry ready to spend millions to dismantle federal climate policies, we need to work twice as hard. We need to recruit candidates, train organizers, educate the public, and turn out voters for every race we possibly can this year. All of that takes time and resources. So, if we don’t organize now, Big Oil will use these elections to flood local governments with their allies and push through their dangerous agenda. Climate champions are ready to run. Voters are ready to push back. But we can’t do this without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

There’s no such thing as an off-year when it comes to protecting democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018889/521497336/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1YjVkZTc3LTJmY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bnK53S24jfNUQuniOvIFrB99_40MnmHM-lXbugShqEk=&emci=aee85e5b-23cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=15b5de77-2fcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)

It’s a special election day in Virginia, Peter! As part of our Democracy Defender program, which endorses candidates who will serve as key firewalls against Republican anti-democracy agendas, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee endorsed Jack Trammell and Kannan Srinivasan for the Virginia Senate and JJ Singh for the Virginia House of Delegates. These races will decide the legislative majority in _both_ chambers. And they’ll determine whether the general assembly will continue to protect fundamental rights and freedoms of all Virginians — including voting rights, reproductive rights, and gun safety measures — or if it will become a rubber stamp to Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin and his effort to dismantle them. **Just 7 days into the new year and we’re already back at it, proving there is no off-season for the work we do.[If you’re committed to protecting fair maps and ending gerrymandering, please make a donation today to help elect Democracy Defenders in state-level races in 2025 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100018890/521497337/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_VAElectionDay_email_20250107-NDRC-Tier1-VAElectionDay_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250107-NDRC-Tier1-VAElectionDay_&utm_campaign=VAElectionDay&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1YjVkZTc3LTJmY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bnK53S24jfNUQuniOvIFrB99_40MnmHM-lXbugShqEk=)** Later this year, voters will be choosing a state supreme court justice in Wisconsin and three state supreme court justices in Pennsylvania. These state-level elections are _critical_ to protecting our democracy — fair and representative leaders in these seats will serve as key firewalls against anti-democracy agendas across the country. So as a team, we will do everything we can to elect Democracy Defenders to those vital offices. name: Rushern Baker III
subject: We’re Up Against the Clock—Help Us Before the Deadline
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/Yard%20Signs%20%28March%202022%29%20%2815%29.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rbiiid1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rbiiid1]
Friends and Neighbors,
The clock is ticking, and we need your support now more than ever. Our campaign is facing a critical filing deadline at noon tomorrow [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rbiiid1] , and we’re counting on you to help us hit our goal.
Every dollar we raise before this deadline will show the strength of our movement and ensure we have the resources to connect with voters across Prince George’s County.
This isn’t just about numbers—it’s about showing that our community is united behind Rushern Baker III’s vision for stronger schools, safer neighborhoods, and better opportunities for all.
Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can before noon tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rbiiid1]
Your donation today could be the difference that pushes us over the finish line. Let’s show everyone the power of Prince George’s County and what we can achieve together.
RSVP [https://go.rushernbaker.com/a/baker-virtual-fundraiser-1725?contactdata=TIXllrwyCN1QMnTPUdAGlhcMn/bep5toijmLP7AxbS075HOx4mVEzAowIDdV1fstRvDY3vyBEBqNACwWm1RqNmZHbaYaOQo5gmV6t19cr2Y=]
Warm regards,
Rushern L. Baker III
Candidate for County Executive
P.S. Filing deadlines are make-or-break moments for campaigns. Don’t wait—donate now to keep us on track. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rbiiid1]

https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer/ [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer/]

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Our shared priorities are on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
As a valued member of this grassroots team, I hope you’ll take a minute or two to add your input. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100019520/521499304/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250107_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjcwMTEyYS0zMmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbyqHbHN4EOLoWOOgpd8aADlE92skssQSzWP2FrrLCk=&emci=c707f323-32cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4670112a-32cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, The 119th Congress was sworn in last week, and my team and I are hitting the ground running. I’m prepared to fight for progress on all of the issues that matter most to families in New Mexico and across the country. From Social Security, to our public lands, to access to affordable health care — when Donald Trump takes office in less than two weeks, all of our shared priorities will be on the line. I’m grateful I can travel around New Mexico and talk to folks about what’s on their mind in person. I wish I could meet with each and every one of you. But since that’s not possible, my team put together a 2025 Priorities Survey so you can tell me what issues matter most to you as we settle into the new year. **[Can you spend just a few minutes filling out our Priorities Survey? You’re a valued member of this grassroots team, and I hope you’ll take a minute or two to add your input.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100019522/521499306/797658123?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250107_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjcwMTEyYS0zMmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbyqHbHN4EOLoWOOgpd8aADlE92skssQSzWP2FrrLCk=&emci=c707f323-32cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4670112a-32cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100019524/521499308/797658123?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250107_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjcwMTEyYS0zMmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbyqHbHN4EOLoWOOgpd8aADlE92skssQSzWP2FrrLCk=&emci=c707f323-32cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4670112a-32cd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you for taking the time to respond,
Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

Peter, Oregon's future is brighter when we act together. This team is hitting the ground running, fighting for every Oregonian in every county. The work ahead — expanding economic opportunity, addressing climate change, and ensuring justice for all — is urgent. But we can't do it alone. This grassroots team is our backbone. The stronger we are, the more we can focus on uplifting everyday people — our friends, neighbors, and families. Join us in building a state where every voice is heard. With your support, let's keep pushing for a future that prioritizes justice, equity, and opportunity for all. name: Adam Schiff
subject: This would be a disaster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8256%2E5257348%2ED1znlC)
Derek —
For _years_ , you and thousands of other grassroots supporters have joined me in calling for USPS Postmaster General Louis DeJoy to improve the Postal Service — or to step aside from his important role.
DeJoy’s leadership of the USPS has led to slower service, mail delays, overworked postal workers, and so much more. He slowed mail delivery during the pandemic and before the 2020 election... I mean, come on.
Just last month, at a House Oversight Committee hearing, _this_ is how DeJoy reacted to criticism — from a GOP member of Congress, no less.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20250107-dejoy-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250107_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=8256%2E5257348%2ED1znlC)
**Derek, Louis DeJoy has been a disaster for the USPS — but Donald Trump has plans to make the Postal Service _even worse_.**
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20250107-dejoy-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250107_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=8256%2E5257348%2ED1znlC)
Donald Trump and his ultra-wealthy advisors want to **privatize** the Postal Service, which would end government support of this vital and quintessential American service.
This would be a massive change for the worse, Derek.
**We need a fully functional USPS that delivers mail and packages on time at an affordable price — not a private company that will gouge millions of Americans way more for its services or cut off delivery altogether for the rural and less lucrative areas.**
**[Add your name if you oppose Trump’s plans to privatize the United States Postal Service. We need to protect the USPS from DeJoy, from Trump, and from an administration hell-bent on running the Postal Service into the ground.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20250107-dejoy-petition.xQvCU6&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8256%2E5257348%2ED1znlC)**
[PROTECT THE USPS](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20250107-dejoy-petition.xQvCU6&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8256%2E5257348%2ED1znlC)
---
Thank you for taking a moment to join me and raise your voice. This is important.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5035?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=8256%2E5257348%2ED1znlC)

name: Mark Guethle
subject: Join us for the 4th Annual Trivia Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_070125_FR_Trivia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_070125_FR_Trivia]

Hey team – we have exciting news!

I hope you had a wonderful holiday season and a happy new year! With the new year kicking off, that means we’re just under 2 weeks away from our 4th Annual Virtual Trivia Night!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_070125_FR_Trivia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_070125_FR_Trivia]Join us on Saturday, January 18th at 7pm to flex your trivia muscle, meet Democrats and County Chairs around the state, win cash prizes AND support local elections all across Illinois.

This is one of our biggest and most fun events of the year, so make sure to RSVP now to secure your spot. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_070125_FR_Trivia]

Thanks,

Mark Guethle
IDCCA President

GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA!
SIGN UP NOW ➔ [https://idcca.org/signup/]

Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. Please note your contribution may be used in connection with a federal election. Federal law requires political committees use their “best efforts” to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500.
A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board’s official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL
The Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association

Springfield, IL 62708

**What is the freeze?** When Maryland’s legislative session starts, public officials like Wes are prohibited from fundraising and accepting donations until the session ends.
**Why does it matter?** Since Wes and our team rely on grassroots contributions to support our movement for a stronger Maryland, that puts us in a difficult spot. We’ll need to cover over three months of our critical work without any fundraising.
**What can you do?** This movement has delivered before, and now Wes is counting on us to do it again. We’re not asking for much, but we are asking you to step up today.
**[Chip in any amount today to power our fight through the freeze. Even $5 will help a lot to sustain our work for Marylanders in the coming months.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100020265/521502163/-1757953303?refcode=em20250107-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGJjMjgzMC0zNmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HDxzq-aWvVgZ3u4s6Su9osSToCvB8fzYsXo1551xKXs=)**

body:
President Trump will be sentenced in the sham NY case in just over 48 hours, show your support of him by purchasing your "I Voted For The Felon" shirt today!

| Friend, President Trump is to be sentenced in the sham New York fraud case in just over 48 hours.
Over the summer, I sold hundreds of "I'm Voting For The Fellon" shirts to people just like you in an effort to show our support of President Trump following his conviction in the Manhattan Witch Hunt.
Your purchase of one of these shirts helped me cover my costs as a Delegate to the Republican National Convention from Colorado's 7th Congressional District.
Now, as we approach the sentencing and the President's Inauguration, I have re-designed these shirts to say, "I Voted for the Felon."
I encourage you to show your support of President Trump by purchasing one of these limited edition shirts as he appears before corrupt judge Juan Merchan on Friday.
Let us all stand together behind our 47th President and show him that we have his back, even as the radical left continues their lawfare and witch hunts against him, even now, after his landslide victory in 2024.
You can order your "I Voted for the Felon" Shirt or Sweatshirt by clicking the image or button below...

Now, as we approach the sentencing and the President's Inauguration, I have re-designed these shirts to say, "I Voted for the Felon." I encourage you to show your support of President Trump by purchasing one of these limited edition shirts as he appears before corrupt judge Juan Merchan on Friday. Let us all stand together behind our 47th President and show him that we have his back, even as the radical left continues their lawfare and witch hunts against him, even now, after his landslide victory in 2024. name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: We have special elections to win – will you join us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
With ten special elections quickly approaching, will you chip in to help ensure that state Democrats have the resources they need to win this month, next month, and beyond? | | |
---
| |
---|---
Democrats are gearing up for **ten special elections across five states** over the next _three_ months. Here’s what’s on deck ⬇️ | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**
---|---|---
1/28
| Minnesota | SD-60

1/28
| Minnesota | HD-40B

2/15
| Delaware | SD-1

2/15
| Delaware | SD-5

2/25
| Maine | HD-24

3/25
| South Carolina | HD-113

3/25
| Mississippi | HD-23

3/25
| Mississippi | HD-82

3/29
| Louisiana | SD-14

3/29
| Louisiana | SD-23

[Chip in to help elect state Dems »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZg-YKAJSwWUpEjV3yfwows_4WmQzlngMd-wn5CtPVaL30ZfPprCUm-HBSEbVJMv16s96ze3TCuVwprR4__vK2HXonL6OLMTbsK1GIcfdZXYKu7S5-yKpPwRxPjWRByW2tmDyAKF-PP_IYcpCg18pFyQGcKJP7oybEgZbDiyG5oB22rATkmJja-O8CKbX-11c7FyrJuRw7SPC7MGp2r8VWc5ntlzTsw3QWGA9debnLmrwN3JRYAxysQdvBQW0bwcj2J7x4KCZK6Kcp9M8dOrYWb1Yhm0gWNwys1UKQJLEinA7axde2Rr3x6KYuQQmlUy4OOOEVFB9L-b86W9VQsxUcdApObS9tE0MBjpBODADz58b9178vxx-TirXu1o2btDGe_W8RzsleGXj-S_wC_fwW0CTT6eKv2hVnJY-8nTgMxNXsda7-Mlu8o7SnGbnm9uKI602LjsRlIN4wynkXRuuFLncTnnJTo22iKUlMzp5_KPCa9B_rxjcvwepNwUr8a92DDTzC49dRFxRFmlYdf0ZnII/4cy/dvcQamNDSzesuV9MpaiFBQ/h0/h001.rng535PBhjhpBsVofD8iCbTs1-vvfcWTs2vPhm-jQMo)
With Republicans' federal trifecta, building Democratic power at the state level has never been more critical to our fight for reproductive freedom, gun safety, and our democracy. But, state legislative races are frequently overlooked and underfunded – we need you to help change that.
**Each of these special elections marks an opportunity to take a meaningful stand against Republicans’ hate-driven agenda.**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Biden just gave Israel another $8 BILLION
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Instead of taking bold action to defend our democracy from Donald Trump
and his MAGA administration, lame-duck President Biden is using his
remaining time in office to give Israel’s government more weapons to carry
out its genocide against Palestinians.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250107-biden-netanyahu/?source=em20250107-36297&akid=36297%2E1203867%2EDJTHIp ]Tweet from Prem Thakker: In its final days, Biden admin is pushing an
$8 billion arms deal to Israel, right as: Human Rights Watch & Amnesty say
Israel is committing genocide, IDF kills several journalists, babies
freeze to death, IDF attacks last hospitals in northern Gaza, detains
hospital director

The additional $8 billion in weapons transfers would include the same
types of munitions used to kill 90 and injure 300 Palestinian civilians
living in tents in what they were told was a safe zone.

At this point, the United Nations, Amnesty International, Human Rights
Watch, Doctors Without Borders, the International Criminal Court, genocide
scholars, multiple world leaders, and other organizations have concluded
that Israel is committing genocide and ethnic cleansing in Gaza.

The Israeli military is targeting civilians, kidnapping doctors, letting
babies freeze to death, and starving millions of people.

But that hasn’t stopped Biden and the U.S. government from supplying
Nethanyahu with the resources to carry out this violence. It will be his
legacy.

CA Democrats, Voter Registration for the 2025 ADEM Elections is NOW OPEN! The Electronic Voter Registration Form will open January 6, 2025 at 12:00 PM and close January 24, 2025. The In-Person Voter Registration Form will open January 6, 2025 at 12:00 PM and close February 23, 2025 at 6 PM. Electronic ballot-voting registration will NOT be available after the January 24, 2025 deadline. [REGISTER TODAY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100021184/521505237/408044438?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI3YTU4Zi0zYmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJyqoY_hMjMn_dakScOpf4gy3P4rb_u-jPL5RdYDUm4=&emci=c19d20a5-84cc-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=09b7a58f-3bcd-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=560478) Voters can register to vote online or to vote at an in-person location. **Voters who are requesting an electronic ballot** will receive their electronic ballot voting credentials in the mail and submit their ballot using ElectionBuddy. name: Team Pramila
subject: Billionaires have bought their way into the highest levels of our government.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250107-4650-footer&t=1001&akid=4650%2E420207%2Euf12HH ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter, Pramila has
been clear that Democrats lost the 2024 election because we failed to
connect with working class voters. But make no mistake: Donald Trump and
the billionaires set to take over his administration are no friends of
working people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250107?refcode=em20250107-4650&amount=3&refcode2=4650_420207_uf12HH&akid=4650%2E420207%2Euf12HH ][IMG]

So far, Trump has named 14 billionaires to his administration – including
the richest person in the world, Elon Musk.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250107?amount=3&refcode=em20250107-4650&refcode2=4650_420207_uf12HH&akid=4650%2E420207%2Euf12HH ]Pitch in $3 to fight back

So while the median net worth in the United States is a little over
$190,000, the median net worth in Donald Trump’s incoming administration
will be orders of magnitude larger.

From Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to Charles Kushner and David Sacks, Trump’s
new administration is set to be one of the wealthiest — and most out of
touch — in American history.

We need to be clear about why this is happening. In this election cycle,
just 150 mega-wealthy families spent a whopping $1.9 billion to boost
their preferred candidates. Billionaires have bought their way into the
highest levels of our government, and we must fight back.

This year Pramila and Democrats in Congress will be working to hold Trump
and his cabinet of billionaires accountable. But that alone isn’t enough —
Democrats also need to commit to a bold, populist, working-class agenda of
our own.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250107?refcode=em20250107-4650&amount=3&refcode2=4650_420207_uf12HH&akid=4650%2E420207%2Euf12HH ]We need your help to make it happen,
Peter. Will you pitch in
$3 to help us rebuild the Democratic Party around popular
progressive policies like Medicare for All, raising the minimum wage, and
stronger union rights?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250107?amount=3&refcode=em20250107-4650&refcode2=4650_420207_uf12HH&akid=4650%2E420207%2Euf12HH ]Contribute

— Team Pramila

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250107-4650-footer&t=1002&refcode2=4650_420207_uf12HH&akid=4650%2E420207%2Euf12HH

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4650%2E420207%2Euf12HH

Paid for by Pramila for Congress.

Fellow American,

I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas and New Year together. As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays.
[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=759bad8ca77f410b9da62faf4cf4fe3a&_e=retsN9Dbol88tHfmYs4FT7hkZGSeOSoqs5Ffa3_ch6c6nwOsMhFqlHjJgavrXbKJ-sHLIEftuxfj3GvxpBXbhV43Q9IbW1Ow6U0TR1LoCWl6Yr36Fe8hIX0umKm_jah-m6PyuF5YtcS1d0uI6BnB2YWLbt9VKpPILmtbf9ZcKAdHfHzHD3ulmitBdYS4I4xs5Y5Kj2W9-kHTCyKwb5u9wqGCVOMo3yfotFjwwWUVxfDlEzzkiOwH2768b74ew1Xkz1_xoQbUfYURHIFwX8y8ZbQwobIuQ-RcJI5wx9Ch67mgcp13HeMecdURwB1C3KdFrSNSb8BVPq1IpQlTDG6DDVxEB33PWRy7pcsoSOWgxqKh7eHhkDqdIg-Le4nAax4Dcd014l7qzRQm_wET4kVXFpTZYoUDbMylIz8f4l5HFH0jzLRzHlRSvJOU2SnpvJwdfBEuGfXp6OhF7cTpo7UpR0Aa2JZsdiS0BPJWycNIPFZHZ9guYqm9rVG7lYs1unLy-cqdgvrGWm6qPEeXRHTSnC6GroiFUAQZQ5Q1iejemryVZYajBeoYFd1zsh1R8TgmDXa5IcTCJJ0wtr9Qo4Qg1Q%3D%3D)
Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Fellow American, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border.

As you can see, we were blessed with a White Christmas in Montana, as the entire family gathered to celebrate the Holidays. Now, I’m back in D.C., ready to resume my work for the American people. And Fellow American, we have A LOT of work to do. Democrat control in Washington left our new Republican Senate Majority a monumental mess to clean up, from the economy to the crisis at our Southern Border. We need to hear from Americans like you to help us prioritize the work we need to accomplish. Making sure we’re on the same page before our Republican Majority is sworn in will guarantee we start 2025 from a position of strength and signal to Democrats their obstructionist tactics won’t work. Last week, on the first day of 2025, I officially signed the petition to get my name on the ballot to run for Governor of Virginia!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100021338/521505799/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmYzMmJiZTctM2NjZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fA4ZO5Hs8IXZL59OuVb0UsOK4OppjoxTxshhPLSXFMk=)

| Peter,

Last week, on the first day of 2025, I officially signed the petition to get my name on the ballot to run for Governor of Virginia! This is a big first step in our campaign, and I’m incredibly excited to hit the road this year, meet Virginians across the Commonwealth, listen to their challenges and aspirations, and work hard to earn their support.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100021339/521505800/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmYzMmJiZTctM2NjZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fA4ZO5Hs8IXZL59OuVb0UsOK4OppjoxTxshhPLSXFMk=)
But I need your help to make this a reality. To get my name on the ballot, I need to gather 10,000 signatures from voters all across Virginia. It’s a crucial step in the process, and it’s a big challenge—one that will take resources, staff, organization, and a lot of hard work. And this is only step one. Once we get on the ballot, then the real work begins.

My campaign is already working to organize events, mobilize volunteers, and fund the materials needed to collect these signatures—everything from petition forms to resources for our dedicated teams out in the field. To reach our goal and secure my place on the ballot, I’m counting on supporters like you to help fund this vital effort.

[_**Will you contribute today to help us gather the signatures we need and keep our momentum going? Every dollar you donate helps us get one step closer to flipping Virginia blue in November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100021340/521505801/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmYzMmJiZTctM2NjZC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fA4ZO5Hs8IXZL59OuVb0UsOK4OppjoxTxshhPLSXFMk=)

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I'm nervous
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Well, Peter, I’ll admit it… Things have really taken a turn since Election Day. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn’t be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED, and now I’m starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our first goal of the year. I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach this goal. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before midnight. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a7b1d4d984a29b19af7afc048508c821553d53b90918daf760d51abbc800956069c40c3467b8d0bd00a0924780e70b126d1628f91865ce7d0040dd6b1d7027a9 I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my critical goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. It’s the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this… But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it’s a no-brainer in my book. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a7b1d4d984a29b19af7afc048508c821553d53b90918daf760d51abbc800956069c40c3467b8d0bd00a0924780e70b126d1628f91865ce7d0040dd6b1d7027a9 I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference. Thank you and God bless you, Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn’t be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED, and now I’m starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our first goal of the year. I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach this goal. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before midnight. I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my critical goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. It’s the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this… But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it’s a no-brainer in my book. I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference. Thank you and God bless you, Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Just days left until my trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line...
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=68f3fe9b60164bd79f219e47591bb22f&_e=pKDTWusy2Rdgt9Lnr_b_6SIhJNNjbkwTK24arve1ppr2H1f4ScsmecEh0dws71a75f5VpPm3uqLDnquwB7xeik2FRYW6D4ZUSxPe4dWK8p_iddpxIBD93qxsYIK-n731p--TbEVkRJlPsxjRz-f4tGH-4erIVWhLmzNQaAl9qgUnJgQDTTD6A60M4h5Lsz64gjdDa6bCSorhsWCIvQvaG8vf2sK_T8g5GCaCAuYgsLHxeK_QlC1bYzTuLSS81kSyyTQE6QKPU2Zn9SW1_JTCGSGqERNPkCh1nqnYOXhaT9rsWYvQQ5E1JJsisj0bbPKWdA7cNDlb4FvtBjCICRIMzFswaUdtuHvR_CFOmiM2b2R0gGs3TAGJADOZtuVi_bfn)
---
My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend.
---
**_In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American.
---
The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president.
---
And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of _everything_ I own.
---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
_**In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ _IMPRISONMENT!_ ” **_
---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---
__But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now.__
---
[**Before my trial begins, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me fight for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to take away my home – and ultimately, JAIL me for life as an innocent man.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=68f3fe9b60164bd79f219e47591bb22f&_e=pKDTWusy2Rdgt9Lnr_b_6SIhJNNjbkwTK24arve1ppr2H1f4ScsmecEh0dws71a75f5VpPm3uqLDnquwB7xeik2FRYW6D4ZUSxPe4dWK8p_iddpxIBD93qxsYIK-n731p--TbEVkRJlPsxjRz-f4tGH-4erIVWhLmzNQaAl9qgUnJgQDTTD6A60M4h5Lsz64gjdDa6bCSorhsWCIvQvaG8vf2sK_T8g5GCaCAuYgsLGJwZjBwYwZKW9k3Ge-y0bcQmUrC6Mf4iEtAFaE29n15_z0IR1UaxbFu3w0NACKdRJ95IA0Kjku1NxvtOZdN2g7ClxxktykDv83EHDt33A1pk9IoDPP4TVNuo2lirMmbYLJ1qkZc8M_96awkB8czkJK)

clean_body: It’s hard for me to describe just how much is on the line... | My heart sinks even writing these words... but I need your help, Friend. In just DAYS, reports indicate my trial is set to begin as I fight for the final chance to save my home. To me, this trial now feels like the culmination of a years-long witch hunt and an assault – not just on my freedom – but on the freedom of every patriotic American. The Democrats’ Deep State has made it their mission to personally, professionally, and financially ruin me all for standing by the TRUTH and by my dear friend, our 45th and 47th president. And because the Left knows there's simply no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own. But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home... No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life. In fact, an Obama judge just threatened me with “ IMPRISONMENT! ” But no matter what it costs me, I will never surrender this fight for my freedom and justice. And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting. I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high. But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: We won’t let Donald Trump attack the civil rights of millions of Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1438%2E791427%2E0aPTtU)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3056?t=2&akid=1438%2E791427%2E0aPTtU)
Friend, birthright citizenship is a bedrock principle of American democracy.
If you’re born here, you’re an American citizen. No ifs, ands, or buts about it.
Once we open the door to the erosion of birthright citizenship, we open the door to the politicalization and weaponization of the entire concept of American citizenship. Autocrats like Trump could decide who is and isn’t a citizen simply based on race, ethnicity, religion, ideology, or even just his whims.
We’re not going to let Donald Trump attack the civil rights of millions of Americans. We will stand against it in every way we can.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
* * *

**Don’t close this email just yet? 🙏**
Friend — With Trump taking office and Ilhan starting a new term, we can’t give up on our fight for the working class and justice for all. Ilhan needs all the help she can get as we kick off the new Congress. **[Please, make a contribution today and help us keep up the fight for our progressive agenda for the people >>](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan25.usI49z&refcode=em250107-1-gm&t=3&akid=1438%2E791427%2E0aPTtU)**

## America is first again..
President Trump held a press conference today that lasted for an hour and 12 minutes -- which in itself these days is a remarkable event considering what has been happening with the current Administration.
We rarely see or hear from the current President and when we do its usually a moment filled with gaffes or outbursts.
Beyond the event itself, what stood out to me this morning -- and frankly over the past few weeks - is watching a real America First agenda in action (mind you we are still two weeks out from the inauguration)
Today's press conference began with a business leader pledging a $20 BILLION -- yes, billion, investment in the US. The last press conference began with the head of Softbank pledging a $200 BILLION investment in the US. ...

Friend, Elon and Vivek are starting a Department of Government Efficiency podcast!

What better way to help hold the government accountable than to bring the public along to see all of the wasteful spending, unnecessary regulations and fraud that goes on.

Well, that’s what Elon and Vivek’s new podcast is all about. Call it DOGEcast if you will.
Friend, pinch me, I’m dreaming. Elon + Vivek are teaming up for a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME project and you’ve got a chance to be part of history.

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan’s career of chaos and empty promises
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
A few days ago the new Congress was sworn in, and Jim Jordan is already angling for a more powerful position instead of doing his job as our Congressman.
First he tried running for Speaker, and boy that fell apart fast. Then he started kissing up to Republican moderates, trying to worm his way into a different House leadership position.
Now the word is that Jim Jordan is aiming to run for the newly opened Senate seat here in Ohio.
Are you kidding me? Jim Jordan, the guy who’s done nothing but sow chaos and block progress every single day of the 18 years he’s been in office, THAT guy wants to be a Senator now?
What a joke. And let me tell you, NO ONE is going to buy that. Just take a look at this recent letter to the editor in my hometown:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250107_do_nothing_jordan_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250107_do_nothing_jordan_image]
I have to agree with the author here, Jim Jordan is NO Sherrod Brown and is in no way fit to serve in either the House or Senate.
Sherrod Brown spent his career as a relentless champion for workers, Veterans, seniors, and families – sponsoring 75 bills this session alone that tackled jobs, healthcare, childcare, housing, and mental health.
But in the nearly two decades Jim Jordan has been in Congress, guess how many bills he’s authored that became law.
That’s right, Zero.
If you’re as fed up as I am, now’s the time to act. Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help us hold Jordan accountable and show Americans what real leadership looks like. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250107_do_nothing_jordan_link1]
Jordan is too busy fighting for camera time and playing political theater for his ULTRA-MAGA cronies than working for US.
This is a guy who votes against the interests of everyday people time and time again.
He’s voted against capping prescription drug prices, against the PACT Act for veterans, and against every Farm Bill that could have supported our rural communities.
Instead of focusing on policies that make life better for people, Jim Jordan is focused on conspiracy theories and performative outrage – leaving us with nothing but chaos and soundbites.
Jim Jordan doesn’t belong in ANY elected office, and we’re going to make sure this is his LAST term.
