clean_body: alt [] Friends, A few days ago the new Congress was sworn in, and Jim Jordan is already angling for a more powerful position instead of doing his job as our Congressman. First he tried running for Speaker, and boy that fell apart fast. Then he started kissing up to Republican moderates, trying to worm his way into a different House leadership position. Now the word is that Jim Jordan is aiming to run for the newly opened Senate seat here in Ohio. Are you kidding me? Jim Jordan, the guy who’s done nothing but sow chaos and block progress every single day of the 18 years he’s been in office, THAT guy wants to be a Senator now? What a joke. And let me tell you, NO ONE is going to buy that. Just take a look at this recent letter to the editor in my hometown: [] I have to agree with the author here, Jim Jordan is NO Sherrod Brown and is in no way fit to serve in either the House or Senate. Sherrod Brown spent his career as a relentless champion for workers, Veterans, seniors, and families – sponsoring 75 bills this session alone that tackled jobs, healthcare, childcare, housing, and mental health. But in the nearly two decades Jim Jordan has been in Congress, guess how many bills he’s authored that became law. That’s right, Zero. If you’re as fed up as I am, now’s the time to act. Chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help us hold Jordan accountable and show Americans what real leadership looks like. [] Jordan is too busy fighting for camera time and playing political theater for his ULTRA-MAGA cronies than working for US. This is a guy who votes against the interests of everyday people time and time again. He’s voted against capping prescription drug prices, against the PACT Act for veterans, and against every Farm Bill that could have supported our rural communities. Instead of focusing on policies that make life better for people, Jim Jordan is focused on conspiracy theories and performative outrage – leaving us with nothing but chaos and soundbites. Jim Jordan doesn’t belong in ANY elected office, and we’re going to make sure this is his LAST term. Together, we can replace Jordan’s dysfunction with real progress for American families. But we can’t do it without you. Contribute now to fuel our fight and make 2025 the year we put an end to all of Jim Jordan’s political ambitions. [] America deserves better – and we’re going to deliver. Conservative debater Konstantin Kisin went TO WAR with two far-left hacks who try to silence him by saying he has white-male privilege.
**[He doesn't take that crap for one second...](https://substack.com/redirect/79a0bcbd-e4bc-4e32-8ac2-38092556990e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/79a0bcbd-e4bc-4e32-8ac2-38092556990e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kisin faced-off with marxist politician Yanis Varoufakis and left-wing professor Cynthia Miller-Idriss over DEI's failure to build a better western society at **[The Holberg Debate.](https://substack.com/redirect/036764d1-c3bd-469c-bc1e-7ad1b198472e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"What we have today in the modern west is a new framework of discrimination," Kisin stated "We have decided that it is okay to discriminate against white people!"
Kisin's claim **[prompted laughs from the audience](https://substack.com/redirect/79a0bcbd-e4bc-4e32-8ac2-38092556990e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who clearly disagreed with his argument. "I hate this stuff because it unfairly privileges people who do not deserve the privilege," he added.
Miller-Idres told Kisin that his claim was "easy to say" when he had been "born on first base" as a white man.
"As a man, you have advantages that are undeniable," she told Kisin. "And you have a privilege of walking around the world being perceived as white!"
**[Kisin exploded](https://substack.com/redirect/79a0bcbd-e4bc-4e32-8ac2-38092556990e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at the belittling personal characterization. "In my country I was name called and discriminated against for being brown! You have decided that I have a privilege?!!"
**[Watch the clash below:](https://substack.com/redirect/79a0bcbd-e4bc-4e32-8ac2-38092556990e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

clean_body: It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. And we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

---

---

---
But it doesn’t end with them stripping me of my possessions, priceless keepsakes I was given as Mayor that I passed on to my son, or even my home...
---
No, these leftist tyrants' end goal is to see me thrown in jail as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---

---
But no matter what it costs me, I will _never_ _surrender_ this fight for my freedom and justice.
---
**And it’s the generosity of patriots like YOU that gives me the courage to keep fighting.**
---
I understand that so many of you are still struggling from the consequences of Biden and Kamala’s disastrous policies. And if that’s your case, then please know your kind thoughts and prayers are more than enough to help keep my spirits and my head held high.
---
__But if you can support my legal defense trust at this pivotal moment in my legal battle, know that I’ve never needed your help more than right now.__

IL House GOP Conference Chair Jeff Keicher Defends Vote to Expand Transgender Patient Rights, Then Angrily Drops F-Bomb During Call with Female Constituent (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/01/il-house-gop-conference-chair-jeff-keicher-defends-vote-to-expand-transgender-patient-rights-then-angrily-drops-f-bomb-during-call-with-female-constituent.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7f5e240fa5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/01/il-house-gop-conference-chair-jeff-keicher-defends-vote-to-expand-transgender-patient-rights-then-angrily-drops-f-bomb-during-call-with-female-constituent.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7f5e240fa5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
IL GOP House Leader's Jeff Keicher, left and Tony McCombie, far right.
By Illinois Review

Illinois House Republican Conference Chairman Jeff Keicher – a close ally of embattled House GOP leader Tony McCombie, is defending his support of a bill in 2023 that expanded transgender and non-binary patient rights – even becoming angry and dropping the f-bomb before hanging up during a phone call with a female constituent.

“If someone can’t figure out what sex they are they shouldn’t be denied access to cancer care,” wrote Keicher on Facebook late on Sunday shortly after Illinois Review’s story broke – sparking an instant backlash in the comments section of his post.

McCombie Denounces IR as ‘Fake News’ in Tele-Town Hall After Vote Supporting the Expansion of Transgender Patient Rights is Exposed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/01/mccombie-denounces-ir-as-fake-news-in-tele-town-hall-after-vote-supporting-the-expansion-of-transgender-patient-rights-is-exposed.html?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAAR2mT4YvT94oLfdaXtWN2d-plO4a4yMOmUyJojqxz1HyBRIgbYOKq22TpQc_aem_2OArC8UXk3Ck8ao22zziCA&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7f5e240fa5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

Ill. House GOP Leader Tony McCombie
By Illinois Review

On Monday evening, during a tele-town hall meeting, embattled Illinois House Republican Minority Leader Tony McCombie called Illinois Review “fake news,” one day after the conservative, pro-Trump news publication exposed her support for legislation that expanded health care coverage for transgender and non-binary patients in Illinois.

Calling this publication “fake news” is a line often used by the anti-Trump wing of the Illinois Republican Party.

Illinois Review remains the largest, conservative, pro-Trump news organization in the state. IR is also the only publication in Illinois to have been shared by President Donald Trump on his personal Truth Social account – proving that the 45th and 47th President of the United States and his team read IR’s stories.

name: Team WFP
subject: Fighting Trump’s agenda from the ground up in 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | We did it, Peter. Thanks to WFP members like you, we didn’t just meet our 2024 end-of-year online fundraising goal — we _smashed_ it. **Our target was $100,000, and together, we raised over $125,000!** Whether you became a dues-paying member, contributed for the first time, or just cheered us on, you made this happen. This movement — for, by, and of working-class people — runs on grassroots supporters like you. But here’s the deal: hitting this goal wasn’t the finish line — it was a launchpad. The more we raise together, the more we can DO together in 2025. And we’ve got big plans. [**Didn’t get a chance to donate before the year ended? Or feeling inspired to help us do even more? Chip in now to****fuel the fight for 2025.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9c5ykEmpIrTiIol281hHQ6qbyl0OnSOsDAGN-bWRQYz7g_M_mTrDRRxpde_AUq1UKwK7ArOvyV7hyh_eSUFsmnhlZMf4mQnZDthPklD-HnXTTu73P9D0jlwxBAURDbanTMuL6lch_VsNcaogAILtdyA2dU7QvfQhxIr8qxVp4j632liOLGhgmf2GsKA6Ks89a8aJqRTUU1zZB3izr_cq5SgpzFK1I62wU95zVifeUiBohUyNziuhaTUeLuBvnLMDBsIOrFig5VqzCWbyo4Z8KkgkxxXTsNnTBb2PRnWRI6mWTKgO2Yxjgs0CU-uvMvHZbmJ4KhFswR5clOQwmmB1Sye7kof2Cw1AmgfGfNc3AJaeN8zrmVapnIVv2H_G5_Ds3/4cy/aiFYpRemQ4msKwEuQWWODA/h0/h001.sfIpjyfkLGEJaUnwRDQyebnBLiBO1skd9uNoJ-36zHo) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9c5ykEmpIrTiIol281hHQ6qbyl0OnSOsDAGN-bWRQYz5WCWzWN2lv0saeYgbYiprbuAM962-i4vz2iRp41GDCbGeeQBAZAMqfTdoN9nPd6wq6wgFkFX3Pu6IhaI71WSuDwOM5_6ufdpEKdOpkdmgS8Qq-5kM8HrPHn4KLHopJQ29upmTMqoKcKloJAyOhYLG-MSFUab8MZ_d6VEbbtXWIGrof2M05HYKzlboa66ThStWFdNegppt9lZx64yxu3SdgUVcjcwmW7-Qrysy1Ee5BsA8FRvzeRku7KN4exIg-enoD_RTE-sXqwdTulAftRN4tsXFDdnJKH4N9kWNac293_qGSXw19R-qq7HSrCTMWQz9TTAskNWXzmIucVQsc3nNCczTeQueeqMjrBem9BeZ_GA/4cy/aiFYpRemQ4msKwEuQWWODA/h1/h001.NwvOZC5evwz7NdXxTF6cQf_DTybLJN_-k-_NB6lvbzM)** Here’s what your support will power in the months ahead:
* **More trainings** — To prepare progressive candidates and campaigns to win across the country.
* **More organizers in key states** — Because the fight to defend democracy happens everywhere, not just in D.C.
* **More working-class candidates** — Including challengers who will take on the entrenched and the powerful in primaries, state and local races, and special elections coming up in 2025.
* **More grassroots organizing** — To protect abortion rights, tackle the climate crisis, tax the rich, defend our Social Security and Medicare, and fight back against Trump’s MAGA agenda.

Let’s be real, Peter:**2025 is going to be pivotal.** Trump and his allies are going to be focused on their Project 2025 blueprint, a roadmap for rolling back rights, gutting programs that millions depend on, and locking in their power for years to come. **We’re**** _not_****going to let that happen.** With your support, we’ll grow a multiracial, working-class movement strong enough to slow down, thwart, and ultimately defeat this agenda. And we’ll lay the groundwork to win back power in 2026 and 2028, with a government that works for everyone, not just the billionaire class. [**This is our moment to fight harder, aim higher, and go further. If you’re ready to build independent political power — not just at the federal level but in towns, cities, and municipalities — now’s your chance.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9c5ykEmpIrTiIol281hHQ6qbyl0OnSOsDAGN-bWRQYz7g_M_mTrDRRxpde_AUq1UKxXtF5syAWQAkKDsu4FR3y0Ydh9WdSUtzQm0fJsQugzNaMEIqvXa-LMueVgsMtQzfKHmH1ndSq03gjz0ctLbBGSeUN7E2d37Oe9ajVOe3JGYeZ_oH8H9Gls29-Qim9tdFtdGfAomjfWguWtN5bSp-H3r1Db7HMFXKusSryWZ-D0ABXvh7uoL3lxvEtvOGbeQJkRA50nGjnBfF6-EHVH_PLy8l9Y2XmwjqObInkn7KIhGYlSSzoMfuGx2DnsbuvXXw8sORTP7E2iLygU_EKSDjt-cT-KCGzhI3D4k1h2S8VzqRBSiytsTucrlQFPpOktck/4cy/aiFYpRemQ4msKwEuQWWODA/h2/h001.3OfoRjgAkzrmFwDdK0PFSRwDFSitBPT-Qpw01GgzBr0)****[**Chip in now to fuel our movement in 2025.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.omxvGJO0FMxUXgXT1hDl0F0sJMWmgo3mOlPV-wFsHOkIhqt3QbxdtIrtHrN4DneYKE0xyOsFia98nCYBa-A-rSdFIZKru6HR1fnmF_hOULQcv_tdh0XB-fZR-tvpRP-sucqv5p8vD8b0xFPUlCWvvKTnNZDKGVBmIR4-XMsMA0mRu0TBHZa29A43GEU3iu6t-n2Gv0m9GjgcpFen7QphzNoSzzhZnBCYSlULci2XWr0vGiFum6yADeokBgERH6fqQLg81B7HXM3ra3GIFE74EW-mk4MvWMKBetj6yF8XRic/4cy/aiFYpRemQ4msKwEuQWWODA/h3/h001.vF0sD7Iglflq-NqPTCJgXvATZuUUQUZxNJVvgYMxayE) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9c5ykEmpIrTiIol281hHQ6qbyl0OnSOsDAGN-bWRQYz5WCWzWN2lv0saeYgbYiprbIWlJ36ycvRpqKfCLeFlzKuuL68EwFgVDXpEbYZwFuAJTm0dy5dOeIoXeTUJVZR_sv_DTJZzKhzcetejkpq14q37ZzQPUHsRZTtUYfqxxx8mdjt4yBrnTjpq_PgJEkiwJjb-jPxM8qQHADjaO1yQcAqihESgOf3JW4AlOdhDuBhAv4GVvakEJLNtvZrfMnRhRMQohO6K6Wz0bDUvmlOqVEwtohQuoKy3iWFWbqr5Fgl8CFJn9C9GnB85z77gVGxgznd9toMJeRgmHFMsF00si376U7b2MsS7oPnq-2q1iNk33jXh8EUZoEHXUthNMbVpRB_oAMHBE7cHnw1F3Ph7C-g/4cy/aiFYpRemQ4msKwEuQWWODA/h4/h001.ZuZrZJdTt2vkqk95dLN3Sjc6a98gVv_G98fA1QCGYQw)** Thank you again for being part of this movement. clean_body: | | | We did it, Peter. Thanks to WFP members like you, we didn’t just meet our 2024 end-of-year online fundraising goal — we smashed it. Our target was $100,000, and together, we raised over $125,000! Whether you became a dues-paying member, contributed for the first time, or just cheered us on, you made this happen. This movement — for, by, and of working-class people — runs on grassroots supporters like you. But here’s the deal: hitting this goal wasn’t the finish line — it was a launchpad. The more we raise together, the more we can DO together in 2025. And we’ve got big plans. Here’s what your support will power in the months ahead: More trainings — To prepare progressive candidates and campaigns to win across the country. More organizers in key states — Because the fight to defend democracy happens everywhere, not just in D.C. More working-class candidates — Including challengers who will take on the entrenched and the powerful in primaries, state and local races, and special elections coming up in 2025. More grassroots organizing — To protect abortion rights, tackle the climate crisis, tax the rich, defend our Social Security and Medicare, and fight back against Trump’s MAGA agenda. Let’s be real, Peter:2025 is going to be pivotal. Trump and his allies are going to be focused on their Project 2025 blueprint, a roadmap for rolling back rights, gutting programs that millions depend on, and locking in their power for years to come. We’re notgoing to let that happen. With your support, we’ll grow a multiracial, working-class movement strong enough to slow down, thwart, and ultimately defeat this agenda. And we’ll lay the groundwork to win back power in 2026 and 2028, with a government that works for everyone, not just the billionaire class. Thank you again for being part of this movement. Onward, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: Scammy emails give us the ick 🤢
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We know you’re not an ATM, and we will *never* treat you like one.
#
Hey Derek, quick question — do you get fundraising emails from other candidates + causes?
If we had to guess, you probably get a *lot* of them. And some of them probably don’t treat you with much respect. **In fact, they probably give you the ick.** 🤢
**“DONATE IMMEDIATELY and we’ll QUADRUPLE your gift”**
**“[URGENT] FINAL NOTICE”**
**“If you don’t pitch in, we will LOSE!”**
^Seem familiar? These are just a few examples of the scammy + straight up dishonest tactics some campaigns + orgs use to squeeze people for donations.
**Team Fetterman is proud to do things differently.** We know you’re not an ATM, and we will *never* treat you like one. It’s real people like you who fuel our work, Derek — teachers, nurses, veterans, single parents, retirees, and more. And we couldn’t be more grateful.
So although we still have to ask for money, we’ll do it honestly and humbly: [**John’s work to serve PA in the Senate is funded by small online donations. Will you consider making one today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250107?refcode=em20250107-9767&refcode2=9767_434096_4ipkXR&akid=9767%2E434096%2E4ipkXR)
**[Yes, I’ll chip in today »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250107?amount=5&refcode=em20250107-9767&refcode2=9767_434096_4ipkXR&akid=9767%2E434096%2E4ipkXR)**
Seriously, John has been crystal-clear from Day One of running for U.S. Senate that we will NOT allow our campaign to lie or use other scammy tactics in our fundraising program.
We’ll never act like the sky is falling if you don’t give or trick you into a recurring donation — if we’re asking for a recurring donation, we’ll make that clear up front.
Plus, every deadline we share is real, and was set by our finance team or by the Federal Election Commission.
**What we *will* do is explain how important your support is + give you the opportunity to chip in when you can.** (If you don’t today, that’s 💯 cool with us.)
After all, $3 might not always feel like much. But the fact is that John would never have flipped PA blue and become a U.S. Senator if it weren’t for many thousands of $3 donations. _That’s how powerful just a few bucks can be._
We have so much work to do this year, Derek. We need to take on extreme Republican attacks on basic freedoms, hold the incoming Trump administration accountable + rally support for popular legislation that actually helps working people. And all of that is going to require serious grassroots resources.
[**So we’ll just ask you without any of that scammy BS: Will you help ensure John can have the biggest impact possible in the Senate by making a donation today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250107?refcode=em20250107-9767&refcode2=9767_434096_4ipkXR&akid=9767%2E434096%2E4ipkXR)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250107?amount=5&refcode=em20250107-9767&refcode2=9767_434096_4ipkXR&akid=9767%2E434096%2E4ipkXR)**
From the bottom of our hearts, thank you!
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250107-9767-footer&t=1&refcode2=9767_434096_4ipkXR&akid=9767%2E434096%2E4ipkXR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9767%2E434096%2E4ipkXR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9767%2E434096%2E4ipkXR)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: re: Elon Musk BOMBSHELL

Peter, we’ve all seen the outrageous headlines about Donald Trump’s cabinet picks. Many of them bring little to no experience to the table, and a handful of his nominees are TV personalities for shows like _Fox & Friends and WWE: Raw._ **These people are simply unqualified and unfit to lead, and we need the American people to know that.** That’s why I’m calling for Democrats to form a Shadow Cabinet — to hold Donald Trump’s administration accountable. Together, we’ll push back on their MAGA agenda and counter their divisive message with our own — and we need to act fast, Peter. Donald Trump will be inaugurated in **less than two weeks** , so now is the time to prepare. **[If you can, pitch in today to support these efforts. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The worst symptom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Blaming Trump for all of our problems is not going to put the fire out.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2442%2E4032634%2EezIPLu)
---
It’s important to remember that Trump not the cause of everything that’s broken in America. Don’t get me wrong, he has certainly poured gasoline on the fire. But blaming Trump for all of our problems is not going to put the fire out. There are systemic issues that led to someone like him getting elected in the first place. He is the worst symptom of a corrupt system that rewards the rich and powerful at the expense of everyone else. This system has plagued us for years. It’s a system where Reagan’s trickle-down experiment failed — and is still failing — America’s middle class. A system that has made it harder and harder to start and join a union. A system that says that companies donating exorbitant amounts of money to a political campaign is a form of “free speech.” A system where the government bailed out banks rather than homeowners after the 2008 financial crisis. A system that allows a family to go bankrupt because they dared to receive medical care. A system that allows minority rule in our government because of a racist and archaic filibuster rule. Look, we must call out and tend to the root causes of the deep problems in our economy, our government, and our democracy — the problems that existed way before Donald Trump rode down that elevator in 2015. That’s what I’m focused on while we also fight back against whatever harms the Trump administration brings us over the next four years. And the Democratic party must, must, must fight back with defiant action instead of just pushing back with great reluctance — while also connecting the dots between today’s crises, yesterday’s systemic causes, and the solutions we’re championing. It’s going to take a lot of work to untangle this system — with political leaders fighting for the bold solutions and a strong grassroots movement calling for a better way forward. That’s why it’s so important for you to stay in this fight. **If we can show the American people what it means for a government to actually work for working people — and draw contrasts between that and what the Trump Administration is actually doing — then we can lay a strong foundation for a new way forward.** [**If you’re on board with this roadmap, then please pitch in $28 or anything you can to support our work ahead. I’m going to do everything I can in the Senate to fight back against the Trump administration and advocate for the Democratic party to focus on the bold solutions necessary to fixing our systemic challenges. Your support is what makes this possible.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2888?amount=28&t=8&akid=2442%2E4032634%2EezIPLu)

---

subject: In just a few hours…

body:
This is the last email that we will be sending you about this. | | | Friend, This is it. Our blackout period begins in just a few hours. _**[**These are the last moments we have to build a war chest that will keep our campaign ahead this year. Can we count on you to chip in, friend?**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c18251b73057411795b8a3245b36e23b&_e=aehMa6re98-O1fJw4K8SdF1-7XYurCCl-y2hhpS5nTEaklchfeFX-idoHsGhh7XZvOdEKXVwL5kC_M-6OvTk8VENoB6a2PTH3eUS9svzUPBprYGSQxZ85wwhv2i-snIm-JUUtCAzLsFSQKnqhG_1Yi-TSJVvZO8qmkUPcAFjLd5ytEx1r4W9A1eh5tpFb63xTHWfXEaJo3NmYt0oNR6DimAr5d3Y4Ybx46VUnTD6ljYfOU9XlhPQy1iJ5VYHnRKv8VchtGnT7dtByakECnWNnajV0YYWKnYtvoUbGCoB1bGBi-391adoAVHwClnHWycd)**_ \- Team Miyares

_\---- forwarded message ----_**To:_[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c18251b73057411795b8a3245b36e23b&_e=aehMa6re98-O1fJw4K8SdF1-7XYurCCl-y2hhpS5nTEaklchfeFX-idoHsGhh7XZvOdEKXVwL5kC_M-6OvTk8VENoB6a2PTH3eUS9svzUPBprYGSQxZ85wwhv2i-snIm-JUUtCAzLsFSQKnqhG_1Yi-TSJVvZO8qmkUPcAFjLd6OybtQ2rL94ztQvz30HOPpXbD3xBZLKRcSHp2orpaFOwa_RpXp8xXhPnE20yP4xgLQFlh_Gb9QJz4YDO8MfE02gzVf351FfgSYXEgQkbEvr_TKTWiJG61_i4OgtDoZ9wGT4XTbKCaSFnNbO2meMNY0)_** **Subject:** My opponents have ONE big advantage...**Date:** January 3, 2025
---
Friend, On January 8th, the Virginia Legislature goes in session. I’m excited to enter this focused period of work for our Commonwealth. **But it poses a serious challenge to our re-election campaign:**_**[We’ll be on a mandated fundraising blackout for the duration of the legislative session.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c18251b73057411795b8a3245b36e23b&_e=aehMa6re98-O1fJw4K8SdF1-7XYurCCl-y2hhpS5nTEaklchfeFX-idoHsGhh7XZvOdEKXVwL5kC_M-6OvTk8VENoB6a2PTH3eUS9svzUPBprYGSQxZ85wwhv2i-snIm-JUUtCAzLsFSQKnqhG_1Yi-TSJVvZO8qmkUPcAFjLd7SJMABYbf166M0VD0BBWuUUOezfTvS2NC-jEhfMjmajFJcU8q0gdQ8CEdypwW4VXI7B1PgmArVlsci03qtI8X4XxJCIqn9wJFWyruCSzjJTILTGgE1lZG7qX2H52HAsyEpbdQBvXuqijH2XG0vb3rb)**_ _That doesn’t just mean that I can’t send fundraising solicitations — I couldn’t even_ _accept_ _donations if I wanted to!_ **But do you know who is**** _NOT_****required to engage in a fundraising blackout?** _**My opponents****.**_ That’s right — while I’m working with everything I’ve got for the people of Virginia, they can fundraise to defeat me day in, day out. _And you better believe that they will press this advantage for all they can._ **Friend, both of my opponents are far-left, anti-police, criminal-rights progressives. I refuse to allow them to overtake us in this race for Attorney General.** **That’s why I’m writing to ask for one more contribution before the blackout period.**_**[**Help me hit our Blackout Goal of $10,000 to get us through these next few months.**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=c18251b73057411795b8a3245b36e23b&_e=aehMa6re98-O1fJw4K8SdF1-7XYurCCl-y2hhpS5nTEaklchfeFX-idoHsGhh7XZvOdEKXVwL5kC_M-6OvTk8VENoB6a2PTH3eUS9svzUPBprYGSQxZ85wwhv2i-snIm-JUUtCAzLsFSQKnqhG_1Yi-TSJVvZO8qmkUPcAFjLd5R04XlbubtK1jgPsv2Qg09JNCpqii_p8DRacY5qSkOLCtXifrWSTlfLxXjXPfk-__TzPKpegRO-RTNuZWdsKu7wuc3kRHGTH-3LDl_SjhtBzC52ZLLOAJO5QXk5Gza9Le95FEzJLXVZjzeI3m1IboC)**_ Thank you, Jason Miyares Attorney General

body:

The House Majority is still hanging in the balance!

🚨 Democrats are currently leading in 11 of them – but every single vote needs to be counted to ensure we win!!!
These races represent our best— and possibly last —opportunity to check Donald Trump's insanity and hold his administration accountable.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Fighting back like never before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
From the air we breathe to the water we drink — when we fight for the Green New Deal, we are fighting for a liveable planet for future generations.
#
On Friday, Republican Mike Johnson was elected Speaker of the House.
**He wasted no time attacking our movement for climate justice**.

On the House floor, Johnson said, “We have to stop the attacks on liquefied natural gas, [and] pass legislation to eliminate the Green New Deal.”
From the air we breathe to the water we drink — when we fight for the Green New Deal, **we are fighting for a liveable planet for future generations.**
Now, with a Republican Speaker elected, and Trump returning to the White House in just 13 days, we need to be ready to fight back like never before.
[Will you donate $5 right now to power our fights? Every donation will make a difference in our movement for bold action in response to our climate crisis.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250107.9YK7z-&refcode=em20250107-7867-P_FND_CTR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7867%2E2526796%2E-J9m0G)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250107.9YK7z-&refcode=em20250107-7867-P_FND_CTR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7867%2E2526796%2E-J9m0G)**
Whether or not you can give today, thank you so much for being a part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250107?refcode=em20250107-7867-P_FND_CTR_GND&t=21&refcode2=7867_2526796_-J9m0G&akid=7867%2E2526796%2E-J9m0G)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250107-7867-P_FND_CTR_GND&t=22&akid=7867%2E2526796%2E-J9m0G)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7867%2E2526796%2E-J9m0G) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7867%2E2526796%2E-J9m0G) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7867%2E2526796%2E-J9m0G)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: The Democratic Party
subject: January
body:
---
Derek, It’s January 7, 2025. We’re a week into one of the most important months Democrats will face this year — and the collective response of supporters like you will help determine the outcome. A new Congress has begun. Soon, Donald Trump will be sworn in as our next president. If history is any guide, Trump and his allies will spend their first few weeks in office pushing disastrous policy after disastrous policy. They already plan to hike prices and rip away health care from millions of people. Now, Trump and the Republican Party would love nothing more than to see that Democrats are exhausted and ready to throw in the towel. They’re counting on all of us giving up. We can’t do that. That’s why it’s critical we start the year on a strong footing. We need to build as many resources as we can to prepare for _anything_ coming our way and scale up our work to elect Democrats in pivotal races this year, next year, and beyond. [**So we’re asking: Can Democrats everywhere count on you to reaffirm your commitment to supporting a strong Democratic Party and to standing up to Trump by making a $3 contribution to the Democratic National Committee today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250107_2511_fr&refcode2=2511_22930333_OsPyGo&akid=2511%2E22930333%2EOsPyGo) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250107_2511_fr&refcode2=2511_22930333_OsPyGo&akid=2511%2E22930333%2EOsPyGo)**

name: Shontel Brown
subject: “today, America’s democracy stood.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
This week, in a peaceful exchange of power, Congress certified the 2024 election results.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100023095/521512812/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250107stood_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjg1YWYyNy00YmNkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=osKzYBLVvLm48mjXJgBeIq3eyHw8O998EVY7buaj78I=) Peter,

This week, in a peaceful exchange of power, Congress certified the 2024 election results, including Trump’s presidential win. While this is a dark time for America, **there is still hope.**

For the next four years, I promise you I will go to work every day for the people of Ohio, as I did during my first two terms.

**And I promise you I will do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump and his cronies from toying with our liberties, rights, and our democracy.**

As VP Kamala Harris stated, “**Today, America’s democracy stood.** ” The next four years will be difficult, but my Democratic colleagues in Congress and I are ready to stand alongside the American people and _fight to ensure our democracy remains._

[**We will need all hands on deck over the next four years, but together, we can work to ensure our nation moves forward, not back. subject: The lesson of January 6

# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=23%2E181023%2EjEIKfh)
We just passed the four year anniversary of the January 6 insurrection.
Our democracy was tested that day. We proved that freedom will endure, but we also learned a lesson:
**Democracy is fragile._We must always be ready to defend it._**
Secretary Benson is showing what that looks like in Michigan. Since her election to Secretary of State in 2018, Sec. Benson has dedicated everything to ensuring our elections are smoother and more secure than any other time in history.
**[We can’t take her work for granted. Will you support Jocelyn Benson’s work to defend democracy with a small donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250107-1?refcode=em20250107-1&refcode2=23_181023_jEIKfh&akid=23%2E181023%2EjEIKfh)**
January 6, 2021, will not be the last time our democracy is put to the test. By supporting Secretary Benson’s work, you’re doing your part to celebrate and protect the will of the people.
Thank you,
Benson HQ

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Protecting Medicare, Medicaid, and the Affordable Care Act
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1).
| |
---
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169208.172402.3&snid=2)
---|---
| | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13104)
---
| | | | |
#
# **CATCH UP: Senator Hughes ' Discussion About Cuts to Medicare and Medicaid**
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13105) Senator Hughes recently had a [live discussion](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13105) with [Andrea Ducas](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13106), VP of Healthcare Policy at the [Center for American Progress](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13107), about how we can prepare for the new Trump administration and potential cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, and the Affordable Care Act. Andrea and Senator Hughes answered questions from attendees about what could change for the healthcare they rely on. **[WATCH OR LISTEN TO THE DISCUSSION ONLINE](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13105)**
* * *
**Key Takeaways, Project 2025 seeks to:**
* End Medicare drug price negotiation
* Pave the road to fully privatizing Medicare
* Remove consumer protections from nonsubsidized ACA marketplace plans
* Promote junk insurance plans

* * *
**The biggest change we anticipate is higher costs for millions across the country**. If the plans laid out in Project 2025 are implemented, there will be cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, the Affordable Care Act, and the Inflation Reduction Act. As a result, many costs will be passed to patients and states will need to figure out how to fill the funding gap. These changes will come slow and steady as the funding and programs that hard-working Americans need is taken away. One of the best ways to push back is to stay informed and engaged. We encourage you to listen or watch all the discussions Senator Hughes has been having on Project 2025's potential impacts on healthcare, social security, and education. [All full conversations are available online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13105). If you have questions that weren't addressed during the discussions, reach out to our office and let us know! [WATCH HERE](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13105) If you'd like to see more about Project 2025 and how it could impact your healthcare, [we've put together a simple and easy to read list](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13105) of what was laid out in the 900-page document. Visit our website for an easy to read version of the list. We want all Pennsylvanians to have a clear idea of what the Trump administration could prioritize.
* * *
**_What Else Can We Do?_** Senator Hughes will continue to use every option at the state level to protect Pennsylvanians and ensure that access to quality, affordable healthcare is available. He is also working hard to prepare for other changes that could take money away from hard working individuals and families. We invite you to join [Senator Hughes on Thursday at 3:30PM to learn about Project 2025](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13097) plans to reduce worker rights and protections. Senator Hughes will be joined by labor leaders and experts to talk about how we can all support working Pennsylvanians and unions. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13098) [If you have a question about what could be coming in 2025, join the discussion. ](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13098)
* * *
**Make sure you 're [subscribed to our newsletter](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13099) and following us on social media to stay in the know. ** Throughout the year, we will update constituents when important votes or bills that could hurt working families are being considered. When that happens, it will be critical to reach out to your lawmakers and let them know you do not approve. Lawmakers work for you. If they are not representing your interests, it's important to let them know. [Twitter](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13100) | [Facebook](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13101) | [Instagram](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13102) | [TikTok](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169208.172402.3&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13103)
* * *

name: Team McBride
subject: In case you missed it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
On Friday, Sarah was officially sworn into the 119th Congress.
#
In case you missed it:
**On Friday, Sarah was officially sworn into the 119th Congress.** Hundreds of supporters have signed our card to congratulate her and wish her luck as she kicks off her first term in the House of Representatives.
[**But before we show her the card, we wanted to give you another chance to sign it. Take a moment to add your name now.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card-20250107?source=em20250107-1674&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)
Thank you for signing!
Team McBride
— Forward —
It’s official! 🎉
On Friday, Sarah was sworn in to serve her first term representing Delaware in the U.S. House of Representatives making history as the first trans member of Congress.
[**To celebrate, we’re sending a card to Sarah to congratulate her, and we’d love for you to personally sign it.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card-20250107?source=em20250107-1674&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)
[****](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card-20250107?source=em20250107-1674&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)
In the face of a GOP trifecta, we need champions who will lead with optimism, courage, and a service-first mindset to take on the important fights and roll up their sleeves to deliver for working people. That’s exactly what Sarah will do.
**As Sarah takes her seat in Congress, let’s show her how much her leadership inspires us.[Will you take a moment to sign our card and share your words of support?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card-20250107?source=em20250107-1674&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)**
**[Sign The Card »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card-20250107?source=em20250107-1674&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)**
This is a huge moment for our movement, and it wouldn’t have happened without your support. Thank you for always having Sarah’s back and inspiring progress in our democracy.
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250107-1&t=1&refcode2=1674_21716_gApX8F&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1674%2E21716%2EgApX8F)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Stop Bezos via Our Revolution
subject: Bezos protected Trump, now he's protecting himself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1011?refcode=email-20250107_v&akid=7488%2E5885482%2Ew6kFsQ ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — the Jeff
Bezos-owned Washington Post just rejected a political cartoon depicting
Bezos, Elon Musk and other Oligarchs genuflecting to Trump with big bags
of cash. “I’ve never had a cartoon killed because of who or what I chose
to aim my pen at. Until now,” the cartoonist said after 16 years at WaPo.

An Oligarch like Jeff Bezos owning The Washington Post also gives him the
power to influence our politics. It was Bezos who personally blocked
WaPo’s endorsement of VP Harris in the election. Amazon has donated $1
million to Trump’s inauguration.

This is billionaire control of our elections, politics, media, and
economy. This is Oligarchy and we MUST fight back. Our Revolution will be
on the frontlines protesting in DC and mobilizing actions that our
movement can participate in from anywhere in the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20905?t=1061&akid=7488%2E5885482%2Ew6kFsQ ]Can you make a donation today so we have the resources we need to
mobilize to stop the Oligarchy?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20905?t=1062&akid=7488%2E5885482%2Ew6kFsQ ][IMG]

It’s not just Bezos and Amazon donating to Trump. Apple CEO Tim Cook, Mark
Zuckerberg’s Meta, Uber’s CEO, and OpenAI’s Sam Altman have all donated
millions to Trump’s inauguration fund. What do you think they’re trying to
buy?

The cartoon is accurate: America’s richest corporations and CEOs are
trying to buy favor with Trump. America’s Oligarchs are KISSING the ring.
They want their tax cuts. They want regulations slashed. They want their
billions in government contracts.

media attention to expose the Oligarchy's grift, and pressure politicians
to stand with the American people. Chip in today to help us fight the
Trump-Musk administration every step of the way.

donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

If we do nothing, America’s largest corporations and the billionaire class

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dccf376f1cea431cbb278c32b457c3a8&_e=9uYcfiEef8KwgMt2nkW-Pme_gxGzZifds3vBcaAg9VNPjaIKpMfaSBWUgthEqT66VYO4DxfZ7QtGqMtRrpr6MB8P7G8kVwoPuyfgFoPYxTf5XEoBKVF2ajkLZ8Ot6XLKbt0s7fddkzf5qOGroUngxWWgY9jbJQamNBkuBvk1pb_r9KbG2FdgBm26TehnrBEzTlzauf43MeFTfs2MSsbTlgNa117ONdP5kykuPWCDE5-t7k61CiKEa8vtBZ2lJkBbHYE-t-o81FqQSLeu301H1ZKeaymbi8WGqdFo4OjOe8mTTX5hDUPoBwdNe1oG2D9TtagR-rOiGqYNXtVoJYz4gaAOBYwlasfgBmFlW5oAjmsWn36NnYHe0L5vp4r1Ui2jnnOeqWnNO1MMHhzQGPdL4g%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dccf376f1cea431cbb278c32b457c3a8&_e=9uYcfiEef8KwgMt2nkW-Pme_gxGzZifds3vBcaAg9VNPjaIKpMfaSBWUgthEqT66VYO4DxfZ7QtGqMtRrpr6MB8P7G8kVwoPuyfgFoPYxTf5XEoBKVF2ajkLZ8Ot6XLKbt0s7fddkzf5qOGroUngxWWgY9jbJQamNBkuBvk1pb_r9KbG2FdgBm26TehnrBEzTlzauf43MeFTfs2MSsbTlgNa117ONdP5kykuPWCDE5_UZbWXYevlSiuLy2MV-PPlFQBDhaq1LlegtMMCUD-GQ281MJ4J8t2lLR3LyMQJSzrwQH4lVmhh51_qNaiNyw8homfQcFmWFkNIYKcyaZrMfyaJr7gAJfXKs5-cpvlTiDZt710GI877CX1R2eEPesf3igOvnL2nzJuLYthj4xA3mA%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dccf376f1cea431cbb278c32b457c3a8&_e=9uYcfiEef8KwgMt2nkW-Pme_gxGzZifds3vBcaAg9VNPjaIKpMfaSBWUgthEqT66VYO4DxfZ7QtGqMtRrpr6MB8P7G8kVwoPuyfgFoPYxTf5XEoBKVF2ajkLZ8Ot6XLKbt0s7fddkzf5qOGroUngxWWgY9jbJQamNBkuBvk1pb_r9KbG2FdgBm26TehnrBEzTlzauf43MeFTfs2MSsbTlgNa117ONdP5kykuPWCDE58TI36lhDIMpDCudxVZdrBC55N5_Zv7--YbQZpmPHMzuWbbcWlOfwIGC5FkG7R1bDX7Nbllty5ZI7z8DApFqv5uGiES-V4i8E0CPH3hRjKgp7qFd8xNluYcDMN-jaL-fEsqewyK9XsCfOaU2ctF8aaxtBeq7TlN_mcU6FevrKanEg%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dccf376f1cea431cbb278c32b457c3a8&_e=9uYcfiEef8KwgMt2nkW-Pme_gxGzZifds3vBcaAg9VNPjaIKpMfaSBWUgthEqT66VYO4DxfZ7QtGqMtRrpr6MB8P7G8kVwoPuyfgFoPYxTf5XEoBKVF2ajkLZ8Ot6XLKbt0s7fddkzf5qOGroUngxWWgY9jbJQamNBkuBvk1pb_r9KbG2FdgBm26TehnrBEzTlzauf43MeFTfs2MSsbTlgNa117ONdP5kykuPWCDE593XNiMUPrlE70kO_SUKGEL30zjDXjFSE33fm5JEPj9xJPc7SMxMDp4MEmjACzhxINX1d5eXRtPZ1GdBJbm3fk2F6MdHvIx5polpUqMFeUByzrt4kA2ncR7CvRvWggeVYTiQfhm8uU0glUA5Kl9O9uMQpHyptYad1HFiTRE6WHMpw%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dccf376f1cea431cbb278c32b457c3a8&_e=9uYcfiEef8KwgMt2nkW-Pme_gxGzZifds3vBcaAg9VNPjaIKpMfaSBWUgthEqT66VYO4DxfZ7QtGqMtRrpr6MB8P7G8kVwoPuyfgFoPYxTf5XEoBKVF2ajkLZ8Ot6XLKbt0s7fddkzf5qOGroUngxWWgY9jbJQamNBkuBvk1pb_r9KbG2FdgBm26TehnrBEzTlzauf43MeFTfs2MSsbTlgNa117ONdP5kykuPWCDE59dxcw5vg3VP4-Lr1zjORVwTAKHpDSerklpAGGnv9BEojd8qEXXQbEPUINBgIzosUgh7RMv527z1zlsHUHOdg9Emubc5qsJGyCcAOyEYYknYpUD7kxjRfdm2-djhxs8UsMEU4h1Mztq1gQiga_01XAkaDi7eG0pcAVByYI2_sAf9g%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dccf376f1cea431cbb278c32b457c3a8&_e=9uYcfiEef8KwgMt2nkW-Pme_gxGzZifds3vBcaAg9VNPjaIKpMfaSBWUgthEqT66VYO4DxfZ7QtGqMtRrpr6MB8P7G8kVwoPuyfgFoPYxTf5XEoBKVF2ajkLZ8Ot6XLKbt0s7fddkzf5qOGroUngxWWgY9jbJQamNBkuBvk1pb_r9KbG2FdgBm26TehnrBEzTlzauf43MeFTfs2MSsbTlgNa117ONdP5kykuPWCDE58qBFXqoYkbF5Ef6bo4mXs-JVKskoZaPrTggrIL8HiAjPLq7IRTE8Sy7ahDRKYKiokZfni9K6zNhO8oGQriOkel2WewqgiiCKwemTn55BZnNZ4YUWPUGKip4YLRTzJKD7ODGJsVHyhYxCPnVzqPWBWzGHBwkHwI3s1mKam2Swo2DQ%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=dccf376f1cea431cbb278c32b457c3a8&_e=9uYcfiEef8KwgMt2nkW-PtBaZKtQ1trMnIdY-Ng-mRwUjXq1pCr-gRVbEGYGgxGvrJROGwO0k1KelkixiDhqdAZCF6FPh7KEY-vP4devUchygy43TBISLZRmwMnSTSwmj6jbOO0w9HOcQuNyaVaLeVzKpIq-6sm_g7g2LJ8gs0NlNFW9eqKDSrEeTUZqTyarZOwDW7Z9E4-7xen8xOSNEQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Thank You Greater Lehigh Valley!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
It is an Honor to be Officially Sworn In! | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Friend,
Because of the hard work and support of friends like you, I had the honor of a lifetime of being officially sworn in as your Congressman for the 7th District of Pennsylvania this past Friday.
As you can imagine, it has been a whirlwind of activity in both D.C. and the district as me and my team prepare to bring new leadership to the Greater Lehigh Valley and address the issues impacting our families, workers, and seniors.
I look forward to the opportunity to serve you and everyone in the 7th District.
---
| Chloe, my son, and I had a great time soaking up this historic moment. I am excited to help bring about some much-needed change and be a strong voice for our community on the federal level.
**We will host a Lehigh Valley Swearing-in celebration this Friday, January 10th.** It will be at the Lehigh County Courthouse at 4:00 pm, followed by a reception at the Americus Hotel at 5:00 pm. For more information, please see the flyer below. If you are interested in attending,**you must RSVP** to [sara@mackenzieforcongress.com](mailto:sara@mackenzieforcongress.com) by Thursday, January 9th at 12:00 pm. Hope to see you all there!
---
| Sincerely,
Ryan Mackenzie

subject: BREAKING: “NC Supreme Court blocks state from certifying Riggs as the winner in high court election”

Breaking news, Peter — the North Carolina Supreme Court’s GOP supermajority just baselessly blocked certification of the state supreme court election where Democratic incumbent Allison Riggs defeated Republican Jefferson Griffin.
**Let’s call this what it is:_A partisan, anti-democratic power grab._**
Republicans are trying to nullify an election just because North Carolina voters didn’t vote their way. It’s an all-out assault on democracy — not only undermining the future of free and fair elections, but also the trust of the voters in the state.
**If Republicans succeed at overturning the will of the people, they’ll use this playbook all over the country.[Help keep up the fight for fair and free elections in North Carolina and nationwide.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100023860/521515201/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCAllisonRiggsRR_email_20250107-NDRC-Tier1-NCAllisonRiggsRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250107-NDRC-Tier1-NCAllisonRiggsRR_&utm_campaign=NCAllisonRiggsRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4ODkzNGJlLTUwY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S81bQ8_ORrDNkXFwKutXS7d7pCKCAeSnUu95DE26UPY=)**

Justice Anita Earls — the only other Democrat on the Court — dissented from the decision, writing that:
“[T]he public interest requires that the court not interfere with the ordinary course of democratic processes as set by statute and the state constitution.”
**She’s right, Peter. The people have spoken, yet Republican Jefferson Griffin refuses to concede.** Instead, he’s tried to undo his loss by:
* Calling for a recount, which only confirmed Justice Riggs’ victory
* Challenging over 60,000 votes — which the North Carolina State Board of Elections rejected on the merits
* Skipping Wake County Superior Court and filing an extraordinary request with the North Carolina Supreme Court to order the North Carolina State Board of Elections to throw out the previously okay-ed votes
* Asking the North Carolina Supreme Court to block certification of Justice Riggs’s victory until they rule on his request to throw out 60,000+ votes

**Democracy is on the line in North Carolina — and we need you with us.[Rush a $30 donation now to protect our democracy and help elect fair maps champions like Justice Allison Riggs.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100023867/521515208/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCAllisonRiggsRR_email_20250107-NDRC-Tier1-NCAllisonRiggsRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250107-NDRC-Tier1-NCAllisonRiggsRR_&utm_campaign=NCAllisonRiggsRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4ODkzNGJlLTUwY2QtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S81bQ8_ORrDNkXFwKutXS7d7pCKCAeSnUu95DE26UPY=)**

Team NDRC

clean_body: Help keep up the fight for fair and free elections in North Carolina and nationwide. | | = Breaking news, Peter — the North Carolina Supreme Court’s GOP supermajority just baselessly blocked certification of the state supreme court election where Democratic incumbent Allison Riggs defeated Republican Jefferson Griffin. Let’s call this what it is:A partisan, anti-democratic power grab. Republicans are trying to nullify an election just because North Carolina voters didn’t vote their way. It’s an all-out assault on democracy — not only undermining the future of free and fair elections, but also the trust of the voters in the state. If Republicans succeed at overturning the will of the people, they’ll use this playbook all over the country.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Justice Anita Earls — the only other Democrat on the Court — dissented from the decision, writing that: “[T]he public interest requires that the court not interfere with the ordinary course of democratic processes as set by statute and the state constitution.” She’s right, Peter. The people have spoken, yet Republican Jefferson Griffin refuses to concede. Instead, he’s tried to undo his loss by: Calling for a recount, which only confirmed Justice Riggs’ victory Challenging over 60,000 votes — which the North Carolina State Board of Elections rejected on the merits Skipping Wake County Superior Court and filing an extraordinary request with the North Carolina Supreme Court to order the North Carolina State Board of Elections to throw out the previously okay-ed votes Asking the North Carolina Supreme Court to block certification of Justice Riggs’s victory until they rule on his request to throw out 60,000+ votes Democracy is on the line in North Carolina — and we need you with us.= Thanks so much — we’ll keep you updated on this one. subject: What happens when the IRS goes after easy targets?
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0b0019acc24b4e04a5a5e0ea454dfe3d&_e=FxALuXz1r5dy-4zqZuOxZzsR106vqknHPwlXX2JrpfgzkeKo8bEZA6TSpWdTgBLFknfIuI9T5VI9zM8Pgv8D6yhLbBB0KOn0ElvRtfnl2dTYMsyFVrBquOfAthaUaBObB7o8eJu_oHeATHPOdWrdfVlnRzSIu_4jc7yA2Pl9WbjTmPn28sCICOXWcpNIWdh3c0wv_YtFuB8-xj7YJHni6ESbHJWkvif1AOvbNz4axThe3-CYv8521qNwCxuju-N2OgUmlsIcn5wedSeXe-yPRO-n1UZBKNu26yhc2HPw2ouslsPCJdzHIVvzy4lGkg_u_j-7B3TfZjFTtfl_DytORNzlm572Q32MpdL8Bl0wzm77I3oER3zxVLxYSIGrg9kE2JXrFyJIpjQfNSMVAJPHyUJbWyBLTJpFdb2grG_-BLc%3D)

Peter,

If you've ever felt like the IRS is breathing down your neck, you're not alone.

Small business owners, gig workers, and everyday taxpayers are facing unprecedented scrutiny from the IRS, thanks to its growing reach and invasive tactics.

Unfortunately, this subject won't be in the news much, but I promise you it will have a big impact in the future if we do not get the IRS back under control.

**But there 's good news: The National Taxpayers Union (NTU) is fighting back on your behalf.**

I am Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union. NTU is the "Taxpayers' Lobbyist." We fight to ensure that all Americans are able to pursue their dreams without the heavy hand of the government holding them back.

[NTU is protecting small businesses from IRS abuse, but we can't do this alone. Will you chip in $10, $35, or even $100 today to support our efforts?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0b0019acc24b4e04a5a5e0ea454dfe3d&_e=FxALuXz1r5dy-4zqZuOxZzsR106vqknHPwlXX2JrpfgzkeKo8bEZA6TSpWdTgBLFknfIuI9T5VI9zM8Pgv8D6yhLbBB0KOn0ElvRtfnl2dTYMsyFVrBquOfAthaUaBObB7o8eJu_oHeATHPOdWrdfVlnRzSIu_4jc7yA2Pl9WbjTmPn28sCICOXWcpNIWdh3c0wv_YtFuB8-xj7YJHni6ESbHJWkvif1AOvbNz4axThe3-CYv8521qNwCxuju-N26bc_UvWO2JjOqaKvy2mWlt7xP8IYTqQ2KOW16GnNYDETKlPChPkOEVj7fzZKIoHPqEoQGivmNgNKE2AeGWUsii2EZ0XeuEKgyJNcZOAWLFQPXnl4qDv0nUJ-GV-usVNIzua703w4zfBQD5gzAxltf2wVen-XjN6cUTl0NL-gC0RUxIK2T2es6-fU8V4ky2oN)

[Donate](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0b0019acc24b4e04a5a5e0ea454dfe3d&_e=FxALuXz1r5dy-4zqZuOxZzsR106vqknHPwlXX2JrpfgzkeKo8bEZA6TSpWdTgBLFknfIuI9T5VI9zM8Pgv8D6yhLbBB0KOn0ElvRtfnl2dTYMsyFVrBquOfAthaUaBObB7o8eJu_oHeATHPOdWrdfVlnRzSIu_4jc7yA2Pl9WbjTmPn28sCICOXWcpNIWdh3c0wv_YtFuB8-xj7YJHni6ESbHJWkvif1AOvbNz4axThe3-CYv8521qNwCxuju-N2OHaneFuUiTpkcjGJEv70bytXtBxVclKsh778GP_Besx6Re7yq3jse-jbCCOykeN98uzXkm-A5XHOjbQBfRc-YvVRtOpAahKoWichL8-tbw63L-oH4mwpbxo_8Nchb5ttm_rVXrqDtgvGTTk9XGdwUCic6ox_YeUFsQT_vmYsj6RhnsHDLVOgfbRB6nUIP05u)

Here are just a few of the victories the National Taxpayers Union achieved in its campaign to reform the IRS.

**Pushing Back on IRS Overreach**
In another major win, NTU was instrumental in stopping the IRS from expanding its bank reporting requirements. This would have forced banks to share details of millions of Americans' personal financial transactions just for moving their own money around.

**NTU rallied taxpayers, worked with policymakers, and helped to halt this invasion of privacy in its tracks.**

In another instance, the IRS tried to cancel a hearing on its own rulemaking that would have weakened protections for taxpayers seeking to appeal an audit finding.

**Because we said we wanted to testify - we forced the IRS to hold the hearing. Now, we are putting our efforts on this and other taxpayer rights matters to Members of Congress to strengthen these protections. **

**Defending Small Businesses**
Just this year, NTU helped expose the IRS's overreach on issues like micro-captive insurance, a critical tool for small businesses to manage their risk. The IRS wanted to treat these legitimate strategies as tax evasion schemes, targeting business owners across the country.

**But thanks to NTU 's relentless advocacy, we've shined a light on this aggressive IRS behavior, and now Congress is hearing from entrepreneurs like you, demanding action. **

**Protecting You from Tax Hikes**
Let's not forget the battle we waged when Congress was considering massive tax hikes to fund reckless spending. NTU stood firm, advocating for taxpayers in every corner of the country.

**Our efforts resulted in billions of dollars in planned tax hikes being stripped from the final budget. That 's money saved for you and your family. We've even succeeded in paring back the excessive $80 billion in extra funding the IRS was given in 2022. **

But we can't rest on these wins. The IRS continues to seek more authority, and the fight is far from over. We need your help to keep the IRS in check and protect small business owners and other taxpayers from being unfairly targeted.

You can help support the rights of taxpayers by donating today.

The National Taxpayers Union is the longest-serving organization in America fighting for taxpayers. Our mission is to achieve favorable, pro-taxpayer policy outcomes using the most effective team on Capitol Hill and in the states.

And when the IRS attempts to make easy targets out of small businesses and individual households, we're there to push back in the courts and in Congress.

**_The National Taxpayers Union is working for a tax system that Americans can respect rather than fear_.**

With your support, NTU will continue to stand up to the IRS when it's acting out of bounds, push back on burdensome regulations, and make sure your hard-earned dollars stay in your pocket -- not the government's.

[Help NTU keep the IRS from abusing taxpayers, big and small, by donating today >>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0b0019acc24b4e04a5a5e0ea454dfe3d&_e=FxALuXz1r5dy-4zqZuOxZzsR106vqknHPwlXX2JrpfgzkeKo8bEZA6TSpWdTgBLFknfIuI9T5VI9zM8Pgv8D6yhLbBB0KOn0ElvRtfnl2dTYMsyFVrBquOfAthaUaBObB7o8eJu_oHeATHPOdWrdfVlnRzSIu_4jc7yA2Pl9WbjTmPn28sCICOXWcpNIWdh3c0wv_YtFuB8-xj7YJHni6ESbHJWkvif1AOvbNz4axThe3-CYv8521qNwCxuju-N2zVsbCL4D6maSULv1bFCUk6RhaY3ZdHDp5pgzRv9s0EihkFOlDyZftDKEbqwVAIgD75LUliIO0TwYWA5_sHv__OMFdayu0k_lgrBWn0ITGgsVoSO4ug6sz_-kt1IhruVeznHg_RcPetfn0mg-KACav2nPZRAAqCb-7F6oIPkv1BeqY79PZfI4BOjA12gGHaeB)

Thank you,

Pete Sepp
President
National Taxpayers Union

Protecting You from Tax Hikes Let's not forget the battle we waged when Congress was considering massive tax hikes to fund reckless spending. NTU stood firm, advocating for taxpayers in every corner of the country. Our efforts resulted in billions of dollars in planned tax hikes being stripped from the final budget. That 's money saved for you and your family. We've even succeeded in paring back the excessive $80 billion in extra funding the IRS was given in 2022. But we can't rest on these wins. The IRS continues to seek more authority, and the fight is far from over. We need your help to keep the IRS in check and protect small business owners and other taxpayers from being unfairly targeted. You can help support the rights of taxpayers by donating today. The National Taxpayers Union is the longest-serving organization in America fighting for taxpayers. Our mission is to achieve favorable, pro-taxpayer policy outcomes using the most effective team on Capitol Hill and in the states. And when the IRS attempts to make easy targets out of small businesses and individual households, we're there to push back in the courts and in Congress. The National Taxpayers Union is working for a tax system that Americans can respect rather than fear. With your support, NTU will continue to stand up to the IRS when it's acting out of bounds, push back on burdensome regulations, and make sure your hard-earned dollars stay in your pocket -- not the government's. Thank you, Pete Sepp President National Taxpayers Union The National Taxpayers Union is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to the National Taxpayers Union are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. You may consider making a tax-deductible gift to our sister organization, the National Taxpayers Union Foundation, a 501(c)(3). If you would like to mail a check or give via a foundation, DAF, or retirement account, you can find the National Taxpayers Union Foundation EIN and mailing address below: EIN: 52-1122683 Address: The National Taxpayers Union Foundation 122 C Street, NW Suite 700 Washington, DC 20001 |
